About The Italian Jazz Trio – An Exquisite Jazz & Swing Ensemble, Based in Rome, Italy

What discerning clients cherish most about The Italian Jazz Trio: Impeccable professionalism, warm and refined communication, elegantly curated Italian jazz, a romantic ambience, a flexible lineup, a guest-favourite experience, the perfect aperitivo accompaniment, and polished musicianship.

The Italian Jazz Trio is a bespoke collective of consummate musicians, dedicated to delivering an impeccably refined musical experience.

We are honoured to be featured on FixTheMusic’s curated selection of Italy’s finest jazz bands.

Performing exquisite instrumental renditions of classic Jazz standards and Bossa nova masterpieces, the trio crafts the perfect sonic tapestry for any occasion of distinction.

These virtuosos are renowned for their elegance, their effortless class, the irresistible swing that invites the foot to tap, and the ineffable magic they bring to every celebration.

Please explore our 2026 curated set list.

Remarkably versatile, the ensemble can shift seamlessly from the most subtle of background melodies and romantic serenades to high-energy classic swing, igniting the dance floor with refined exuberance.

They are frequently engaged for weddings and exclusive events at such prestigious venues as Hotel Villa Cipressi on Lake Como, The Atlanta Hotel in Rome, and Hotel Villa Olmi in Florence, Italy.

Request an inquiry with The Italian Jazz Trio 💬
italian-jazz-trio-wedding-band.description_html:
With an extraordinary depth of experience, The Italian Jazz Trio has graced over 350 weddings and corporate events, performing regularly across Italy and throughout Europe.

Discover our exclusive selection of Italy's most distinguished jazz bands ➡️

The Italian Jazz Trio is a masterfully old-fashioned jazz ensemble, with a repertoire of timeless songs made iconic by Ella Fitzgerald, Frank Sinatra, Louis Armstrong, Billie Holiday, and Ray Charles, among others.

Their refined song list spans from the 1930s through the beloved Great American Songbook classics of the 1940s and 1950s. This ensemble comprises exceptionally talented musicians who have performed in some of Europe’s most illustrious venues, ensuring the perfect musical accompaniment for your wedding reception.

For an even more melodious experience, The Italian Jazz Trio can be elevated with an outstanding female vocalist, or expanded into a jazz quartet featuring a sublime saxophone.

View the complete range of bespoke wedding bands in Italy

For a more exuberant and dance-centric performance during the after-dinner set, the group is also available as a four-piece ensemble with a captivating female singer, offering an exquisite fusion of Jazz, Swing, Soul/Motown, Disco, Pop, and Dance.

About The Fireflies – An Exquisite Wedding & Party Ensemble, Based in Rome, Italy

Impeccably praised by discerning clientele for their professionalism, responsiveness, and bespoke playlists, The Fireflies orchestrate seamless transitions from ceremony to reception. Their refined performances—marked by high-energy vocals and impeccably packed dance floors—are consistently lauded as the crowning jewel of every celebration.

The Fireflies are a curated five-piece ensemble, uniting a consummate female vocalist, a masterful guitarist, a versatile pianist, a talented drummer, and a visionary bassist who also serves as the band’s arranger and founder. Together, they craft an immersive musical experience that elevates any event.

We are honoured to be featured on FixTheMusic’s 21 Best Wedding Bands in Rome and the 28 Best Wedding Bands in Italy.

Kindly explore our 2026 Set List.

We are regularly engaged for weddings and events at such prestigious venues as Villa Cini in Arezzo, Casa Olivi in Macerata, and Borgo della Merluzza in Rome, Italy.

Inquire About The Fireflies

View the complete range of refined wedding bands in Italy.

Below are the exquisite services we offer for weddings in Italy:

Ceremony: Your cherished melodies performed with piano and voice, or with cello (at an additional cost); a microphone for speeches is included.

Aperitif Moment (Lounge Set): A four-piece ensemble—voice, double bass, piano, and drums—presenting Italian and international classics reimagined in a jazz key, alongside solo pieces and bossa nova arrangements.

Seated Lunch or Dinner: Elegant piped background music managed through a dedicated audio system, with a microphone for speeches included.

Cake Cutting and First Dance: Accompanied by your most beloved songs.

The Party (Dance Set): A four-piece band—voice, electric bass, keyboards, and drums—delivering contemporary hits and timeless classics live, without breaks, akin to an impeccable DJ set.

After Party: A curated DJ set (available at an additional cost).

Saxophonist (available at an additional cost).

We also provide the following premium equipment for our events:

Audio Service: Audio System PRO EVOX 5 1600w, Digital Mixer Behringer Air Xr16, 2 monitor RCF Art 708, Shure microphone, stands, cables, etc.

Light Service: 2 bar LED, 2 Par RGB LED, 1 ROTO Par RGB, 1 Smoke Machine.

Backline: Bass Amp GR BASS, Yamaha drum kit, Nord Stage piano, stands and cables.

Follow our journey on Facebook and Instagram.

For further refined details, please visit our website.

What discerning clients cherish most about The Sonics: an exceptional ensemble, supremely talented musicians, impeccable vocals, a meticulously curated repertoire, and the ability to keep guests dancing until the final note.

The Sonics stand as a premier wedding band for hire in Rome and across Italy, synonymous with refined artistry and unforgettable celebrations.

Delivering high-energy electric party sets, these consummate professionals adapt their performance to suit the unique atmosphere of any occasion. Whether an intimate wedding, a grand corporate gala, or a prestigious function, The Sonics pride themselves on an expansive repertoire and an innate ability to captivate audiences of every generation.

We are honoured to be featured on FixTheMusic’s 28 Best Wedding Bands in Italy 🏆 — a testament to our unwavering commitment to excellence.

If your vision demands the finest wedding band Rome (Italy) has to offer, we invite you to connect with us and begin crafting your perfect musical journey.

wedding-band-rome-italy-sonics.description_html:
This party band offers an impeccably curated repertoire that spans acoustic melodies, electrifying rock anthems, pop, soul, and—of course—your most cherished party songs.

Featuring top-tier artists such as Rihanna, Ed Sheeran, Elvis, Lady Gaga, ABBA, and Nirvana, the band ensures its catalogue is always current, ready to elevate your special event with the latest musical excellence.

Fronted by a captivating female vocalist, The Sonics can be complemented by additional musicians and even a live DJ, guaranteeing flawless sound quality that inspires the entire crowd to the dance floor.

Offering a refined selection of line-up options—from a refined duo to a full band of up to six members, or an extended configuration—the band tailors its presence to your event’s precise requirements.

We invite clients to select their preferred songs from our bespoke set list, and to identify up to five pieces the band may omit. This curated selection serves as a reference for artist, title, and musical style, allowing us to create a truly personalised set list for your occasion. Please note that the final set list on the evening will be determined by the band’s musical director to ensure a seamless and unforgettable experience.

We also present the Live Band Karaoke Experience—an immersive, interactive show where you and your guests take the stage to sing alongside an accomplished live band, celebrating in the most memorable fashion.

  • 4 musicians
  • one host
  • microphone
  • dedicated lyrics screen
  • over 200 song titles to choose from

The Sonics are a versatile pop & rock wedding band in Italy, distinguished by exquisite female vocals.

Planning a corporate celebration, convention, business event, wedding, birthday, surprise party, private soirée, promotion, or gala? This versatile party band may be precisely the refined touch you seek.

New for 2024: The Sonics now offer a live band karaoke experience. They are among Italy’s only bandeoke groups, perfect for weddings and corporate events that demand unforgettable interactivity.

View our curated list of Italy's finest wedding bands ➡️

wedding-band-rome-italy-sonics.faq_html:
<details><summary>Qual è il prezzo del tuo servizio?</summary>A partire da 1500€.



</details><details><summary>Cosa include il pack matrimonio?</summary>Live set acustico per ricevimento/cerimonia/aperitivo, live set dance/rock/party, DJ set (opzionale), possibilità di richiedere e scegliere brani preferiti da ascoltare e/o ballare.



</details><details><summary>Con quanto anticipo mi devo mettere in contatto con te?</summary>Prima possibile!



</details><details><summary>Grandezza della formazione?</summary>Solista, piccola (2-3 musicisti), media (4-6 musicisti).



</details><details><summary>Repertorio?</summary>Da acoustic al party/rock, dal soul all' easy listening alla dance, da Elvis a Lady Gaga, dagli Abba ai Nirvana, da Gianni Morandi ai Subsonica in continuo aggiornamento.



</details><details><summary>Posso chiedere dei brani non inseriti nel repertorio?</summary>No problem, è possibile scegliere brani da inserire nel setlist.



</details><details><summary>Esperienza?</summary>La band è attiva da 7 anni, composta da musicisti professionisti, con lunga esperienza anche con artisti di fama nazionale!



</details><details><summary>Disponi di strumentazione propria?</summary>Sì.



</details><details><summary>Hai bisogno di un materiale in concreto o di specifiche condizioni per poter offrire il servizio?</summary>No.



</details><details><summary>Hai la possibilità di effettuare delle trasferte?</summary>Sì, ovunque!



</details><details><summary>Esiste un sovrapprezzo in caso di trasferta?</summary>Sì, da concordare in base alla destinazione...etc...



</details><details><summary>Lavori per più di un matrimonio al giorno?</summary>No.



</details><details><summary>Lavori da solo o con un'equipe di professionisti?</summary>In equipe.



</details><details><summary>Quanto tempo dura l'esibizione?</summary>Secondo richiesta.



</details><details><summary>Di quanto tempo hai bisogno per preparare l'esibizione?</summary>Il minimo indispensabile, cambia in base alle richieste del cliente, alla location, etc.



</details><details><summary>2izzi esibizioni all'aperto?</summary>Sì.</details>

wedding-band-nice-france-riviera-roaming.intro_html:
Riviera Roaming Band – An Exquisite Acoustic Ensemble Based in Nice, Curated for Refined Weddings and Events Across France, Italy, and Switzerland

What discerning clients cherish most about Riviera Roaming Band: an impeccably high-energy roaming presence, bespoke crowd interaction that captivates guests of all ages, and a flawlessly flexible, professional atmosphere.

Originally conceived as an intimate duo, Riviera Roaming Band has since evolved into a premier roaming ensemble, now offering a curated selection of configurations for weddings and extraordinary celebrations.

Explore the complete collection of wedding bands in France.

For those seeking a more amplified experience, the band may perform with acoustic drums and a sound system—an elevated option available at an additional fee.

We are honoured to be listed among the 24 Best Wedding Bands in France 🏆 by FixTheMusic.

Recently, we had the privilege of performing for a celebrated luxury fashion house at the exquisite Château Volterra in Ramatuelle, France.

Follow us on Facebook and Instagram for a curated visual journey.

Given the exceptional demand for our refined performances at weddings and events throughout Europe, we now offer two alternative ensembles (showcased in the videos below), meticulously trained by lead vocalist and manager Pierre to deliver the same dynamic, bespoke experience as our flagship band.

Discover all of our France-based roaming bands ➡️

We are regularly engaged for weddings and exclusive celebrations at illustrious venues such as Villa Pellegrini in Italy, Hotel Vitznauerhof in Switzerland, and Villa Mandala in Saint-Tropez, France.

Contact Riviera Roaming Band

Every musician in the ensemble has studied at France’s most prestigious music universities, dedicating countless hours to perfecting each song. Their vocal harmonies are nothing short of breathtaking.

View all of our France-based roaming bands ➡️

Riviera Roaming Band commands a repertoire of over 200 songs, spanning every era and virtually every genre—a truly refined selection for any occasion.

Based on the Côte d’Azur, Riviera Roaming Band is available for bespoke performances throughout France and Europe.

When Elton John himself praises their artistry, one can trust in their impeccable quality.

If you seek to engage the finest pop covers wedding band the South of France has to offer, we invite you to connect with Riviera Roaming Band.

Follow us on Facebook and Instagram.

Please visit our website for further refined details.

Note: Should you book one of our alternative line-ups, the set list may differ from that listed here. Please enquire for bespoke arrangements.

florence-string-quartet-tuscany-italy.intro_html:
The Florence String Quartet – An Exquisite Ensemble for Weddings & Events in Tuscany and Across Italy

What discerning clients most adore about The Florence String Quartet: an impeccably curated ceremony atmosphere, refined musicality, consummate professionalism, extraordinary flexibility with bespoke requests, flawless communication, a vast and sophisticated repertoire, punctuality, effortless collaboration, and an indelible impression upon every guest.

The Florence String Quartet is an ensemble of the highest calibre, based in Florence and coveted for weddings and celebrations throughout Tuscany, Italy, and beyond. Their artistry transforms every occasion into an unforgettable, luxurious experience.

Explore the complete selection of exquisite string quartets in Italy on FixTheMusic.

With a wealth of experience and a distinguished repertoire spanning classical masterpieces, contemporary compositions, operatic arias, and celebrated film scores, they deliver a sound that is both timeless and bespoke.

Clients who have enquired with The Florence String Quartet have also expressed interest in these exceptional musicians on FixTheMusic:

  1. The Italy String Quartet

  2. Italian String Quartet

  3. Sparkle Strings

  4. Laura Violin

  5. The Florence Jazz Band

  6. The Wedding Tenor

  7. Mythos Strings

The quartet ranks among FixTheMusic’s most sought-after classical ensembles, with an extraordinarily busy calendar through 2026 and 2027.

View the full array of wedding music in Italy.

Our refined artistry is regularly invited to grace weddings and events at such illustrious venues as Abbazia di San Galgano in Siena, Belmond Villa San Michele in Fiesole, and Villa Miani in Rome.

Enquire with The Florence String Quartet 💬
florence-string-quartet-tuscany-italy.description_html:
The ensemble also offers an intimate string duo and trio for weddings and functions across Italy, as well as solo violin or cello—perfect for the most discerning ceremony or private gathering. Additional instruments may be added to create a truly bespoke arrangement, including oboe, flute, or voice (tenor, soprano, and beyond).

Discover Italy’s finest string quartets for hire ➡️

Should your vision call for an Italian folk trio or quartet, or perhaps a DJ for the evening celebration and an acoustic singer-guitarist, the group can seamlessly provide these refined options.

The quartet is led and managed with impeccable grace by Lorenzo, a master violinist.

These virtuosi are available to elevate weddings and corporate events throughout Italy, including Siena, Arezzo, Pisa, Grosseto, Perugia, and Livorno.

To request a bespoke quotation for your wedding or event, please contact us via FixTheMusic for a complimentary, no-obligation proposal.

If you wish to secure the most distinguished string quartet Florence has to offer for your wedding or celebration, we invite you to reach out.

italian-sax-dj.intro_html: About Italian Sax & DJ – an exquisite wedding saxophonist & DJ, based in Rome, Italy
italian-sax-dj.description_html:
Presenting Italian Sax & DJ — a distinguished musician of impeccable refinement, based in the timeless city of Rome. With over two decades of curated expertise, he has graced the most exclusive events and luxury destinations across the globe, from bespoke private soirées and opulent theatre performances to elite corporate gatherings and premier venues worldwide.

His artistry has been showcased for illustrious international broadcasters, including Sky, Rai, Mediaset, RTL Hungary, TVR, Radio Europa FM, and Magic FM. Beyond the airwaves, he has been entrusted by an extraordinary roster of multinational enterprises and luxury brands — among them Waldorf Astoria, Hard Rock Café Company, Mondadori, Max Mara, The Woolmark Company, Benetton, Feltrinelli, Sheraton Hotels & Resorts, Abbott Laboratories, Novotel, Mercure Hotels, and Excel Hotels and Resorts.

Explore our curated selection of Italy's finest wedding DJ & sax ensembles ➡️

Italian Sax & DJ is a perennial presence at the most coveted wedding venues, regularly enchanting celebrations at Fattoria San Donato in San Gimignano, Villa Toscana in Livorno, and Borgo di Tragliata in Rome — each a testament to his refined craft.

Request a bespoke consultation with Italian Sax & DJ 💬

For those seeking an unforgettable fusion of live saxophone and dynamic DJ performance, Italian Sax & DJ represents the pinnacle of sophistication. Based in Rome, his years of masterful experience have captivated discerning audiences worldwide, delivering an elegant, high-energy spectacle that is simply beyond compare.

View our handpicked list of exclusive DJ & sax artists in Rome

To secure one of Rome's most sought-after sax & DJ collaborations, we invite you to make a refined enquiry with Italian Sax & DJ today.

Follow the artist on Facebook

la-dolce-vita-bologna-italy.intro_html:
La Dolce Vita – an exquisite, bespoke wedding and celebration ensemble, impeccably based in Bologna, Italy.

Our ensemble is composed of some of Italy’s most distinguished vocalists. We also specialise in refined DJ Live performances, curated from our world‑class selection of DJs.

View the complete range of wedding bands in Italy

They have graced prestigious live television broadcasts and released recordings with esteemed record labels. Our musicians have performed at the legendary Festival di Sanremo and have toured alongside the incomparable Andrea Bocelli.

We are honoured to be featured on FixTheMusic’s 28 Best Wedding Bands in Italy 🏆

We are regularly engaged for weddings and events at the most exclusive venues, including Villa Miani in Rome, La Foce in Siena, Villa Aurelia in Rome, and Aquadulci Hotel in Domus De Maria, Sardinia.

Contact La Dolce Vita 💬

Every member has graduated from the finest music academies in Italy and abroad (including the USA and UK). Even our DJs hold honours‑level degrees and masters in music or music production.

Together, we have performed across the globe—UAE, Germany, France, Spain, Greece, and beyond—for discerning brands such as BMW, Ferrari, Dior, Campari, Cartier, Google, Bologna Soccer Team, and many others.

Our purpose transcends that of a mere band: we design a bespoke project, curating energy and crafting a custom experience that elevates your event into a masterpiece.

View our list of Italy's best wedding bands ➡️

We become the impeccable soundtrack of your celebration—every song precisely timed, every request honoured until the final note fades. Our repertoire spans classical (with a magnificent string section) to RnB, Soul, Jazz, Pop, Rock, Funk, Italian, and beyond.

Follow us on Facebook

Curated Line‑up Options

  • 5‑piece ensemble (singer, saxophonist, percussionist, guitarist, DJ, sound technician).
  • 6‑piece ensemble (2 singers, saxophonist, percussionist, guitarist, DJ, sound technician).
  • 7‑piece ensemble (3 singers, saxophonist, percussionist, guitarist, DJ, sound technician).
  • 8‑piece ensemble (3 singers, saxophonist, percussionist, brass, guitarist, DJ, sound technician).
  • 9‑piece ensemble (3 singers, saxophonist, percussionist, 2 brass, guitarist, DJ, sound technician).
  • 10‑piece ensemble (4 singers, saxophonist, percussionist, 2 brass, guitarist, DJ, sound technician).

…further bespoke configurations available upon request…

Additional Refined Enhancements

  • 4‑piece string ensemble.
  • 6‑piece string ensemble.
  • 8‑piece string ensemble.
  • Professional dancers.

capital-folk-rome-italy.intro_html:
Capital Folk – An Exquisite Italian Roaming Ensemble, Based in Rome

What discerning clients cherish most: high-energy, captivating performances that inspire every guest to dance, delivered with impeccable professionalism and a versatility that couples frequently describe as the crowning jewel of their celebration.

Capital Folk embodies the essence of the authentic roaming band, bringing the soul of Italian music to your wedding or exclusive event with refined artistry.

Explore the complete collection of wedding bands in Italy

Whether your vision calls for a romantic pre-wedding aperitif amidst a Tuscan vineyard, a sun-drenched ceremony along the Amalfi Coast, or an intimate soirée in a Roman courtyard, we curate the perfect musical atmosphere for every exquisite moment.

Discover more of the finest wedding bands in Rome

Led by the distinguished Stefano, a professional Italian accordionist, our ensemble performs as a soloist, duo, trio, or quartet—effortlessly adapting to the unique character of your venue, the preferences of your guests, and the spirit of your occasion.

This Italian folk band is regularly engaged for pizza parties, pre-wedding celebrations, weddings, and exclusive events at Casale del Gallo and Il Duca in Trastevere, Rome.

Inquire with Capital Folk 💬

From timeless Italian classics and romantic ballads to jazz, French chanson, and international hits, our repertoire is as versatile as it is refined.

View the curated selection of the most sought-after wedding bands in Italy

Why choose us? A bespoke lineup—from an intimate solo performance to a majestic full quartet.

  • An authentic Italian atmosphere, meticulously designed for an international clientele.
  • Ideal for pre-wedding events, cocktail receptions, and ceremonies of every style.
  • Available throughout Italy and for exclusive events abroad.
  • A fully customisable ensemble—simply share your vision.

We transform your Italian celebration into an indelible memory, one your guests will treasure for a lifetime.

wedding-violinist-italy-laura.intro_html:
Laura Violin — An Exquisite Virtuoso for Your Most Refined Celebration

Hailing from the eternal city of Rome, Laura is an impeccably sought-after talent, gracing the most exclusive weddings, galas, corporate sojourns, and intimate proposals across Italy. Her bespoke repertoire—a curated journey through classical masterpieces, refined pop covers, evocative jazz, and cinematic scores—is elegantly tailored to your distinctive vision. Explore her meticulously curated 2025 repertoire. For those who seek nothing less than the finest musical accompaniment Italy has to offer, an introduction to Laura Violin is an indispensable step towards perfection. She is a perennial favourite at Italy's most distinguished estates, including Tenuta di Casa Bruciata in Perugia and Villa Spadaforte in Arezzo, where her artistry elevates every occasion.
wedding-violinist-italy-laura.description_html:
A graduate of the Conservatoire (2012), Laura's refined artistry traverses a spectrum of musical universes—from illustrious classical orchestras to intimate collaborations with songwriters and avant-garde rock ensembles. With over a decade of impeccable professional experience, she dedicates her craft exclusively to live performance, bringing a wealth of nuanced expression to every event. For weddings and private soirées, she typically performs as a solo virtuoso, offering the choice of a timeless classic violin or a striking electric violin for a contemporary accent. Her career is distinguished by engagements of the highest calibre:

  • A celebrated performance on the esteemed television production Cavalli di Battaglia alongside the legendary Gigi Proietti.
  • An unforgettable performance at Rome's Olympic Stadium for the UEFA Champions League, collaborating with the prestigious Rome Philharmonic.
  • An exclusive tour of China with the renowned Orchestra Filarmonica Campana.

To craft a seamless, immersive experience, Laura frequently collaborates with acclaimed photographer Emilia, offering a curated artistic partnership for weddings and proposals. Discover more of her world on Facebook and Instagram.

wedding-band-rome-rising-stars.intro_html:
The Rising Stars – An Exquisite Wedding & Party Band, Based in Rome

Emerging from the luminous heart of Rome, The Rising Stars represent the pinnacle of refined musical artistry for weddings and celebrations of the highest order. This exceptional ensemble is renowned for curating bespoke auditory experiences, each note impeccably tailored to the unique character of every event they grace.

True connoisseurs of enchantment, they are the definitive choice for those who seek a band that imparts an indelible, sophisticated impression. Their ability to imbue each gathering with an ambience of profound elegance is unmatched, positioning them as luminaries in the world of live entertainment.

Discover our curated selection of Italy's most distinguished wedding bands ➡️

The hallmark of The Rising Stars is their bespoke versatility, offering a line-up that effortlessly evolves from an intimate duo to a dynamic full ensemble, perfectly attuned to the particular spirit of the occasion.

We are honored to be featured on FixTheMusic's 24 Best Wedding Bands in Italy 🏆.

We are regularly engaged to perform at the most prestigious venues, including Villa Aurelia, Villa Piccolomini, and Casale del Gallo in Rome, Italy.

Contact The Rising Stars

With a legacy spanning over fifteen illustrious years, The Rising Stars have adorned stages across the nation and beyond, delivering impeccable performances at weddings that radiate love, private affairs brimming with joy, and corporate galas that demand the utmost sophistication.

View our list of Italy's best wedding bands ➡️

Distinguished by a remarkably diverse and extensive repertoire, The Rising Stars traverse eras and genres with effortless grace, ensuring they possess the perfect melodic narrative for every moment and every guest. Their music becomes the living soundtrack to life’s most cherished occasions, resonating with the nostalgia of the past and the vibrancy of the present.

In essence, The Rising Stars are not merely a band; they are the curators of emotion, the architects of memory, and the catalysts of celebration. To engage them is to commission an unforgettable symphony of moments destined to be woven into the tapestry of time. Choosing The Rising Stars is not simply a booking—it is the securing of an exquisite journey through the power of music.

Their magnificent line-up options include:

  • Intimate Duo: An impeccably curated pairing of a voice (male or female) with a refined instrument—guitar or piano—ideal for the ceremony, whether civil or religious, or to enchant guests during an aperitif with a delicate and elegant repertoire of Italian and international classics.
  • Exquisite Strings Duo: Composed of violin and cello, this formation is perfectly suited for the ceremony and especially for a sophisticated aperitif, offering a repertoire that spans both classic and contemporary works.
  • Sophisticated All-Female Ensemble: Featuring voice, piano, drums, and bass, this configuration entertains the entire wedding reception with a wealth of Italian and international songs interpreted through a jazz lens, alongside the great dance music classics from the seventies to today.
  • Refined All-Male Quartet: Comprising four musicians (voice, bass, guitar, and drums), this ensemble accompanies guests from the aperitif to the final dance, brightening the atmosphere with a vast repertoire ranging from rockabilly (Jerry Lee Lewis, Elvis Presley, etc.) through the dance hits of the '70s and '80s (Gloria Gaynor, The Trammps, Barry White, etc.), contemporary anthems (Bruno Mars, Coldplay, Muse, etc.), and the great classics of Italian and international music (Fabi, Tenco, Silvestri, Gino Paoli, Nat King Cole, Michael Bublé, etc.).
  • The Grand Big Band: From two to five voices, with a rhythm section and wind section, delivering a repertoire that commences with timeless Italian and international evergreens and culminates in the most exhilarating dance revival and current hits.
  • Curated DJ Service: Ideally reserved for the final phase of the reception dedicated to dancing, this service creates a truly captivating disco atmosphere. It includes a professional lighting system and a DJ-set ranging from lounge music—perfect for soft moments such as an aperitif or dinner—to genres including dance, revival, rock & roll, rock revival, Latin American, group, and commercial dance.

For those who seek to secure one of Rome’s most exquisite wedding and party bands, look no further than The Rising Stars. We invite you to initiate an inquiry and reserve an evening of unparalleled musical distinction.

Their formation is fluid and adaptable, allowing the instrumentation—guitar, bass, drums, keyboards, and saxophone—to be tailored to your event, complemented by both female and male vocalists of exceptional calibre. With a meticulously curated repertoire spanning cherished classics and contemporary hits, Cosmic promises to provide the ideal soundtrack for your most celebrated day.

Regularly engaged for weddings and events at the most exclusive venues across Italy, including Villa Eva in Ravello, Villa La Foce in Tuscany, and Villa Pliniana on Lake Como, Cosmic has established itself as a premier choice for discerning clientele.

lazio-party-band-italy.intro_html:
The Lazio Party Band – An Exquisite Roman Ensemble for Your Most Refined Celebrations

We are the music wedding band in Italy that will impart the sublime sensation of an authentic Italian wedding.

Our ensemble has been impeccably selected for inclusion on FixTheMusic's 28 Best Wedding Bands in Italy 🏆.

Our melodies provide the perfect soundtrack for a day of exquisite food and fine wine — whether set against the rolling hills of Tuscany, the coastal elegance of Sorrento, or the timeless allure of Rome, Venice, or Florence.

Discover our curated selection of Italy's finest wedding bands ➡️

We are regularly entrusted with performances at such prestigious venues as Belmond Grand Hotel Timeo in Sicily, Le Volpi in Padua, Casale Doria Pamphilj in Rome, and Dievole Wine Resort in Tuscany, Italy.

Enquire with The Lazio Party Band 💬
lazio-party-band-italy.description_html:
We understand your desire for an unforgettable celebration. Our fluency in English removes any language barrier, and we are intimately aware of the complexities of planning a wedding abroad. We will guide you with impeccable attention, from your first inquiry to the final dance of your most cherished day.

We can orchestrate the entirety of your wedding's musical entertainment — from the ceremony's first note through to the final hours with our DJ. For further details on our refined band configurations, bespoke pricing, and available services, please explore our services and DJ offerings.

Our repertoire is meticulously curated to enchant guests of every generation, inviting them to dance and sing with abandon. While many bands in Italy merely perform, they rarely engage — often because of language barriers or a lack of familiarity with your traditions. The Lazio Party Band, by contrast, crafts an immersive experience that draws your guests into the heart of your celebration. Should you wish to grace the stage and sing a song, you are most welcome.

Though based in Rome, over the past decade we have traversed the length of Italy and performed across Europe, bringing our signature elegance to every event.

Explore FixTheMusic's list of the most distinguished wedding bands in Rome.

We are fully equipped with a premium PA system and lighting, providing impeccable power for gatherings of 100 to 120 guests. For larger events, we arrange a tailored service on location.

These are but a few of the distinguished venues where clients on FixTheMusic have reserved our services for weddings and events…

  • Belmond Grand Hotel Timeo, Sicily
  • Le Volpi, Padua, Italy
  • Masseria San Nicola, Fasano
  • Casale Doria Pamphilj, Rome
  • Rome Cavalieri Waldorf Astoria
  • Antico Convento I Cappuccini
  • Dievole Wine Resort, Siena
  • Villa Anson Silj, Rome
  • Il Grande Prato, Castelfiorentino
  • Montefiore dell'Aso, Ascoli Piceno

If you seek to engage the finest wedding band Rome (Italy) can offer, we invite you to connect with The Lazio Party Band.

Follow us on Facebook

THE BAND

Our standard ensemble comprises six refined elements: voice, trumpet, saxophone, guitar, bass, and drums. For more intimate weddings, we can perform with as few as three, four, or five musicians — each configuration impeccably curated.

Beyond the main band, we can supply any bespoke musical accompaniment: a solo singer-guitarist, a soprano for the church ceremony, a tenor, a string trio, a harpist — anything your vision requires. Please contact us for further details.

DJ SERVICE

Our DJ commands an extensive library of music to cater to every taste, playing any genre on request. He may be booked independently or alongside the band.

DRINK RECEPTION MUSIC

Our musicians will enchant your guests during the welcome drinks with sophisticated lounge melodies or authentic traditional Italian selections — a prelude of pure elegance.

EQUIPMENT RENTAL

No band and no DJ? Prefer to manage the music yourself? No matter — we can rent you all the equipment required: speakers, mixer, microphones, lighting, and more. Please inquire for a bespoke quote.

They are regularly engaged for ceremonies and celebrations at exclusive estates including Tenuta TRESCA in Botrugno, Villa Eva in Ravello, and Villa Aura del Lago on Lake Como.

Proudly featured on FixTheMusic’s 28 Best Wedding Bands in Italy 🏆.

Lead vocalist Alex also curates and performs with the Puglia-based wedding band Cosmos, offering the option of both male and female lead vocals for an even more refined experience.

Follow Stardust on YouTube, Facebook, and Instagram 📸

Explore their world at stardustbanditaly.com.

The ensemble’s extraordinary journey began in 2007, born from a group of kindred spirits who recognised an immediate and profound connection.

View our curated selection of Puglia’s premier wedding bands ➡️

Inspired by Alex’s return from the vibrant streets of London, the current line‑up began its movement into the Apulian hinterland from 2007 onward, weaving together the exquisite sounds of live soul, pop, and rock.

Enquire About Stardust 💬
wedding-band-puglia-italy-stardust.description_html:
For those who seek the most refined wedding band that Bari has to offer, an introduction to Stardust is an essential part of your journey.

The ensemble is available throughout Puglia—including Alberobello, Lecce, Gallipoli, Locorotondo, Martina Franca, Fasano, Manduria, Brindisi—and also extends to Sicily, Naples, and the Amalfi Coast.

Stardust frequently graces some of the region’s most exclusive venues, among them Castello Monaci and Borgo Egnazia.

The quartet comprises Alex, Nico, Saverio, and Bufi—each an accomplished artist in their own right.

In Italiano

Stardust è una band degna di note e di storia. Una storia che nasce nel 2007 da un'energia che s'incontrò e si amò fin dal primo momento.

Da un'idea di Alex Spadavecchia, di ritorno dalle streets del sound londinese, l'attuale formazione inizia a muovere i passi nell'entroterra pugliese dal 2007, coinvolgendo fino ad oggi anime e corpi di folle on the road con esperimenti live soul/pop/rock.

L'incontro è stato disegnato da un istinto andato a buon fine: Alex, Nico, Saverio, Bufi. Just a friend è il titolo del primo singolo con il quale si apre il sipario del palcoscenico del tempio di una band in continua evoluzione. In attesa del primo album dedicato ad ognuno di noi.

Tempo, cambiamento, amore andato, amore ricercato, amicizia.

È qui il mondo, in un cd dove la vita si incastra e si libera, tra le righe di un gruppo che invoca la scelta di dare valore a quello che conta: un sorriso che abbonda e si schiude adesso, un sentimento che rischia di unire elementi diversi per farli diventare perfetti, armonici, matematicamente perfetti, tra passato e presente, a sud, lontano da qualcuno, da un qualcosa che siamo noi tutti.

Infondo la vita cos'è se non una sommatoria di ricordi e di speranze divise su milioni di persone?

wedding-band-puglia-italy-stardust.faq_html:
<details><summary>What does the wedding package include?</summary>Stardust, a name, a guarantee of success. Live band (keyboards, electric guitar, drums, vocals) and DJ service. Available for the duration of the party.



</details><details><summary>How far in advance do I need to get in touch with you?</summary>Contact us as soon as possible to check our availability and ask for a personalised quote!



</details><details><summary>Size of group?</summary>Medium (4-6 musicians).



</details><details><summary>Repertoire?</summary>Rock, Pop, Italian and English/American dance music from the 70s to today.



</details><details><summary>Can I ask for songs not included in the repertoire?</summary>No problem.



</details><details><summary>Experience?</summary>Decades of experience in the sector, a guarantee of success for your party!



</details><details><summary>Do you have your own equipment?</summary>Yes.



</details><details><summary>Are you able to travel?</summary>Yes, throughout Italy.



</details><details><summary>Is there a surcharge for travel?</summary>Yes, but we will provide a quote that includes travel costs, or clearly specify them.



</details><details><summary>How long does the performance last?</summary>We are available for the whole party at your request.



</details><details><summary>How long do you need to prepare for the performance?</summary>At least two hours.



</details><details><summary>Do you do outdoor performances?</summary>Yes.



</details><details><summary>What other types of service do you offer?</summary>Acoustic music at drinks receptions.



</details><details><summary>Cosa include il pack matrimonio?</summary>Stardust, un nome, una garanzia di successo. Live band (tastiere, chitarra elettrica, batteria, voce) e servizio dj. A disposizione per tutta la durata della festa.



</details><details><summary>Con quanto anticipo mi devo mettere in contatto con te?</summary>Contattateci appena possibile per verificare la nostra disponibilità e chiedere un preventivo personalizzato!



</details><details><summary>Grandezza della formazione?</summary>Media (4-6 musicisti).



</details><details><summary>Repertorio?</summary>Musica Rock, Pop, Dance Italiana e straniera dagli anni '70 ad oggi.



</details><details><summary>Posso chiedere dei brani non inseriti nel repertorio?</summary>Nessun problema.



</details><details><summary>Esperienza?</summary>Esperienza decennale nel settore, garanzia di successo per la vostra festa!



</details><details><summary>Disponi di strumentazione propria?</summary>Sì.



</details><details><summary>Hai la possibilità di effettuare delle trasferte?</summary>Sì, tutta Italia.



</details><details><summary>Esiste un sovrapprezzo in caso di trasferta?</summary>Sì, da definire.



</details><details><summary>Quanto tempo dura l'esibizione?</summary>Restiamo a disposizione per tutta la festa.



</details><details><summary>Di quanto tempo hai bisogno per preparare l'esibizione?</summary>Almeno due ore.



</details><details><summary>Realizzi esibizioni all'aperto?</summary>Sì.



</details><details><summary>Che altri tipi di servizio offri?</summary>Musica agli aperitivi con set in acustico, dopofesta.</details>

acoustic-duo-rome-italy-andiamo.intro_html:
Introducing Andiamo Duo – An Exquisite Acoustic Ensemble Based in Rome, Italy

✧ What discerning clients cherish most about Andiamo Duo: an impeccable party atmosphere, a curated repertoire of remarkable variety, masterful crowd intuition, a warm and refined presence, captivating live performances, seamless flexibility and reliability, and effortless collaboration.

Andiamo Duo is a distinguished pop covers duo, exuding youthful charisma, performing at weddings and exclusive events throughout Italy.

We are proudly featured among the finest wedding bands in Rome.

With a vast repertoire spanning soul, funk, contemporary chart-toppers, and beloved Italian melodies, we possess the artistry to effortlessly enchant your guests onto the dance floor.

Explore our curated selection of premier wedding bands in Rome.

Clients who have engaged Andiamo Duo have also expressed interest in these similarly refined ensembles on FixTheMusic:

  1. The Prodigal Duo
  2. Trio Toscano
  3. Forever Young Duo
  4. Bellissimo Duo
  5. The Florence Acoustic Duo

If you seek to engage the most refined acoustic duo Rome (Italy) has to offer for your wedding or distinguished event, we invite you to contact Andiamo Duo.

We are regularly commissioned to perform at prestigious venues such as Agriturismo Borgo Divino in Montespertoli and Borgo Corsignano in Arezzo, Italy.

Inquire with Andiamo Duo 💬
acoustic-duo-rome-italy-andiamo.description_html:
Andiamo Duo’s project was conceived in the late summer of 2011 from the inspired vision of Luca (Voice, Ukulele, Percussion, and Guitar) alongside Davide (Voice and Guitars).

Discover our curated list of Italy's most distinguished wedding bands ➡️

From the very first notes shared, the duo’s exceptional artistic potential was unmistakable—a profound musical rapport across genres and languages, a vocal fusion both rare and exquisite, two distinct yet perfectly complementary talents destined to be united.

This enchantment swiftly captivated audiences both intimate and grand.

Their voices evoke the finest of Simon & Garfunkel, yet with substantial stylistic nuances—pop, soul, with folk undertones—and sophisticated acoustic textures that draw upon world influences (ukulele, udu drum, and more), supported by subtle electronic accents when the moment demands.

Over time, they expanded their presence across live clubs and theatres, averaging 200 performances per year.

They have graced renowned festivals such as Ferentino Acustica and the Gavazzana Blues Festival; they have also collaborated with luminary figures of the Italian scene, including Amedeo Minghi in the reimagining of "Per Noi".

With an English pronunciation approaching native fluency and a deep passion for those sounds, they have successfully exported their artistry abroad—primarily to Germany and England, where they have achieved sold-out tours.

In March 2018, they were guests of the Italian embassy in Peru for a concert celebrating the roots of Italian music.

In summer 2018, they participated in the twelfth edition of the talent show XFactor, advancing to the Bootcamp stage.

Here are just a selection of the exquisite venues where we have been engaged by clients on FixTheMusic for bespoke weddings and events…

  • Agriturismo Borgo Divino
  • Villa Valentini Bonaparte
  • Borgo Corsignano, Poppi
  • Villa del Mandorlo, Puglia
  • Casale Doria Pamphilj

  • Florence, Italy
  • Asti, Italy

  • Lugnano In Teverina, Italia

The Nuptial Ceremony

An intimate post with a mixer and one or two loudspeakers positioned adjacent to the ceremonial area.

We typically perform a bespoke musical selection for the bride’s entrance and another as the couple departs. These pieces are, of course, chosen in consultation with the couple.

A power source within a maximum distance of ten metres from the post is required; all other equipment is provided.

The Grand Reception

The standard performance entails the assembly of a single, meticulously arranged post within the hors-d’oeuvre and dessert area.

These two moments generally take place in the same location and require two loudspeakers, one mixer, two guitars, one ukulele, and percussion instruments.

A loudspeaker is placed in the dining hall, from which a curated playlist is diffused throughout the meal.

Typically, as the aperitif buffet commences, live music begins with a selection of serene pieces accompanying the cocktail hour for approximately one hour and thirty minutes, divided into sets of about forty-five minutes.

When guests progress to the dining hall, the playlist takes over. At the cutting of the wedding cake and dessert service, live music resumes with more spirited and celebratory pieces for up to one hour and thirty minutes, in sets of approximately forty-five minutes.

A power source within a maximum distance of ten metres from the hors-d’oeuvre and dessert post is required; all other equipment is included.

Andiamo Duo employs highly professional instruments of exquisite craftsmanship. We kindly request that you confirm with the venue the availability of appropriate protection (e.g., umbrella, gazebo, or similar) to shield the equipment from direct sun exposure.

Follow us on Facebook

In Italiano

Gli Andiamo Duo nascono nella tarda estate del 2011 da un idea di Luca (Voce, Ukulele, Percussioni e Chitarra) che incontrandosi con Davide (Voce e Chitarre) danno vita a questo progetto.

Fin dalle prime note condivise dal duo si intuiva un enorme potenziale artistico, una grande intesa musicale di genere e linguaggio, un connubio vocale più unico che raro, due talenti molto diversi ma totalmente compatibili, quasi fatti apposta per essere fusi insieme.

Molto velocemente infatti questa magia ha iniziato ad incuriosire piccole e grandi platee, addetti ai lavori o semplicissimi appassionati del genere.

Le due voci ricordano i migliori Simon&Garfunkel con sostanziali differenze però di genere (Pop/Soul con un qualcosa di Folk) e di sonorità acustiche ricercate che attingono anche al panorama World (Ukulele, Udu Drum ecc...) ma che all’occorrenza vengono supportate da sfumature elettroniche.

A pochi mesi dalla loro formazione, stipulano

wedding-band-lyon-france-hyperfunk.intro_html:
Hyperfunk — An Exquisite Bespoke Wedding Ensemble, Lyon

Hyperfunk represents the pinnacle of refined entertainment for the most discerning couples. This impeccably curated collective of virtuoso musicians specializes in reimagining the finest pop, soul, and funk repertoire, transforming your celebration into an elegant, unforgettable masterpiece.

Based in Lyon, Hyperfunk is meticulously commissioned for prestigious weddings and private soirees along the French Riviera, across the Italian countryside, and throughout Europe's most exclusive destinations.

Explore our curated selection of France’s most distinguished wedding bands.

An impeccably woven repertoire gracefully transitions from a languid, soul-infused cocktail hour to an electrifying, high-energy dance floor experience. Every note is delivered with uncompromising authenticity—pure, live musicianship, utterly devoid of playback.

We are honored to be featured on FixTheMusic’s prestigious list of the 24 Best Wedding Bands in France 🏆.

Discerning clients seeking the ultimate in musical sophistication for their wedding in Lyon, the South of France, or across Europe are invited to inquire.

Contact Hyperfunk 💬
wedding-band-lyon-france-hyperfunk.description_html:
Conceived as a luxury atelier for the wedding and event industry, Hyperfunk was founded to deliver performances of the highest order. Our collective comprises virtuoso musicians, each a master of their craft, celebrated on the French and international stage for over a decade.

With more than 80 meticulously executed, bespoke performances annually across France and abroad, Hyperfunk brings an intense, rich musical landscape to your occasion. For an intimate aperitif or a grand reception, the ensemble reinterprets timeless jazz standards, vintage soul anthems, and exuberant funk classics with impeccable taste and a touch of refined humor.

Our artistic influences are drawn from the pantheon of musical royalty: the soulful depths of Marvin Gaye and Aretha Franklin, the modern edge of Amy Winehouse and Bruno Mars, the legendary showmanship of James Brown and Michael Jackson, and the grooves of Earth Wind & Fire and Jamiroquai. This creates an eclectic, resolutely modern, yet timelessly elegant sonic palette.

Hyperfunk offers a supremely adaptable configuration, from an intimate trio to a magnificent eleven-piece ensemble with full sound and lighting, allowing the artistic direction to perfectly suit the scale and ambiance of your vision.

We are regularly commissioned by our distinguished clientele at the world's most exclusive venues, including:

En français

Hyperfunk est né d'une vision exigeante : proposer des concerts d'une qualité rare dans l'univers exclusif du mariage et de l'événementiel de luxe.

Notre ensemble, composé d'artistes d'exception, est dédié à insuffler à vos réceptions un caractère inoubliable, d'un raffinement sans faille. La qualité de notre musique et de nos musiciens est notre signature.

Hyperfunk réunit de jeunes musiciens professionnels parmi les plus brillants de France, animés par une passion débordante. Sur scène, leur générosité est palpable : un plaisir sincère à jouer ensemble, un échange naturel et élégant avec le public.

Avec Hyperfunk, il n'est question que de LIVE, d'une authenticité absolue. Pour une ambiance feutrée ou une énergie survoltée, chaque prestation est une expérience sensorielle unique.

Forts d'une décennie d'expérience sur les scènes françaises et internationales, les musiciens d'Hyperfunk vous invitent à vivre un événement riche en couleurs et en émotions, porté par une ossature Soul, Jazz et Funk d'exception.

Fort de plus de 80 événements haut de gamme et sur mesure chaque année, Hyperfunk offre une prestation intense et parfaitement maîtrisée. Durant votre cocktail ou votre réception, le groupe réinvente avec goût les plus grands standards du jazz, les morceaux anthologiques de la soul vintage et le meilleur de la funk.

Inspirés par Marvin Gaye, Aretha Franklin, James Brown, Amy Winehouse, Earth Wind & Fire, Jamiroquai, Bruno Mars ou Michael Jackson, notre musique est éclectique, résolument moderne, et toujours empreinte d'élégance.

Du trio intimiste au grand orchestre avec son et lumières, choisissez la formule qui incarnera parfaitement votre vision.

Ensembles d'Exception Similaires

</details><details><summary>Taille du groupe ?</summary>Petit (2-3 musiciens), moyen (4-6 musiciens), grand (plus de 6 musiciens).

About The Impresarios – An exquisite five‑piece acoustic roaming covers ensemble, based in the refined enclaves of Nice, France, and Geneva, Switzerland

The Impresarios present a roaming musical experience that transcends the traditional stage. This impeccably curated quintet moves freely among guests, weaving spontaneous interactions into every performance with an air of effortless elegance.

From the golden era’s most cherished swing classics to contemporary chart‑toppers, the band artfully crafts a bespoke setlist for each occasion—gracefully accommodating every request from the discerning audience.

Follow this extraordinary alliance on Facebook and Instagram 📸

A distinguished collective of seasoned international performers, based in both Geneva and Nice, the ensemble converses fluently in English, French, Spanish, Italian, and Portuguese—ensuring a seamless connection with a cosmopolitan clientele.

We are honoured to be listed on FixTheMusic’s 23 Best Wedding Bands in France 🏆

With performances spanning 43 countries, the musicians have graced the world’s most prestigious events for heads of state, royalty, and luminaries—an unparalleled pedigree of refinement.

We are regularly commissioned for weddings and exclusive celebrations at the Grandhotel Giessbach in Switzerland, Villa Tolomei Hotel & Resort in Italy, and Château de Vaugrigneuse in France.

Contact The Impresarios
acoustic-covers-band-nice-geneva-impresa.description_html:

Explore all of our France‑based roaming bands ➡️

acoustic-covers-band-nice-geneva-impresa.faq_html:
<details><summary>How long is an Impresarios’ performance?</summary>A show normally consists of 2 or 3 sets, each 30 - 35 minutes in length, like a series of miniconcerts
where the musicians move around and interact with the guests as they serenade, are
playful, flirtatious, high energy and above all, incredibly entertaining!



</details><details><summary>When’s the best time for you to start performing?</summary>The best scenario is when guests are seated and halfway through the starter or main course. We
will make a stronger impact and bring more joy if we have the element of surprise on our side!
Alternatively the first can be a cocktail set, which can set the mood with classic swing and great
easy listening music and as always with Impresarios' unique brand of immersive entertainment.



</details><details><summary>What kind of stage do you need?</summary>We are totally mobile and love to interact with our audience, so we don’t require a fixed stage.



</details><details><summary>How far do you travel?</summary>Our musicians have played at events on every continent apart from Antarctica. In fact, we are
always sure to have our passports with us ready for any emergency musical situations!



</details><details><summary>How much room do you need to perform?</summary>If there's room for a waiter, there's room for us!



</details><details><summary>Are The Impresarios very loud?</summary>Enough to make a party but we don’t follow loud amplified music. Background music before we
perform is no problem, however it must be turned right down five to ten mins before we start.
People's ears become accustomed to a certain volume, so turning off the music when we start
doesn't work and the impact of our performance is lessened. It's not easy to follow The Impresarios
so any DJ or amplified band that follows will at least have volume on their side!



</details><details><summary>We have a big event, how many people is too many for an Impresarios performance?</summary>For events with over 200 guests it's usually better for us to use wireless headset microphones
(tech rider supplied upon request). However, even when using microphones, we still keep the
intimacy of playing to tables whilst allowing other guests to talk, at least at the beginning
anyway! This way we can add more volume later in the evening when the party gets wild!



</details><details><summary>What about sound checks?</summary>Only if we're being mic'd up. See above.



</details><details><summary>Do you have a setlist?</summary>No two audiences are the same, so no two shows can be the same and we can't stick to any set
list. We love to know if you have a favourite musical genre, and if we can make it work, we'll
always learn a special song. During our show we move table to table and we need to have the
freedom to choose whichever song we think will work at that moment or to be able to take
requests from guests on the night. So you will just have to trust us!



</details><details><summary>Do you guys need food and drink?</summary>We do a lot of travelling and put a lot of energy into every performance so we have to stay as
healthy as possible. A good hot healthy meal will always ensure that we're on top form for you.
A chef will often wish to serve the guests first and the musicians after. This is totally
understandable and correct however as we usually start performing while the guests are eating,
that’s impractical. We prefer to be able to eat before, and we find that as long as this is
explained in advance, chefs are usually fine with it.



</details><details><summary>Do you bring all your instruments, even when you fly to an event?</summary>We bring everything we need apart from the contrabass if we have to fly. So we just ask for a
double bass to be supplied, this just makes everyone's lives easier. Airlines can get very confused
and alarmed if we turn up with such a big instrument!



</details><details><summary>Is there anything else we need to know before we book you?</summary>The Impresarios are very versatile and have dealt with a lot of unusual requests. Always feel free to
discuss with us any ideas, or special requirements you may have and we'll do our best to deliver
a bespoke package which will really work for you.</details>

dj-rome-leo.intro_html:
About DJ Leo – An Exquisite Wedding DJ Based in Rome, Italy

DJ Leo is an exceptionally refined performer, hailing from the Italian capital. He speaks fluent Italian, English, French, Spanish, and Croatian—making him the impeccable choice for destination weddings and bespoke celebrations of every nature.

His profound passion for music and travel has cultivated a perfectly curated career, one dedicated to sharing joy and happiness with the most discerning clientele.

DJ Leo drifts seamlessly through eras and genres, delivering a performance that is both sophisticated and inclusive, resonating across generations and cultures.

I am proud to be featured on FixTheMusic’s 18 Best Wedding DJs in Italy 🏆

A distinguished alumnus of the Goody Music School in Rome, Leo has, in just a few years, ascended to become one of the most sought-after DJs on the Italian and international scenes.

I am regularly engaged to perform at exquisite weddings and events at Borgo Castelvecchi in Tuscany, Borgo del Carato in Sicily, and Castello di Pontentino in Seggiano, Italy.

Contact DJ Leo
dj-rome-leo.description_html:
DJ Leo is a master of blending eras and genres with impeccable finesse. His eclectic repertoire spans house, commercial dance, revival, deep house, and lounge—ensuring a refined musical journey that delights every guest.

View our list of Italy’s finest wedding DJs ➡️

Leo has graced the most prestigious venues and clubs worldwide: Villa Miani (Rome), Odescalchi Castle (Bracciano), Villa Aurelia (Rome), Palazzo Colonna (Rome), Terrazza Cafarelli (Rome), Maxxi Museum (Rome), Villa di Fiorano (Rome), Villa del Balbianello (Lake Como), Villa Piccolomini (Rome), Aman Sveti Stefan (Montenegro), Revelin (Croatia), Sky Garden (Bali), Enigma (Santorini), and Empire Club (Marrakech).

His exclusive clientele includes Giacomo Gianniotti, Tiziana Rocca, Danilo Cataldi, Matteo Politano, and Giulia de Lellis.

Bespoke Performance Options

Choose from the following meticulously curated performance options. Each is designed to cover every moment of your celebration—from setting an elegant ambiance during dinner to elevating the energy of the after-party:

  • DJ Set – Up to 3 Hours
    Ideal for creating a vibrant atmosphere, impeccably tailored to the rhythm of your event.

  • Two Performers: DJ + Percussion or DJ + Sax – Up to 2 Hours
    A dynamic fusion that introduces a live instrumental layer, offering a more immersive and sensual musical experience.

  • Three Performers: DJ + Sax + Singer – Up to 2 Hours
    A high-energy trio blending rhythm, melody, and vocals for a truly standout, unforgettable performance.

Each option is fully customizable to reflect the unique style and refined tone of your celebration.

If you seek to engage one of Rome’s most exquisite DJs for your wedding, look no further than DJ Leo. Get in touch today.

wedding-party-band-rome-big-waves.intro_html:
The Big Waves – An Exquisite Wedding & Party Ensemble Based in Rome, Italy

The Big Waves deliver an impeccable fusion of sound and energy, a bespoke musical experience crafted to elevate any occasion to the extraordinary.

Rooted in Rome, we are honoured to travel throughout Italy, curating unforgettable performances for weddings, private soirées, corporate galas, and distinguished public events.

Our refined artistry has made us a coveted choice for iconic venues such as Villa Aurelia in Rome and Villa Cimbrone in Ravello.

Our Unique Offering – with an eclectic repertoire spanning genres, styles, and eras, The Big Waves present a fresh, sophisticated take on live music. Whether you desire timeless classics or contemporary treasures, we ensure every guest is captivated, creating a truly memorable atmosphere.

Contact The Big Waves 💬

Beyond our dynamic live performances, we offer a complete entertainment package that includes:

  • Ceremony Music
    Setting the perfect, refined tone for your most cherished moments.

Our Ceremony Package provides an exquisite musical backdrop for your special day. At its heart, it features a sublime combination of acoustic guitar and saxophone or flute, weaving a romantic and enchanting atmosphere for your wedding ceremony.

  • Aperitivo Entertainment
    Crafting a lively yet elegant ambiance during your cocktail hour.

Our Aperitivo Package infuses your pre-reception celebration with the polished energy of our ensemble. This curated setup creates an inviting, sophisticated atmosphere for you and your guests to mingle and savour the moment.

  • DJ Set
    Keeping the celebration alive long into the night with seamless transitions.

Our DJ Package delivers a dynamic musical journey, tailored to your preferences, ensuring the dance floor remains the heart of the evening. With a professional DJ at the helm, every genre is woven together impeccably, inviting everyone to revel.

View our list of Italy's finest wedding bands ➡️

The ensemble is efficient, professional, and supremely adaptable, dedicated to ensuring your event unfolds flawlessly, without a single hitch.

  • Expandable Band
    Elevate your event with additional musicians.

Our core group numbers seven, featuring both male and female vocals, and can expand to ten performers. This allows us to introduce trumpet, trombone, and percussion for an even richer, more layered sound. Such versatility enables us to tailor the ensemble precisely to the ambiance of your occasion, creating a truly bespoke experience.

urban-groove-collective-florence-italy.intro_html:
About Urban Groove Collective – An Exquisite Luxury Band & Bespoke Wedding Entertainment Ensemble, Based in Florence, Italy

Urban Groove Collective is helmed by Sara, an Italian singer-pianist and art director who was awarded the prestigious Italian Wedding Awards 2021 for refined musical entertainment.

View the complete curation of wedding bands in Italy

She founded her own ensemble in 2020, drawing from two decades of impeccable expertise in the entertainment industry and collaborating with the finest musicians from Tuscany.

We are honoured to be featured on FixTheMusic’s 28 Best Wedding Bands in Italy 🏆

The collective is celebrated for its sophisticated, contemporary repertoire, impeccably suited to every occasion.

They are consistently engaged to perform at weddings and private events at Tenuta Corbinaia in Florence, Italy.

Contact Urban Groove Collective 💬
urban-groove-collective-florence-italy.description_html:
Urban Groove Collective has curated exclusive performances for private events hosted by Bulgari, Panerai, Jimmy Choo, Dstrezzed, Cantine Ruffino, The Mall, I Gigli, Rinascente, Renault, and other luxury houses. Sara and her team of forty musicians and artists aspire to craft an experience bespoke to your most refined sensibilities. Their passion is to guide your guests on an emotional journey that glides effortlessly between joyful exuberance and tender sentiment, leaving indelible memories. The ensemble seeks to be artists who move your spirit and bring a smile to your soul, creating transformative moments you will forever cherish. It is their delight to accompany couples from the ceremony through to the celebration. Below are examples of the bespoke offerings they design, each tailored to the unique character of your event:

Package 1

Ceremony: An elegant string duet (violin and cello), with the option to add an exquisite vocalist
Aperitif: A digital piano in a pristine white shell accompanied by a female voice — either acoustic or with refined backing tracks. Song requests are graciously welcomed and often cherished by guests (up to 2 hours). Alternatively, a female DJ and saxophone duo sets an impeccable tone
Dinner: Subtle, sophisticated background music
Party: A curated DJ set lasting until 1 a.m.

Included Equipment (for up to 100 guests):
- Speaker for the ceremony with wireless microphone for the celebrant
- PA systems for the aperitif, dinner (including wireless microphone for speeches), and party
- Speaker for the cake-cutting moment
- Atmospheric disco lights, two mini moving heads, and a hazer
- One dedicated technician for seamless technical support

Package 2

Ceremony & Aperitif: A refined string quartet
Dinner: Discreet background music with two 15-minute performances by a female vocalist, accompanied by a digital piano in a white shell and an electric violin
Party: A roaming show band for one hour featuring a female vocalist, saxophone, LED violin, and percussion, followed by a DJ set until 1 a.m.

Included Equipment (for up to 100 guests):
- Same as above
- One technician provided

Package 3

Ceremony & Aperitif: A luxurious string quartet
Dinner: Background music with two 15-minute performances featuring both a female and male vocalist, accompanied by a digital piano in a white shell
Party: A full roaming show band for one hour including two female vocalists, a male vocalist, a Black vocalist, saxophone, LED violin, and percussion. Followed by a DJ set until 1 a.m.

Included Equipment (for up to 100 guests):
- Same as above
- Two to three technicians provided, depending on the scale of the event

All Packages Include

  • One bespoke song learned outside the standard repertoire
  • Impeccable wedding coverage from 4 p.m. to 1 a.m. (9 hours)
  • Setup completed 2 hours before the service begins
  • Full, refined coordination of all musicians by Sara, from ceremony through to DJ set
  • Travel expenses

Additional Information

  • SIAE tax (Italian Society of Authors and Publishers) is not included
  • Extended hours beyond 1 a.m. can be arranged
  • A staff meal is kindly requested for each musician
  • Overnight accommodation to be agreed upon, depending on the venue’s distance from Florence

Curated Line-Up Options

  • Singing Pianist
  • Essential Showband
  • Full Showband
  • String Quartet
  • DJ Live (with Sax, Singer, Percussion, or Violin)
  • Aperitif Lounge Band
  • Italian Folk Band

trio-toscano-italy.intro_html:
Trio Toscano — an exquisite all-male ensemble based in the heart of Tuscany, Italy, offering refined live arrangements of beloved classics for the most discerning celebrations.

What our clientele consistently praise: a performance that surpasses expectations, impeccable communication, a bespoke first dance arrangement, seamless DJ integration, a dance floor perpetually alive, and a presence perfectly suited to the romance of a Tuscan wedding.

Trio Toscano presents a curated repertoire that draws upon decades of musical heritage, weaving together soul, pop, rock, folk, and disco into an eclectic and spirited experience. From Adele’s Rolling in the Deep to The Beatles’ Come Together, every rendition is crafted with meticulous artistry.

The trio comprises three virtuoso musicians — Gian Matteo on vocals and keyboards, Marco on vocals and guitar, and Alberto on percussion — each a seasoned professional with decades of experience. Their instrumentation is both complete and refined: voice, keyboard, guitar, and percussion, all effortlessly transportable to any venue.

Recognised among the 28 Best Wedding Bands in Italy 🏆 and the 20 Best Wedding Bands in Tuscany 🏆, Trio Toscano is a signature choice for those who seek only the finest.

Their expertise extends beyond the stage: every technical detail is overseen with precision, and a bespoke DJ set can be arranged upon request. Marco additionally directs Groove Craft, a celebrated electric duo and DJ live band based in Pisa.

The band has graced some of Italy’s most illustrious venues, including Villa Montecastello in Monteriggioni, Borgo Castelvecchi in Siena, and the enchanting Borgo Stomennano, as featured on Style Me Pretty. A selection of their distinguished bookings includes:

trio-toscano-italy.faq_html:
<details><summary>Cosa include il pack matrimonio?</summary>Live Music, Dj music.



</details><details><summary>Con quanto anticipo mi devo mettere in contatto con te?</summary>Almeno una settimana in anticipo, anche se, ovviamente, prima si contatta e meglio si organizza.



</details><details><summary>Grandezza della formazione?</summary>Piccola (2-3 musicisti).



</details><details><summary>Repertorio?</summary>Stevie Wonder, Michael Jackson, Bruno Mars, Cold Play, U2, Kings of Leon, Ed Sheeran, Pink, U2, Queen ecc ecc I classici italiani...ecc ecc... Su richiesta è disponibile una scaletta dettagliata.



</details><details><summary>Posso chiedere dei brani non inseriti nel repertorio?</summary>Un massimo di 2 brani da comunicare almeno 2 mesi prima dell evento.



</details><details><summary>Esperienza?</summary>Esperienza pluridecennale in Italia ed all' estero. Ci siamo esibiti per importanti celebrità italiane e straniere dello sport e dello spettacolo e per rinomati brand internazionali.



</details><details><summary>Disponi di strumentazione propria?</summary>Sì.



</details><details><summary>Hai bisogno di materiale particolare o di specifiche condizioni per poter offrire il servizio?</summary>Sì, scrittura privata, caparra per riservare la data dell'evento



</details><details><summary>Hai la possibilità di effettuare delle trasferte?</summary>Sì, ovunque.



</details><details><summary>Esiste un sovrapprezzo in caso di trasferta?</summary>Sì, da calcolare in base alla distanza.



</details><details><summary>Lavori per più di un matrimonio al giorno?</summary>No.



</details><details><summary>Lavori da solo o con un'equipe di professionisti?</summary>Da solo.



</details><details><summary>Quanto tempo dura l'esibizione?</summary>Il nostro pacchetto standard prevede solitamente 3 performance live da 50 minuti ciascuna, ovviamente il tutto è discutibile in base alle esigenze del cliente.



</details><details><summary>Di quanto tempo hai bisogno per preparare l'esibizione?</summary>Circa 90 minuti.



</details><details><summary>Realizzi esibizioni all'aperto?</summary>Sì.</details>

italian-swing-band.intro_html:
The Italian Swing Band – an exquisitely curated ensemble of six virtuoso musicians based in the cultural heart of Rome, Italy.

Founded in 2009, this refined collective was born from a shared devotion to the golden eras of Swing and Rock 'n' Roll. The ensemble is proudly distinguished on FixTheMusic’s prestigious roster of the 17 Best Jazz Bands in Italy, a testament to their impeccable standing. They are summoned to grace hundreds of the most discerning weddings and private celebrations across Italy and Europe each year, their calendar a curated journey through the continent’s most elegant venues.

Contact The Italian Swing Band
italian-swing-band.description_html:
The artistic backbone of The Italian Swing Band is a profound appreciation for the maestros of mid-century melody—Frank Sinatra, Louis Prima, Renato Carosone, Fred Buscaglione, Elvis Presley, and Chuck Berry. Years of captivating performances within Rome’s most exclusive jazz clubs have cultivated a distinctly refined and inimitable sound, resulting in a show that is as sophisticated as it is exhilarating.

Explore the pinnacle of Italian jazz with our curated selection of Italy’s finest ensembles ➡️

The result is an exquisite tapestry woven from timeless elegance, refined sensuality, vibrant freshness, and irresistible rhythm—pure, unadulterated style and sophisticated joy. Their vast and meticulously curated repertoire is presented through bespoke arrangements for their distinguished organic ensemble: voice, guitar, double bass, alto saxophone, tenor saxophone, and drums.

To secure The Italian Swing Band for your occasion is to invest in an experience of unparalleled refinement. As a well-known sentiment echoes: "VOLER VOICE EASY." This is a collective of singularly gifted soloists, each possessing years of distinguished artistic mastery.

A mere glimpse into their exquisite repertoire includes timeless masterpieces such as Buonasera Signorina, Tu vuò fa l’americano, Nel blu dipinto di blu, Parlami d’amore Mariù, That’s Amore, Eri piccola così, Baciami Piccina, Il tuo bacio è come un rock, Hound Dog, Rock around the Clock, Johnny Be Good, In the Mood, Georgia on my mind, and Just a Gigolo—alongside a treasury of other beloved classics.

For those who seek the very pinnacle of refined entertainment for their most momentous celebration, your journey begins here.

In Italiano

The Italian Swing Band è un ensemble romano d'eccellenza, versatile e dal successo assicurato.

Il loro stile si ispira allo Swing e al Rock and Roll degli anni Cinquanta e Sessanta, un'epoca d'oro che ha visto nascere grandissimi artisti come Elvis Presley, Frank Sinatra, Fred Buscaglione, Dean Martin e Louis Prima.

Lo spettacolo degli Italian Swing Band è estremamente raffinato, frizzante e allegro, con un repertorio che spazia da brani soft, perfetti per l'aperitivo, a composizioni più energiche e ritmate.

party-sax-dj-tuscany-italy.intro_html:
Presenting Party Sax & DJ – An Exquisite Collective of Virtuoso Saxophonists & DJs, Based in the Heart of Tuscany, Italy

Impeccably synonymous with refined entertainment, Party Sax & DJ curates an atmosphere of unparalleled sophistication. Discerning clients consistently praise the electrifying synergy of the sax & DJ fusion, the impeccably energized dance floors, and the effortless, accommodating professionalism that defines this exceptional ensemble.

Party Sax & DJ constitutes a masterfully curated collective of world-class DJs and saxophonists, delivering a bespoke standard of high-end entertainment that sets the benchmark for weddings, galas, and exclusive corporate events. From their refined base in the picturesque landscapes of Tuscany and Umbria, they enchant distinguished guests across Italy and the most glamorous international stages. We are honored to be recognized on FixTheMusic's curated list of the 28 Best Wedding Bands in Italy 🏆 and the 24 Best Sax & DJs in Italy 🏆.

Their artistry is without parallel, weaving the irresistible rhythms of their DJs with the impeccably soulful melodies of their saxophonists to create an immersive fusion of sound. For the most discerning clientele, this sonic tapestry is further elevated by the seamless integration of additional live instrumentation—exquisite bongos, refined percussion, elegant violin, and a selection of bespoke vocalists—ensuring a truly unique and rich auditory journey for every distinguished event.

Party Sax & DJ is a regular fixture at the world's most prestigious estates and exclusive venues, including Villa di Maiano, Tenuta di Casa Brucciata, Villa Boscarello, and Agriturismo Terre di Nano in Italy; Bastide du Roy in France; Hotel Cortijo Bravo in Spain; and 58 Gin in Dalston, London. Their extraordinary reputation has garnered the attention of iconic brands and esteemed institutions—Rolls Royce, Trustpilot, Warner Brothers, the Malta High Commission, The Law Society, and the legendary Cas’ Mila Restaurant in Ibiza—all of whom entrust them to provide the pinnacle of live entertainment.

With an impressive global footprint, Party Sax & DJ has enchanted audiences in breathtaking destinations, from the vibrant Caribbean to the legendary party hub of Ibiza, and from the captivating landscapes of Malta to the cultural tapestry of Turkey, Tunisia, Germany, the United Kingdom, Spain, and beyond. Their music transcends borders, leaving an indelible mark of elegance on every stage they grace. For an exclusive touch, inquire about our bespoke Alfa Romeo DJ Service 🚗.

Party Sax & DJ possesses an innate ability to intuitively read the room and curate an unforgettable musical narrative. They seamlessly blend genres and eras, energizing guests and creating a sophisticatedly electric atmosphere that beckons everyone to the dance floor. Their dedication to delivering a personalized, tailored entertainment experience ensures that each event becomes a unique journey, filled with magical moments and lasting memories.

Prepare to be enthralled by Party Sax & DJ—a true embodiment of sophistication, talent, and world-class entertainment. With their unwavering commitment to excellence and refined international reach, they continue to raise the bar in the industry. Let them transport you on a sonic odyssey that transcends boundaries, leaving an indelible mark on your heart and soul.

We invite you to peruse our glowing testimonials on Google reviews ➡️ and explore our world on YouTube, TikTok, Facebook, and Instagram 📸. For more refined details, please visit our exclusive website.

Contact Party Sax & DJ to curate your bespoke experience 💬

View the complete range of exquisite wedding bands in Italy and refined wedding musicians in Italy on FixTheMusic.
