party-sax-dj-tuscany-italy.faq_html:
<details><summary>What are your normal set lengths?</summary>- Our DJ set is usually a 4 or 5 hour set, with the option to increase the time for an additional cost. Saxophonists usually perform 4 or 5 30-minute sets during the party and other various set combinations for the ceremony, drinks reception (aperitivo) or dinner.

</details><details><summary>Do you have different line-up options?</summary>- Our main setup is DJ only or DJ & Sax, but we can add various live elements; like violinist, percussion (bongos), additional sax (double saxophone), singer, guitar and more.

</details><details><summary>Do you provide your own sound & lighting equipment? What is it or what's included in the price?</summary>- Yes we provide all our own sound equipment and lights. We offer various packages and all options can be customisable to the client needs.

</details><details><summary>Do you provide a laptop playlist / DJ service in between and after your live sets?</summary>- Our DJ doesn't take breaks during the party, but we offer background music/laptop playlist as part of our packages for dinner.

</details><details><summary>What time do you normally arrive at the venue to set up?</summary>- We usually arrive at least 2 hours before performance time.

</details><details><summary>How long does it take for you to set up, sound check etc?</summary>- Depending on the package chosen, but it usually takes between 30 minutes to 1.5hrs for setup and soundcheck, for the party setup.

</details><details><summary>Can you learn song requests (e.g. a first dance)?</summary>- Yes our saxophonists can learn a special song request and the DJ can play as many requests as needed.

</details><details><summary>How much space do you need for your performance area?</summary>- For ceremony, drinks reception (aperitivo) & dinner, we need about 1.5m x 1.5m. For the party this depends on the package but we will need a minimum of 2m x 3m and a maximum of 3m x 6m.

</details><details><summary>Are you comfortable performing outdoors or in unusual settings (e.g. barns, beaches)?</summary>- Yes we are comfortable to perform in all sorts of environments as long as electricity close-by and we have a stable ground to setup our equipment on.</details>

italy-party-band.intro_html:
The Italy Party Band – A Bespoke Musical Ensemble from Rome, Italy

Comprising an impeccable selection of four virtuoso musicians, The Italy Party Band curates a dynamic and refined performance, perfectly conceived for the most exclusive weddings and private celebrations. Their eclectic repertoire spans the nostalgic elegance of 1970s and 1980s dance anthems, the sophisticated rhythms of pop—ideal for the aperitif hour—to the spirited energy of rock 'n' roll, seamlessly interwoven with the finest Italian and international classics. Discover their refined world on Facebook and Instagram 📸. The ensemble is a recurrent and cherished presence at Italy’s most prestigious estates, including the enchanting Villa Eva in Ravello, the majestic Villa Balbiano on Lake Como, and the idyllic Masseria San Nicola in Puglia. Enquire About This Exceptional Ensemble
italy-party-band.description_html:
Each performance is meticulously tailored to the ambiance of the evening, with an extensive and refined repertoire capable of gracing up to six hours of uninterrupted live entertainment. Discover our curated selection of Italy's most sought-after wedding bands ➡️. The Italy Party Band is the quintessential choice for the discerning client, offering impeccable accompaniment for every facet of your celebration. From the sacred ceremony to the jubilant reception, you are invited to curate your own soundtrack, selecting the melodies that resonate most deeply with your story, ensuring your most cherished day is nothing short of unforgettable. Entirely bespoke, their performance artfully adapts to your personal preferences, effortlessly transitioning through genres—from the soothing sophistication of jazz to the vibrant energy of pop, dance, and swing, enriched by a masterful selection of Italian and international compositions. Equipped with a state-of-the-art professional audio and lighting system, they require an intimate performance space of just six square meters. Their comprehensive suite of services includes serenade, ceremony, reception, and an exclusive DJ set to extend the revelry. With decades of distinguished experience gracing the world’s most exclusive weddings, private soirees, and prestigious venues, they are also adept at delivering an exquisitely intimate acoustic performance. The following is a selection of the illustrious estates and venues that have entrusted their celebrations to this exquisite ensemble...

  • Villa Eva, Salerno, Italy
  • Villa Balbiano, Como, Italy
  • Via del Pilastro, Bologna
  • Masseria San Nicola, Fasano
  • Villa Castelletto, Sinalunga
  • Villa Corsini a Mezzomonte
  • Restaurant Notedimare, Matera
  • Villa Porta Colmegna, Luino
  • Borgo Scopeto Wine Relais
  • Castello di Rocca Cilento
  • Badia a Coltibuono, Siena
  • Filottrano, Ancona, Marche
  • Rome, Lazio, Italy
  • Gargonza, Arezzo, Italy

Should you wish to engage the finest cover band that Italy has to offer for your wedding or exclusive event, we warmly invite you to make an enquiry. Follow their journey on Facebook and Instagram 📸.

In Italiano

The Italy Party Band, composta da sei musicisti di impeccabile professionalità, propone uno spettacolo musicale d’eccellenza, curato nei minimi dettagli per matrimoni ed eventi esclusivi. Il repertorio, raffinato e versatile, spazia dal jazz alla dance degli anni ‘70-‘80, dal pop contemporaneo alla musica italiana e internazionale, fino allo swing e al rock and roll. L’esibizione si adatta con eleganza a qualsiasi tipologia di serata, offrendo un ampio repertorio che copre fino a sei ore di musica dal vivo. The Italy Party Band è l’ensemble ideale per accompagnarvi in ogni momento della vostra celebrazione, sia essa un rito religioso, un rito civile o una cerimonia privata. Insieme a loro, potrete selezionare le vostre melodie preziose, creando la colonna sonora perfetta per il vostro giorno speciale. The Italy Party Band è la promessa di un ricordo indelebile. The Italy Party Band è un complesso di musicisti professionisti dedicati a creare l’atmosfera perfetta per il vostro matrimonio, con un repertorio elegante che abbraccia jazz, dance e pop. La loro esibizione può essere plasmata interamente sui vostri desideri. Il vasto repertorio, che copre fino a sei ore di musica, spazia tra jazz, pop, dance, musica italiana, internazionale, swing e rock and roll. Dotati di un impianto audio e luci di altissimo livello, si adattano a qualsiasi contesto. Lo spazio scenico richiesto è di soli 6 mq. Offrono servizio di serenata, cerimonia, ricevimento e DJ set. Grazie a una vasta esperienza maturata nei più esclusivi matrimoni, feste private e locali di prestigio, possono esibirsi anche in una suggestiva formazione semi-acustica.

italy-party-band.faq_html:
<details><summary>Cosa include il pack matrimonio?</summary>Band composta da 6 elementi, per uno spettacolo suonato tutto dal vivo dall'aperitivo al party - Impianto audio e luci professionale. A seconda dell'accordo: Musica per cerimonia, serenata e DJ Set.



</details><details><summary>Con quanto anticipo mi devo mettere in contatto con te?</summary>Il prima possibile, in quanto è importante per noi personalizzare e rendere unico ogni evento. In ogni caso puoi contattarci in qualsiasi momento per richiedere la nostra disponibilità.



</details><details><summary>Grandezza della formazione?</summary>Media (4-6 musicisti).



</details><details><summary>Repertorio?</summary>Il nostro repertorio conta oltre sei ore di musica dal vivo: Jazz, Pop, Dance, Musica Italiana, Internazionale, Swing e Rock 'n' Roll.



</details><details><summary>Posso chiedere dei brani non inseriti nel repertorio?</summary>Accettiamo richieste, massimo 3 brani. Ma ci si può accordare di caso in caso senza problemi per personalizzare l'evento al meglio.



</details><details><summary>Esperienza?</summary>Abbiamo anni di esperienza in feste private e matrimoni con la musica LIVE.



</details><details><summary>Disponi di strumentazione propria?</summary>Sì.



</details><details><summary>Hai bisogno di un materiale in concreto o di specifiche condizioni per poter offrire il servizio?</summary>No.



</details><details><summary>Hai la possibilità di effettuare delle trasferte?</summary>Sì, in tutto il territorio Italiano ed europeo.



</details><details><summary>Esiste un sovrapprezzo in caso di trasferta?</summary>Sì, dipende dalla zona e dalle spese di viaggio.



</details><details><summary>Lavori per più di un matrimonio al giorno?</summary>No.



</details><details><summary>Lavori da solo o con un'equipe di professionisti?</summary>In equipe.



</details><details><summary>Quanto tempo dura l'esibizione?</summary>Dipende dal tipo di spettacolo. Abbiamo un repertorio di circa sei ore. In genere proponiamo Jazz/Bossa per l'aperitivo e rock/dance per il PARTY, ma siamo aperti a qualsiasi proposta.



</details><details><summary>Di quanto tempo hai bisogno per preparare l'esibizione?</summary>Abbiamo bisogno di circa un ora e mezza per il montaggio e circa 6mq di spazio.



</details><details><summary>Realizzi esibizioni all'aperto?</summary>Sì.</details>

wedding-band-italy-puppets.intro_html:
The Puppets – An Exquisite Wedding Band Based in Bologna & Tuscany, Curating Unforgettable Events Across Italy

What discerning clients have celebrated about The Puppets: electrifying live performances that enliven every dance floor, exceptional vocal artistry, mesmerising audience engagement, seamlessly curated medleys, impeccably organised professionalism, bespoke accommodation of every request, refined integration of DJ and saxophone, effortless communication, and an atmosphere of unparalleled celebration.

The Puppets are a charismatic ensemble of musicians, offering a refined repertoire of pop covers, based in the cultural heart of Northern Italy.

We are sought after to perform at weddings, corporate galas, private soirées, public celebrations, and any occasion demanding a vibrant, full dance floor.

Follow our journey on Facebook and Instagram.

Our philosophy is elegantly simple: we deliver uplifting music that infuses every event with joy through live performance.

Explore our curated list of Italy's finest wedding bands.

We are regularly booked to perform at exclusive weddings and events at Island Club on the Athens Riviera in Greece, Villa Cimbrone in Ravello, and Palazzo di Cuzzano in Bologna, Italy.

We are proudly ranked #1 on FixTheMusic's 28 Best Wedding Bands in Italy.

Clients who have enquired with The Puppets have also expressed interest in the following distinguished ensembles on FixTheMusic:

  1. The Sonics
  2. La Dolce Vita
  3. Traffic Lights
  4. Slipstream

Over the past several years, The Puppets have graced the most prestigious clubs across Europe and have entertained at countless weddings, private celebrations, and corporate events around the world.

Inquire with The Puppets
wedding-band-italy-puppets.description_html:
Notable highlights include being personally invited by fashion icons such as Tommy Hilfiger and Philipp Plein to animate their birthday celebrations. The band has also performed at the most luxurious resort in Sharm El Sheikh, Egypt, where they were summoned as the principal entertainment for the New Year's Eve gala for seven consecutive years.

The band's vast repertoire spans from 1970s disco to rock ‘n’ roll, from timeless Italian classics to unforgettable 1980s and 1990s dance anthems. Yet what truly distinguishes The Puppets is their impeccably curated Top 40 setlist, refreshed regularly with today's most celebrated dance and pop hits.

We recently orchestrated the celebration for Natalie and David’s three-day wedding at the exquisite Villa Cimbrone on the breathtaking Amalfi Coast in Italy.

The exceptional vocal prowess and polished stage presence of the two lead singers, Martina and Francesco, merge seamlessly into a single, captivating dimension, elevating the live performance to that of an elite dance house club. The Puppets are widely renowned as the finest party mash‑up band Italy has to offer.

We are a charismatic pop and rock cover band with male and female vocals

The band is in demand throughout Italy, having performed at exclusive destination weddings in Bologna, Milan, Rome, Tuscany, Lake Como, Lake Garda, Venice, Parma, Genoa, Padua, Verona, and Pisa.

Explore our curated list of Italy's finest wedding bands.

We also offer an impeccable DJ service. All sound and lighting equipment is included unless specified otherwise in your bespoke quote.

Upon request, The Puppets can expand to include multiple singers and a horn section—saxophone, trumpet, or trombone—and may also provide dancers to perform alongside the band, subject to additional fees.

The band possesses extensive experience performing at Jewish weddings, including a refined rendition of “Hava Nagila,” and can accommodate traditional songs requested by the couple through our DJ or live sound system.

If you are seeking to engage the most exceptional wedding band in Italy for your wedding or event, we invite you to connect with The Puppets.

Follow our journey on Facebook and Instagram.

Kindly visit our website for further refined details.

We are proudly ranked #1 on FixTheMusic's 28 Best Wedding Bands in Italy.

Additional Musicians: DJ, Live Saxophone, and Our Jazz Ensemble

Please enquire about the other local musicians we collaborate with. We can recommend a guitarist, harpist, DJ, jazz band, saxophonist—any instrumentalist you desire. Through our network of esteemed local musicians, we craft the most bespoke musical package for your wedding or event.

In Italiano

In oltre quindici anni di attività, The Puppets si sono esibiti nei più prestigiosi locali d'Italia e hanno partecipato a innumerevoli eventi privati e convention di marchi come BMW, Diadora e Nissan, vantando inoltre esibizioni in Austria, Germania, Francia e presso l'esclusivo resort Domina Coral Bay a Sharm El Sheikh.

Il loro repertorio spazia dai classici successi disco dance degli anni '70 al rock 'n' roll, dagli evergreen italiani agli indimenticabili anni '80. Il vero punto di forza della loro scaletta è la house music, dagli anni '90 alle hit contemporanee, in un susseguirsi di musica e coreografie che soddisfa le platee più disparate.

La sonorità della band è chiaramente dance, grazie alla console DJ e agli effetti scenici utilizzati da ogni elemento del gruppo. La presenza scenica dei due cantanti, Martina e Francesco, trasforma lo spettacolo in un'esperienza che merita di essere vista oltre che ascoltata, rivelando due veri intrattenitori forti di una consolidata esperienza nelle discoteche del nord Italia come vocalist. Di fatto, The Puppets fondono perfettamente l'impatto live con il coinvolgimento tipico della dance music.

Ensemble Comparabili

I clienti che hanno richiesto informazioni per The Puppets si sono informati anche per i seguenti gruppi su FixTheMusic:

  1. The Sonics
  2. La Dolce Vita
  3. Traffic Lights
  4. The Somethings
  5. Trio Toscano
  6. Slipstream
  7. Forever Young Duo

tuscany-sax-dj-duo-italy.intro_html:
About Tuscany Sax & DJ – an exquisite saxophone and DJ duo, based in the heart of Tuscany, Italy

Raff and Freddy, two brothers born and raised in a pastoral village within the Tuscan countryside near Florence, embody a refined musical lineage. United by an early passion for music, they have curated a bespoke performance experience, blending their instruments and creative vision to form the distinguished duo Tuscany Sax & DJ.

Discover our curated selection of Italy’s most impeccable DJ & Sax ensembles for weddings ➡️

Discerning clients who have inquired with Tuscany Sax & DJ have also explored these similarly exceptional groups on FixTheMusic:

  1. Double Sax & DJ

  2. Party Sax & DJ

  3. The Milan Saxophonist

  4. Toni On Sax

  5. DJ Zano

Tuscany Sax & DJ now grace international luxury events, where elegance seamlessly merges with celebratory energy to craft a singularly captivating show. We are honored to be featured on FixTheMusic’s 20 Best Sax & DJs in Italy 🏆, a testament to our impeccable artistry. Our calendar is regularly reserved for weddings and soirees at prestigious venues such as Castello di Rosciano in Perugia, Masseria Agnello in Realmonte, and Castello Vicchiomaggio in Florence.

Enquire with Tuscany Sax & DJ 💬
tuscany-sax-dj-duo-italy.description_html:
Eclectic, supremely talented, and delightfully daring, they breathe life into a musical style that transcends convention, revolutionizing the classical perception of the saxophone. Their performances, defined by radiant energy and immersive involvement, command attention and win over an ever-widening audience of connoisseurs.

Browse our refined collection of Italy’s finest wedding DJs ➡️

Should you wish to secure the most refined saxophone and DJ duo that Italy has to offer, we invite you to reach out to us. We are also proud to be listed on FixTheMusic’s 20 Best Wedding Bands in Tuscany 🏆. Follow our journey on Facebook and Instagram 📸.

In Italiano

Raff e Freddy sono due fratelli nati e cresciuti in un incantevole borgo della campagna toscana, nei pressi di Firenze. Appassionati di musica sin dall’infanzia, uniscono i loro strumenti e la loro superlativa creatività per dar vita al duo Tuscany Sax & DJ.

Eclettici, talentuosi e audaci quanto basta, creano uno stile musicale fuori dagli schemi, rivoluzionando l’idea classica del sassofono. Le loro performance, all’insegna di energia e coinvolgimento, non passano inosservate, conquistando un pubblico sempre più esigente e raffinato.

Oggi Tuscany Sax & DJ sono richiestissimi in eventi di lusso, dove l’eleganza si fonde con il divertimento per dare forma a uno spettacolo unico. Nel giorno più bello e speciale della vostra vita, affidatevi alla professionalità e alla passione del duo Tuscany Sax & DJ: riceverete un servizio curato e personalizzato, capace di trasformare il vostro grande giorno in una festa straordinaria ed esplosiva.

Tuscany Sax & DJ (premiati ai Dance Music Awards come migliori performer italiani) vi propongono un intrattenimento musicale originale e inimitabile, adattandosi alle vostre richieste per enfatizzare ogni istante del vostro matrimonio con un sound d’eccezione. Ogni momento – accoglienza, aperitivo, cena, taglio della torta e ballo – viene gestito in modo scenografico e impeccabile, senza alcuna necessità di spostare la strumentazione.

Il duo vanta esperienza e professionalità nella direzione artistica di eventi musicali di alto livello, sia privati che per prestigiosi brand italiani e internazionali. Il loro repertorio spazia su generi disco, dance, deep e fashion house, ciascuno caratterizzato dall’inconfondibile sound Tuscany Sax & DJ, per garantirvi una festa formidabile che superi ogni aspettativa.

tuscany-sax-dj-duo-italy.faq_html:
<details><summary>Cosa include il pack matrimonio?</summary>Su richiesta - Silent Disco (per proseguire il party fino a tardi senza alcun rumore esterno, grazie alle cufie led) - Luci Illuminazione scenografica / service luce arch - Videoproiezioni per trailer.



</details><details><summary>Con quanto anticipo mi devo mettere in contatto con te?</summary>Tempo minimo consigliato: 12 mesi. Consigliato: 24 mesi.



</details><details><summary>Grandezza della formazione?</summary>Piccola (2-3 musicisti).



</details><details><summary>Repertorio?</summary>Il repertorio va in base alle situazioni distinte che si vengono a creare durante il Matrimonio (es. accoglienza e aperitivo, cena, disco-party...) ed è totalmente personalizzabile sul singolo evento.



</details><details><summary>Posso chiedere dei brani non inseriti nel repertorio?</summary>Il servizio di personalizzazione dei brani è compreso nel nostro pack standard quindi nessun problema nella scelta di qualsiasi brano, soprattutto per l'ingresso sposi, taglio torta, primo ballo...



</details><details><summary>Esperienza?</summary>18 anni.



</details><details><summary>Disponi di strumentazione propria?</summary>Sì.



</details><details><summary>Hai bisogno di materiale particolare o di specifiche condizioni per poter offrire il servizio?</summary>No.



</details><details><summary>Hai la possibilità di effettuare delle trasferte?</summary>Sì, siamo in grado di operare grazie anche al nostro personale tecnico in tutto il Mondo.



</details><details><summary>Esiste un sovrapprezzo in caso di trasferta?</summary>Sì, dipende dal raggio chilometrico.



</details><details><summary>Lavori per più di un matrimonio al giorno?</summary>No.



</details><details><summary>Lavori da solo o con un'equipe di professionisti?</summary>In equipe.



</details><details><summary>Quanto tempo dura l'esibizione?</summary>Non abbiamo un tempo limite, i Tuscany Sax & DJ sono a disposizione dalla prima accoglienza ospiti alla "chiusura" dell'evento.



</details><details><summary>Di quanto tempo hai bisogno per preparare l'esibizione?</summary>Il tempo tecnico di installazione impianti dipende dal numero di impianti stessi (audio / luce / coreografie) da installare. Il tempo è sempre comunque in linea con le normali esigenze delle location.



</details><details><summary>Realizzi esibizioni all'aperto?</summary>Sì</details>

italian-soul-machine-siena-italy.description_html:
Composed entirely of professional musicians, we specialize as an Italian Wedding Band of the highest calibre, yet also provide elegant and engaging entertainment suitable for any occasion: weddings, conventions, corporate events, and private parties.

View FixTheMusic’s curated selection of the finest wedding bands in Italy

Our extensive repertoire ranges from the refined classics of Soul Motown, R&B, Swing, and Jazz to the energetic Dance & Disco music of the ’70s and ’80s, as well as the most sophisticated modern hits.

In recent years, we have brought our music to the most prestigious destinations across Italy: Tuscany and Umbria, the Amalfi Coast and Campania, Lazio, the splendid Italian lakes (such as Lake Garda and Lake Como), Milan, and the islands of Sicily and Sardinia.

Entrust us with crafting an unforgettable affair.

florence-jazz-band-tuscany-italy.intro_html:
The Florence Jazz Band – an ensemble of uncompromising artistry, available exclusively for weddings and distinguished events in Tuscany, throughout Italy, and across Europe.

What discerning clients cherish most: exquisite vocals, an atmosphere of refined elegance, impeccable professionalism, effortless flexibility, and a magical ambience that captivates every guest.

The Florence Jazz Band presents a curated repertoire drawn from the masterpieces of American vocal music in the jazz and swing tradition.

We are honoured to be ranked No. 1 on FixTheMusic’s 20 Best Jazz Bands for Hire in Italy 🏆.

Our programme features the beloved songs of Ella Fitzgerald and Billie Holiday, the soulful blues of Nat King Cole, Ray Charles, and Etta James, as well as hidden gems from the early-20th-century masters of jazz and swing—compositions of extraordinary artistic value, long cherished by connoisseurs.

We are also proud to be featured on FixTheMusic’s 28 Best Wedding Bands in Italy 🏆.

Our ensemble is in constant demand for the most exclusive weddings and soirées in Tuscany, Italy, and throughout Europe. We are regularly booked to perform at prestigious venues such as Caruso Belmond Hotel on the Amalfi Coast, Villa il Pozzo Winery & Resort in Certaldo, and Borgo Di Castelvecchio in Siena.

Discover Italy’s finest jazz ensembles: View our curated list ➡️

Inquire about The Florence Jazz Band 💬

At the heart of our project lies a passion for rediscovery—unearthing songs of immense musical and artistic merit that have, inexplicably, remained hidden from the broader public.

The Florence Jazz Band typically performs as a bespoke quartet: voice, clarinet, double bass, and classical guitar.

Put simply, we seek to recreate the rhythms, textures, and luminous atmosphere of the golden age of American jazz.

We are honoured to be listed on FixTheMusic’s 22 Best Wedding Bands in Tuscany 🏆.

Should you wish to engage the most refined jazz ensemble Florence (Tuscany) has to offer for your wedding or event, we invite you to contact us.

In Italiano

Il Florence Jazz Band propone un repertorio curato basato su alcuni capolavori della musica vocale americana in stile jazz e swing.

La band interpreta brani celebri di Ella Fitzgerald, Billie Holiday, i grandi blues di Nat King Cole, Ray Charles, Etta James, ed i brani più rari e squisiti dei grandi protagonisti del Jazz e dello Swing dei primi anni del Secolo del Jazz.

In particolar modo, la band ha voluto riscoprire e rivalorizzare brani di questi autori – rimasti inspiegabilmente celati al grande pubblico – che possiedono un grande valore artistico e musicale.

Un quartetto composto da voce, clarinetto, contrabbasso e chitarra classica. La ricerca musicale è il filo conduttore di un progetto che mira a ritrovare il ritmo, il sound e l’atmosfera degli anni ’20, ’30 e ’40 del Novecento americano, in un ampio spettro culturale che abbraccia la storia della musica, dell’arte, della moda e la pratica delle stesse.

wedding-dj-florence-italy-zano.intro_html:
DJ Zano – An Exquisite Wedding DJ Experience, Based in Florence, Italy

What discerning clients most cherish: Impeccable communication, an electrifying presence, bespoke musical curation, a dance floor that remains animated from the first note to the last, and a flawless blend of professionalism and adaptability.

DJ Zano is a refined entertainer based in Florence, celebrated for his dynamic and impeccably curated sets, as well as his unmatched charisma and unwavering dedication to excellence.

A seasoned artist with well over a decade of experience, DJ Zano has graced stages across the globe, offering an eclectic and vibrant repertoire tailored to the most sophisticated tastes.

Follow the journey on Facebook and Instagram.

For those seeking to engage one of the most distinguished wedding DJs Florence has to offer, an inquiry with Zano is the first step toward an unforgettable celebration.

Proudly featured on FixTheMusic’s 24 Best Wedding DJs in Italy.

Beyond his performances, Zano is a devoted mentor to emerging DJ talent in his local region, nurturing the next generation of auditory artisans.

Regularly celebrated on the award-winning wedding planning journal Wed Vibes, including A Romantic Dream Wedding at a Tuscan Villa.

He curates a refined roster of fellow DJs, each available for booking through FixTheMusic for weddings and celebrations across Italy:

  • DJ Belmo
  • DJ Stefo
  • DJ Leon
  • DJ Charlie
  • DJ Jack
  • DJ Sasha

Zano is a perennial presence at some of Italy’s most exquisite venues, including Castello Monaci in Lecce, Villa Aurelia in Rome, and Agriturismo Terre di Nano in Siena.

Inquire with DJ Zano

He frequently performs alongside the acclaimed Toni On Sax, offering the sought-after Ibiza-style fusion of DJ and live saxophone—ideal for an invigorating party atmosphere or a refined, chilled ambience. Another captivating collaboration is the DJ and trumpet duo, available for bespoke weddings throughout Italy.

DJ Zano’s reputation extends across Italy, having performed at illustrious venues and held residencies at some of the nation’s most prestigious clubs and cruise experiences.

Explore our curated selection of Italy’s finest wedding DJs.

His repertoire is a masterful tapestry of sound, spanning from deep house to 70s disco, seamlessly weaving together the classic and the contemporary to create a performance that is as exclusive as it is exhilarating.

With a professional journey commencing in 2002, DJ Zano brings a wealth of experience from both private and public occasions, ensuring every element of his performance is meticulously tailored to your vision.

Zano regularly collaborates with other distinguished entertainers, including LED drummers, saxophonists, trumpet players, and more, elevating each event into a multisensory experience.

A frequent headliner at Casa Cornacchi in Bucine, Tuscany.

Should the refined artistry of DJ Zano resonate with your aspirations, we invite you to reach out without hesitation.

Follow the journey on Facebook and Instagram.

dj-alps-europe-chris.intro_html:
DJ Chris – An Exquisite Curator of Sound for the Discerning Wedding, Nestled in the French Alps

What discerning clients most revere about DJ Chris: impeccable professionalism and adaptability, an intuitive reading of the room, seamless technical orchestration, refined communication, and a steadfast ability to keep the dance floor animated with effortless elegance throughout weddings and celebrations.

DJ Chris is a master turntablist and scratch artist, orchestrating a bespoke sonic journey through the finest party Hip Hop, UK House, Breaks, and Drum & Bass.

With origins steeped in the Jungle and Drum ’n’ Bass traditions, DJ Chris has been commanding the most prestigious clubs, exclusive raves, and private celebrations across the United Kingdom since 2004.

Explore the complete collection of wedding DJs in France

Chris is a regular presence at corporate galas and weddings, collaborating intimately with each client to discern their vision and deliver a party that is both refined and exhilarating.

I am honoured to be featured on FixTheMusic’s 12 Best Wedding DJs in France 🏆

Clients who have enquired with DJ Chris also expressed interest in the following distinguished wedding DJs on FixTheMusic:

1. DJ Lenny
2. DJ George Jonathan
3. The Exclusive DJ
4. DJ Glenny
5. DJ Douglas

Since the winter of 2010, DJ Chris has made his home in the French Alps, holding an illustrious residency at the legendary ‘Loop Bar’ in Tignes and energising elite student gatherings for Outgoing, Off The Piste, and NUCO.

Perpetually refining his craft, DJ Chris guarantees an electrifying presence on any dance floor he graces.

I am frequently engaged to perform at weddings and high-profile events at Chateau Lagorce in Gironde, Château de la Gaude in Aix-en-Provence, and Hôtel Château de La Côte in Biras, France.

Contact DJ Chris 💬

With over a decade of professional experience, DJ Chris spends his winters touring the Alpine peaks.

Whether enchanting an Apres-ski gathering or captivating a late-night soirée, he is renowned for his impeccably curated sets that traverse funk, soul, disco, hip hop, house, pop, and beyond.

DJ Chris tours alongside the most celebrated names in the UK scene when they grace the Alps.

In recent years, he has shared the stage with luminaries such as Rudimental, The Scratch Perverts, MC Akil from Jurassic 5, Shy FX, The Nextmen, Featurecast, Mystro, DJ JFB (DMC Champion), Skitz, PRofit, the beatbox ensemble Duke (X Factor UK Finalists), London ska/hip hop band Lazy Habits, The ASBO DISCO, Krafty Kuts, DJ Yoda, A-Skillz, Dr Syntax & Pete Cannon, DJ Woody (2× DMC Champion), Ed Solo, and Low Steppa—to name only a few.

DJ Chris holds exclusive residencies across the globe, including at The British Ski & Snowboard Championships, for Corona New Zealand, and for Bass Station Europe.

Forever Young Duo — An Exquisite Wedding & Event Ensemble, Based in Milan, Italy

What discerning clients cherish most about Forever Young Duo: an impeccable blend of warmth and professionalism, extraordinary artistry, remarkable versatility, an atmosphere of effortless charm, and a performance that leaves every guest utterly captivated.

The refined duo comprises Carol, whose vocals are nothing short of enchanting, and Alex, a master of guitar and loop station, together creating a sound that is both intimate and expansive.

Discover the complete collection of bespoke acoustic duos in Italy.

The pair are exceptionally attuned to their clients' vision, welcoming the opportunity to curate their set, repertoire, and performance style to suit the unique character of each occasion. Every detail is crafted to perfection.

Forever Young Duo offers discerning counsel on the musical ambience best suited to your celebration, collaborating closely to ensure every note resonates with your personal narrative.

Explore the full portfolio of refined wedding musicians in Italy.

The ensemble is regularly engaged for weddings and exclusive events at the illustrious Hotel Villa Cipressi on Lake Como and the distinguished Residence Oldofredi in Brescia, Italy.

Inquire with Forever Young Duo ➔

The duo possesses an exquisite sensitivity to their audience and the evolving energy of the celebration, adapting their performance with seamless grace — making them the quintessential choice for any occasion of distinction.

View our curated selection of Italy's most prestigious wedding bands ➔

Forever Young Duo commands an impressively diverse repertoire, spanning the golden eras of jazz and swing through to today's most celebrated pop and chart-topping anthems — a musical journey across decades, impeccably delivered.

For grander affairs, the duo can expand into a sophisticated four-piece ensemble. Enquire to discover the possibilities.

Forever Young Duo brings a wealth of experience and an unwavering commitment to excellence, having cultivated a remarkable international clientele that includes Conrad Hilton (Bora Bora), Four Seasons (Bahrain), Intercontinental (Dubai), Porsche (Dubai), Formula 1, GP Monza (Italy), Heineken (Italy), Bushido Buddha-bar (Bahrain), Gallery 21 (Bahrain), TAG Heuer, Hyundai, and Anantara Dhigu Resort (Maldives).

folk-wedding-band-italy-hopeless-wandere.intro_html:
The Hopeless Wanderers – An Exquisite Folk Ensemble for Your Wedding, Based in Padua, Italy

✦ What discerning clients most cherish about The Hopeless Wanderers: an energetically refined folk ensemble, impeccably curated dance floors, exceptional rapport with guests, seamless professionalism, flexible reliability, and the highest recommendation.

Widely regarded as Italy’s most distinguished Mumford and Sons-inspired ensemble, The Hopeless Wanderers are a quartet devoted to the refined art of transforming celebrated international pop and rock compositions into bespoke folk arrangements—a harmonious fusion of tradition and modernity.

Discover the full collection of wedding bands across Italy.

The ensemble comprises Federico (voice and percussion), Andrea (backing vocals, accordion, guitar, ukulele), Luca (backing vocals, guitar, mandolin, banjo, and foot percussion), and Carlo (bass guitar).

Founded in 2012, The Hopeless Wanderers swiftly garnered an illustrious following spanning all ages, backgrounds, and musical sensibilities.

We are honoured to be featured on FixTheMusic’s 28 Best Wedding Bands in Italy 🏆.

Please note that trumpet and trombone are not included in the ensemble’s standard configuration.

We are regularly commissioned for weddings and exclusive events at Castello di Modanella in Siena and Masseria Grieco in Ostuni, among other prestigious venues.

Enquire with The Hopeless Wanderers 💬

To date, the ensemble has performed at more than 200 concerts and events throughout Italy.

Explore our curated selection of Italy’s finest wedding bands ➡️

Their musical repertoire features an exquisite selection of works by The Beatles, Tears for Fears, Dead or Alive, The Cure, Michael Jackson, Talking Heads, David Bowie, Mumford and Sons, The Lumineers, Brooke Fraser, Avicii, and George Ezra.

Though drawn from vastly diverse genres, the playlist is a masterful union of sound and style—a truly unique offering in Italy, where no other ensemble delivers this refined, banjo-infused folk-pop signature.

The band’s Mumford and Sons repertoire currently includes:

  • Little Lion Man
  • Awake My Soul
  • I Will Wait
  • Hopeless Wanderers
  • Winter Winds
  • The Banjolin Song
  • The Cave
  • Babel
  • Forever

For extraordinary occasions, the quartet is complemented by trumpet and trombone, elevating the experience to new heights of refinement.

Their captivating energy is, without question, their most defining attribute.

Should you wish to engage Italy’s most refined indie, rock, folk, and Mumford and Sons-style wedding band, we invite you to connect with The Hopeless Wanderers.

In Italiano

Una voce, un mandolino, una fisarmonica e due percussioni a pedale. I più raffinati brani della musica internazionale, reinterpretati e proposti in una veste inedita ed elegante.

Il quartetto The Hopeless Wanderers rivisita i migliori brani del pop e del rock internazionale, proponendoli in chiave folk con una perfetta mescolanza di tradizione e contemporaneità.

La formazione è composta da: Federico (voce), Luca (chitarra, mandolino, percussioni a pedale, cori), Andrea (fisarmonica, chitarra, percussioni, cori) e Carlo (basso).

Nati nel 2012, hanno immediatamente raccolto ampi consensi presso un pubblico esigente e raffinato.

Tra le loro influenze: The Beatles, Bob Dylan, Tears for Fears, The Cure, Michael Jackson, Talking Heads, REM, Mumford and Sons, The Lumineers, Brooke Fraser—artisti eterogenei che gli Hopeless Wanderers uniscono con maestria in un sound inconfondibile.

Con la loro travolgente energia, gli Hopeless Wanderers avvolgeranno l’atmosfera del vostro ricevimento nuziale in un’aura di emozione e magia, contraddistinta da competenza e professionalità, rendendo il vostro giorno un’esperienza indimenticabile.

The Hopeless Wanderers è un quartetto composto da tre voci, un mandolino, una fisarmonica, un basso e due percussioni a pedale.

Formatosi nel 2012, ha da subito raccolto larghi consensi tra un pubblico di ogni età, provenienza e gusto musicale, collezionando oltre 150 concerti in tutto il Veneto e due tour in Sardegna.

Il loro sound inconfondibile offre un servizio eccelso, fatto di musica di altissima qualità e della garanzia di una performance capace di coinvolgere indistintamente tutti i vostri ospiti.

La band accompagnerà il vostro ricevimento nuziale con la massima cura e professionalità, dal momento del vostro ingresso fino all’ultimo ballo, proponendo per ogni fase una colonna sonora capace di esaltare lo scenario e trasformarlo in un’occasione unica e irripetibile.

Potrete concordare con la band i brani desiderati per la scaletta del vostro ricevimento, attingendo a un vasto repertorio internazionale rivisitato in chiave folk con mandolino, fisarmonica, basso e voce.

Ensemble Affini

folk-wedding-band-italy-hopeless-wandere.faq_html:
<details><summary>Cosa include il pack matrimonio?</summary>Esecuzione musicale dal vivo per festa (circa 2 ore) ed eventualmente aperitivo con brani più rilassanti.



</details><details><summary>Con quanto anticipo mi devo mettere in contatto con te?</summary>Anticipo almeno di un mese.



</details><details><summary>Grandezza della formazione?</summary>Media (4-6 musicisti).



</details><details><summary>Repertorio?</summary>The Beatles, Tears for Fears, Dead or Alive, The Cure, Michael Jackson, Talking Heads, David Bowie, Mumford and Sons, The Lumineers, Brooke Fraser, Avicii, George Ezra.



</details><details><summary>Posso chiedere dei brani non inseriti nel repertorio?</summary>Si accettano solo un paio di richieste.



</details><details><summary>Esperienza?</summary>3 anni di concerti in tutto il nord Italia. Più di 180 concerti tra feste private, matrimoni, feste in piazza e pub. 3 tour in Sardegna (costa smeralda) 1 apparizione televisiva presso TVA Vicenza.



</details><details><summary>Disponi di strumentazione propria?</summary>Sì.



</details><details><summary>Hai bisogno di un materiale in concreto o di specifiche condizioni per poter offrire il servizio?</summary>Sì, presa corrente con almeno 1,5KW e copertura in caso di pioggia.



</details><details><summary>Hai la possibilità di effettuare delle trasferte?</summary>Sì, in tutta Italia.



</details><details><summary>Esiste un sovrapprezzo in caso di trasferta?</summary>Sì, da valutare in base alla distanza.



</details><details><summary>Lavori per più di un matrimonio al giorno?</summary>No.



</details><details><summary>Lavori da solo o con un'equipe di professionisti?</summary>In equipe.



</details><details><summary>Quanto tempo dura l'esibizione?</summary>1 ora Aperitivo, 2 ore festa serale/pomeridiana.



</details><details><summary>Di quanto tempo hai bisogno per preparare l'esibizione?</summary>1 ora e 30 minuti.



</details><details><summary>Realizzi esibizioni all'aperto?</summary>Sì.</details>

A meticulously curated trio, Slipstream has performed over 500 concerts, including world tours and VIP weddings, delivering the most celebrated pop-rock anthems from the 1950s to the present day. Each performance is crafted to ensure your celebration is nothing short of extraordinary.

Select the bespoke package that perfectly aligns with your vision, tailor every detail of the setlist to your tastes, and entrust us with the date and time. We guarantee an impeccable execution of the highest calibre.

Discover our selection of Italy’s preeminent wedding bands ➡️

Do not hesitate to request further refinement. Our mission is singular: to ensure you experience the most sublime day of your life, free from any concern.

Demand for our most coveted dates extends up to 18 months in advance, and during the peak season from May to September we receive over twenty enquiries each weekend. Early engagement is therefore sincerely advised.

We are proud to be listed on FixTheMusic’s 22 Best Wedding Bands in Tuscany 🏆.

Slipstream stands as Tuscany’s premier live band, specialising in weddings and luxury events, with a distinguished presence on the international music scene.

Composed of three extraordinarily talented musicians, Slipstream boasts international tours, charted albums and singles, contracts with Costa Cruises and world‑class resorts, television appearances, and—most importantly—a profound, proven expertise in the music and entertainment industry. Over the years, the band has become synonymous with exceptional talent and uncompromising professionalism, delivering impeccable services for every occasion.

Slipstream presents a curated repertoire of the most celebrated pop‑rock hits from the past seventy years—covering Pop, Blues, Rock, Folk, Dance, and Indie—spanning the 1950s through today’s top charts.

Yet above all, the band remains exquisitely attuned to every client’s unique desires and requirements, ensuring that the playlist is tailored to create the perfect atmosphere for any setting.

wedding-band-arezzo-italy-slipstream.faq_html:
<details><summary>WHAT KIND OF MUSIC DO YOU PROPOSE?</summary>The Slipstream set has been carefully chosen over years of performing. The set includes the best hits from the 50/60s onwards, and represents a perfect balance between contemporary and classic.

The band spends hours in the studio in between performances ensuring the latest hits are as exceptional as the classics! Please see the Playlist page for a full up to date list.



</details><details><summary>GOT OUR OWN SONG. COULD YOU PLAY IT?</summary>We know that above all, music is nothing but personal. If you have a song that absolutely must be included on your wedding day, and it suits the type of sound the band plays, just ask.

Due to the band’s busy diary, this must be done at least 1 month in advance. We will do our best to do that, and in case that particular tune doesn’t work with our stuff, no worries, we’ll find a way for you to listen to it!



</details><details><summary>DON’T LIKE A COUPLE OF SONGS IN YOUR LIST, CAN WE CUT ‘EM?</summary>Yes, absolutely. Weddings are special occasions, and we are happy to work with clients throughout contact until the big day to really tailor the set towards you.

The playlist is varied enough to cater towards a crowd of any age, so if you feel like some songs absolutely must be played, or just ain’t right for your event, feel free to tell us. Again, don’t forget to let us know at least 30 days before.



</details><details><summary>WE’D LOVE TO HAVE A DJ FOR THE PARTY. CAN YOU PROVIDE IT? DOES IT AFFECT YOUR PERFORMANCE?</summary>The band offers a DJ service, and this means we will have only one set of PA equipment and lighting for the party set and DJ, and lots more room for dancing! The band is happy to share the stage with any other performer booked for the event, by the way. Up to you!



</details><details><summary>YOUR ON-STAGE LOOK?</summary>Actually, we can dress up with classic suits, with party dresses, jeans & t-shirts. You decide the dress-code, the band won’t let you down. We will provide a minimum of two clothes changing during the day, if more than one service is selected.



</details><details><summary>DOES THE BAND DEAL DIRECTLY WITH VENUES?</summary>The band would be more than happy to speak with any venue regarding arrangements or technicalities.



</details><details><summary>GONNA GET MARRIED IN GREECE. CAN YOU TRAVEL?</summary>Of course. One of the perks of being in a band is the opportunity to travel high and low throughout the world, as long as all expenses are covered. For events where flying is necessary, the band have a technical specification rider – a local company must be sourced to provide the equipment.



</details><details><summary>THE DAY HAS COME. WHAT HAPPENS NOW?</summary>Slipstream require at least 2 hours before guests arrive (if possible) to ensure a full soundcheck. The band will agree a suitable time with the client, and arrive at least 1 hour before soundcheck to load in and acclimatise with the venue.

After soundcheck, unless otherwise instructed, the band will return to the hotel to change clothes and refresh (unless asked to provide entertainment during that time).

If the event is in close proximity to Cortona and the band is not staying at a hotel, a private space is required to act as a base, ideally with changing and shower facilities. Prior to any performance, the band will be on site and ready one hour before the established time.



</details><details><summary>IF WE WANT YOU TO PLAY LONGER?</summary>Well, there’s a whole book to write about it. We have been on the road for years and years and we know you wish the party never stop, but we have our own iron rule:

Any additional entertainment outside of the agreed times will result in an additional charge for each hour of 20% on the total amount agreed, with a minimum payment of one additional hour. We really needed to state this: we handled too many bad situations.



</details><details><summary>ANY ACCOMMODATION NEEDED?</summary>It can take up to 2 hours to pack down the full band setup after a show, which often means a very late finish. If the event is based further than 3 hours away from Cortona, Italy (our hometown), we stay in hotels at our own cost.

Our quoted price is always VAT and accommodation inclusive; there are no hidden fees. If you want us for more than one day, then we will need a triple room – we have no particular demands, just a room with three beds.



</details><details><summary>REGARDING FOOD AND DRINK?</summary>Yes please. Slipstream are very self-sufficient and easy going, but basic meal for three is required, along with cold refreshments.



</details><details><summary>THERE'LL BE ANIMALS WITH US. IS IT A PROBLEM?</summary>Oh, we do love animals very much, don’t worry. Slipstream are animal-friendly.



</details><details><summary>CAN YOU MOVE YOUR SETS? DO YOU NEED A STAGE?</summary>A stage always looks better, but it’s not necessary for the band to perform. A minimum floor space of around 4 metres wide by 3 metres deep is advised.

Usually we propose more than one set, so, of course we can move. We can provide 3 separate setups (i.e. one for the ceremony, one for the aperitif and the other one for the party).



</details><details><summary>NEED STAGE LIGHTS?</summary>Lighting is recommended to create a focal point for the event, but not a necessity. Slipstream offer lighting of any size to suit any venue, but if you prefer to arrange this either directly with the venue, or with a 3rd party supplier, that’ll be okay.



</details><details><summary>ANYTHING WE SHOULD KNOW ABOUT POWER REQUIREMENTS?</summary>Our set up is based on the latest technology to reduce the power output as much as possible. A minimum of three main’s power sources is advised within 5 metres (Slipstream come equipped with all necessary extension cables under 5m).

Exact requirements change event to event, so please get in touch should you be unsure or require exact specifications.



</details><details><summary>HOW MANY EQUIPMENT SETUPS CAN YOU PROVIDE?</summary>We provide up to three full equipment & stage lighting setups. If your event is distributed on more than three different areas of the venue, our crew will take care of moving one or two sets from area "x" to area "y" and all your requests will be fulfilled.</details>

italian-riviera-swing-band.intro_html:
The Italian Riviera Swing Band – An Exquisite Ensemble of Refined Swing & Jazz, Based in Genoa, Italy

What discerning clients most admire about The Italian Riviera Swing Band: an impeccably curated jazz and swing ensemble featuring stunning female vocals, bespoke setlists, flexible line-ups, and polished performances for luxury weddings and exclusive events across Italy.
italian-riviera-swing-band.description_html:
The Italian Riviera Swing Band delivers international Swing and Jazz music with an elegant, sophisticated yet dynamic presence, captivating audiences of every provenance with effortless grace.

We are proud to be featured on FixTheMusic’s 18 Best Jazz Bands in Italy 🏆.

Comprising five of Italy’s most accomplished Pop and Jazz artists, the band presents a refined repertoire of freshly arranged Italian classics, timeless international standards, and contemporary hits.

Discover our curated selection of Italy's finest jazz bands ➡️

We are regularly commissioned for weddings and prestigious events at Velaa Private Island in the Maldives, Splendido Belmond Hotel in Portofino, and Borgo Santo Pietro in Tuscany, Italy.

Enquire about The Italian Riviera Swing Band 💬

Their sound masterfully balances vintage allure with contemporary jazz sensibilities, ensuring a broad appeal through uplifting rhythms, engaging melodies, and captivating vocal performances.

View our selection of Italy's best jazz bands ➡️

Indeed, this ensemble regularly performs for international audiences at destination weddings throughout Italy and at high-profile corporate events worldwide.

The lead vocalist performs in English, Italian, French, Spanish, Portuguese, and German, adding a layer of bespoke versatility.

Owing to its refined sound and sophisticated aesthetic, the band recently performed for Bvlgari in Amman, Jordan, and has previously delighted clientele such as Versace, Trussardi, Porsche, and Axpo.

Below is a selection of distinguished locations where we have been booked by clients through FixTheMusic for weddings and events:

  • Velaa Private Island, Maldives
  • Borgo Santo Pietro, Florence
  • La Foce, Siena, Italy
  • Splendido Belmond Hotel, Portofino
  • Castello di Rosciano, Perugia
  • Borgo Stomennano, Siena
  • Byblos Art Hotel Villa Amistà
  • Villa Mangiacane, Florence
  • Villa Necchi Campiglio, Milan
  • Dimora Ghirlandaio, Florence
  • Castello di Montignano, Perugia
  • Du Lac et Du Parc Grand Resort
  • Rome, Italy
  • Petrognano, Italy
  • Poggi del Sasso, Grosseto, Italy
  • Villa Durazzo, Genoa
  • Monaco
  • Santa Margherita Ligure
  • Misano Adriatico, Rimini, Italy

Through their exceptional artistry, these musicians provide impeccable live music tailored to the ambience of your event.

From refined cocktail receptions and elegant dinner background music to igniting the dance floor with vintage swing allure and culminating in up-tempo after-dinner performances of contemporary hits—all while preserving an atmosphere of refined elegance.

Led by a charismatic female vocalist evoking the timeless glamour of old-fashioned divas, this band is an essential addition to any luxurious, chic affair.

A selection of our esteemed clientele: Bulgari (Amman, Jordan), Huawei (Rome), Trussardi (Turin), Versace (Kyiv, Ukraine), Porsche (Florence), Axpo (Switzerland), AgustaWestland (Lake Maggiore).

A selection of prestigious venues where we have performed: Hotel De Paris (Monte Carlo), Belmond Splendido (Portofino), Casina Valadier (Rome), Chateaux Diter (Le Grasse, France), Four Seasons (Florence), Hotel Royal Evian (Switzerland), Villa d’Este (Lake Como), Villa San Giacomo (Positano), Oasi Olympia (Sorrento), Kempinski Palace San Clemente (Venice).

If you seek to hire the most exquisite jazz and swing ensemble the Italian Riviera has to offer, do not hesitate to contact us.

Ensemble

Female vocals, Piano, Sax, Double bass, Drums (also available in duo, trio, or quartet configurations—with vocals or purely instrumental).

Extra services

  • Possibility to add a percussionist to the band
  • Possibility to add a male singer to the band

Advised for

Luxury weddings, corporate events, gala dinners, yacht parties, luxury cruises, luxury hotel entertainment.

string-quartet-italy-sparkle-strings.intro_html:
Discover Sparkle Strings – An Exquisite String Quartet from Puglia, Italy

Sparkle Strings is a paragon of refined musical artistry, a bespoke string quartet dedicated to curating impeccable atmospheres for the world’s most discerning celebrations.

Forged through years of exceptional performances, this ensemble possesses a richly curated repertoire that seamlessly traverses eras and genres.

From timeless classical masterpieces to Bridgerton-era elegance, cinematic soundtracks, and exquisite contemporary selections, they offer a sublime auditory journey. This makes them the definitive choice for couples seeking the most refined wedding music Italy has to offer.

The quartet is a recurring presence at Italy’s most prestigious venues, including Villa Miani in Rome, Chiostro Dei Domenicani in Lecce, Villa Cenci in Cisternino, and Agriturismo Masseria Salamina in Brindisi.

Enquire About This Bespoke Ensemble
string-quartet-italy-sparkle-strings.description_html:
Based in the heart of Puglia, Sparkle Strings is regularly invited to perform across Italy and internationally for weddings, exclusive private soirées, and distinguished corporate gatherings.

Presented with impeccable style and sophistication, the ensemble elevates any occasion, transforming it into an unforgettable luxury experience.

Ideal for the most high-end celebrations, these consummate professionals bring a wealth of experience and meticulous skill, ensuring a flawless performance from the first note to the last.

The ensemble comprises an all-female formation of four violinists, or three violinists paired with a cellist. Their elegant presentation is enhanced by a bespoke wardrobe; a curated catalogue of stunning dresses is provided post-confirmation, allowing the visual aesthetic to harmonise exquisitely with the event’s palette and ambience.

✨ Explore their breathtaking 2026 Dress Collection. View the Curated Catalogue Here 🎵

The group’s performance is a curated spectacle, whether seated, standing, or elevated on podiums, ensuring a powerful visual and sonic impact that captivates guests.

Services typically encompass the ceremony and cocktail hour, followed by two to three theatrical shows during dinner or the reception, complete with a dress change. Inclusive of breaks, the ensemble can provide a sublime musical narrative spanning five to six hours.

Their repertoire is a meticulously crafted journey from classical elegance to vibrant pop and dance anthems, and they graciously accommodate special requests to personalise the experience.

An intimate violinist duo configuration is also available, perfect for ceremonies, cocktail hours, and refined dinner ambiances, maintaining the same standard of exquisite artistry.

Seamless logistical coordination, including audio services and travel arrangements, is managed with meticulous attention to detail. Although based in Puglia, the ensemble is available for engagements worldwide.

For those who seek to grace their event with one of Italy’s finest string quartets, the search ends with Sparkle Strings—an embodiment of sonic and visual perfection.

Follow Sparkle Strings on Facebook

jazz-band-forli-italy-blue-note-four.intro_html:
Blue Note Four – An Exquisite Jazz & Swing Ensemble, Based in Forlì Cesena, Italy

“A masterful fusion of refined elegance and spirited energy—flawless vocals, an impeccable atmosphere, and a seamless collaboration that discerning clients cherish.” — Curated testimonial from our most esteemed clientele.

Blue Note Four orchestrates a luminous convergence of an expressive, vibrant voice with the resonant warmth of a semi-acoustic guitar, the profound depth of a double bass, and the rhythmic finesse of percussion.

Explore the curated selection of jazz bands in Italy.

Allow yourself to be transported on an exquisite journey through the most celebrated jazz repertoire—from timeless classics to hidden gems, traversing swing, Latin, and soul—ensuring an evening of impeccably curated musical pleasure.

The ensemble is led by Annalisa, a supremely gifted vocalist from Forlì. She first garnered acclaim by winning the prestigious “Giovani Note” competition at the age of twenty, and has since graced stages throughout Emilia Romagna with her compelling artistry.

Additionally, peruse FixTheMusic’s handpicked selection of the finest jazz bands in Italy.

Our calendar is frequently adorned with bookings for weddings and exclusive celebrations at such esteemed venues as Villa Orlando on Lake Massaciuccoli in Tuscany, Castello di Vicarello in Grosseto, and Borgo Stomennano in Siena—among the most coveted destinations in Italy.

Inquire About Blue Note Four — Enquire Now
jazz-band-forli-italy-blue-note-four.description_html:
The band graced the stage of the “Le Cantaisse” Festival in April 2023, an event curated by the esteemed Michele Minisci (formerly director of Forlì’s “Naima” venue).

The ensemble offers a bespoke configuration—available as a Duo, Trio, or Quartet—commencing with vocal and guitar and expanding seamlessly to meet the client’s vision. This flexibility has established Blue Note Four as one of the most sought-after wedding bands in Italy.

Nahuel, the guitarist—an Italian-Argentine virtuoso born in 1989—has captivated audiences as a soloist at illustrious gatherings including the “Artusi Jazz Festival,” the “Tenerife Blues Festival,” and numerous other prestigious events.

Enrico, on double bass, and Manuel, on drums, complete this refined ensemble. Every musician has performed both domestically and internationally, sharing the stage with renowned artists from across the globe.

Presented below is a selection of the distinguished venues where Blue Note Four has been engaged by discerning clients for weddings and events, as booked through FixTheMusic:

prodigal-duo-wedding-band-italy.intro_html:
The Prodigal Duo – an exquisitely curated, bespoke musical ensemble rooted in the heart of Tuscany, Italy.

What discerning clientele most revere: impeccable live vocals and masterful guitar artistry, an atmosphere of refined celebration, and seamless, personalized communication. Many couples acclaim them as the single most impeccable decision of their nuptial celebration.

The Prodigal Duo represents the pinnacle of professional musicianship, having performed thousands of concerts across the most prestigious venues in Italy and Europe.

View the complete collection of wedding bands in Tuscany

It is a rare and refined privilege to discover a duo of two virtuosic vocalists and two exceptional guitarists such as The Prodigal Duo.

With a vast and meticulously curated repertoire, the ensemble is in high demand for the most exclusive events, from opulent weddings and corporate galas to intimate private soirées and festivals.

We are honored to be recognized on FixTheMusic's 28 Best Wedding Bands in Italy 🏆

Clientele who have enquired with The Prodigal Duo have also expressed interest in these similarly refined ensembles:

  1. Trio Toscano
  2. Forever Young Duo
  3. Bellissimo Duo
  4. The Florence Acoustic Duo

The duo frequently collaborates with an accomplished saxophonist, forming an exquisite "Tuscan trio" that is the epitome of sophisticated wedding entertainment.

We are regularly booked to perform at the most illustrious estates, including Borgo Corsignano in Arezzo, La Pescaia Resort in Grosseto, and the magnificent Villa Cora in Florence.

Enquire with The Prodigal Duo 💬

Drawing from decades of refined musical mastery, The Prodigal Duo can gracefully collaborate with other esteemed Tuscan musicians, orchestrating a bespoke ensemble tailored to the grandest of visions. The trio configuration, elevated by the introduction of an exquisite saxophonist, stands as a sublime example of this curated flexibility.

View our curated selection of Italy's finest wedding bands ➡️

The Prodigal Duo possesses the acumen to curate and conduct every sonic nuance of the wedding reception, offering a repertoire that caters to the most refined palate—from delicate instrumental whispers during the aperitif to vibrant live performances through luncheon and into an evening of dance.

They represent the perfect synergy of live music and sophisticated entertainment for your wedding day or private celebration in Italy.

With over twenty years of experience performing at weddings, The Prodigal Duo has been revered by discerning Italian couples and international clientele alike, who have chosen Italy as the sublime backdrop for their love story.

We are further honored to be listed on FixTheMusic's 21 Best Wedding Bands in Tuscany 🏆

Their musical anthology reads as a journey through nearly a century of history, a curated collection of hits spanning from the evocative 1930s to the contemporary chart-toppers of today. They possess an extensive selection of dance music, particularly from the golden eras of the 50s, 60s, and 70s through to the present day, masterfully traversing Latin American rhythms, rhythm and blues, soul, and rock 'n' roll.

The duo's collection proudly features the timeless classics of Italian tradition, including the deeply moving melodies of Neapolitan music. The bride and groom are invited to commission their most cherished composition, which the duo will masterfully perform, regardless of its presence in their existing catalogue of over 500 songs.

Among its suite of bespoke services, the duo offers a refined DJ set to seamlessly extend the celebration, or even karaoke for an element of playful, personalized entertainment.

Our artistry has been showcased at an array of Italy's most breathtaking and exclusive venues, including:

Celestial Groovers – An Exquisite Tuscany-Based Wedding & Party Ensemble

Nestled in the heart of Tuscany, Celestial Groovers stands as a truly refined wedding and party band, dedicated to delivering impeccably curated entertainment for life’s most distinguished celebrations. From exclusive weddings to bespoke private soirées and corporate galas, this ensemble of highly accomplished musicians brings an unrivaled level of artistry and professionalism to every engagement, gracing venues across the region—and beyond—with an unforgettable performance.

Recognised on FixTheMusic’s prestigious guide to the Best Wedding Bands in Italy 🏆, Celestial Groovers invites you to preview their extraordinary artistry in the video below, offering a glimpse into the exquisite experience they create. They are frequently engaged for celebrations at the elegant Agrisalotto Agriturismo & Ristorante in Arezzo and the magnificent Villa Medicea di Lilliano in Florence.

Inquire About Celestial Groovers
wedding-band-tuscany-celestial-groovers.description_html:
Celestial Groovers offers a bespoke, customisable ensemble, meticulously adapted to the unique atmosphere of your event. A male vocalist may be gracefully added upon request. The refined line-ups include:

  • Quintet: Female Vocals, Keyboard, Guitar, Bass & Drums
  • Sextet: Female Vocals, Keyboard, Guitar, Bass, Drums & Saxophone
  • Septet & Octet: Female Vocals, Keyboard, Guitar, Bass, Drums, Saxophone, Trumpet & Trombone

With years of impeccable experience, the band masterfully traverses genres and styles, shifting seamlessly from timeless, elegant wedding melodies to high-energy sets that command the dancefloor. Whether you desire a plugged-in spectacle or an unplugged, acoustically intimate performance, Celestial Groovers harmonises perfectly with the tone of your occasion.

For those seeking an extra layer of sophistication, the ensemble can also present enchanting jazz and swing performances, leaving guests utterly captivated. Additionally, they offer the option to perform alongside a DJ, weaving an exclusive and dynamic element into your celebration.

Should you wish to engage one of Tuscany’s most distinguished wedding bands, look no further than Celestial Groovers. We invite you to reach out today and begin curating your unforgettable evening.

principals-band-benevento-italy.intro_html:
The Principals — An Exquisite Wedding & Party Ensemble, Based in Benevento, Campania, Italy

What discerning clients most cherished: an impeccably high-energy presence, guests swept into song and dance, a curated selection of brilliant songs, refined crowd engagement, a seamless transition from cocktail elegance to spirited celebration, a dance floor that never falters, professionalism with effortless flexibility — and a resounding recommendation.

Introducing The Principals, a refined four-piece ensemble rooted in Benevento, Italy, celebrated for their vintage Italian sound, artfully infused with a captivating and utterly entertaining style.

Discover the complete collection of wedding bands in Italy on FixTheMusic.

Specialising in weddings, galas, and private soirées, their bespoke repertoire spans Italian classics, international hits, with delicate accents of rumba and Neapolitan flair.

We are honoured to be featured on FixTheMusic's 28 Best Wedding Bands in Italy 🏆

The Principals are regularly booked to perform at exquisite venues such as Villa Corsini a Mezzomonte in Florence and Cantina Masicei in Vibo Valentia, Italy.

Enquire with The Principals 💬
principals-band-benevento-italy.description_html:
Comprising a singer-guitarist, drummer, bassist, and a virtuoso on electric guitar and violin, The Principals orchestrate a dynamic musical journey—transitioning from an atmosphere of romantic refinement to igniting the dance floor with impeccable energy.

They offer acoustic roaming performances to warmly welcome guests, as well as a live amplified set that elevates the evening, inspiring everyone to dance during or after dinner.

During intermissions, curated background music is provided, and a microphone is available for speeches should the occasion demand it.

Their repertoire is a charming fusion of international and classic Italian melodies, resonating with a global audience, with the option to include elegant jazzy instrumental pieces upon request.

Should you desire, they can perform a roaming set throughout the entire dinner, ensuring every moment is suffused with music.

What distinguishes their roaming act is the use of compact, battery-powered amplifiers. They perform a few songs in one refined spot, then move to another, offering each guest a personal, intimate encounter with the music.

Roaming is ideally suited for aperitifs where guests mingle in a garden or upon a terrace. For a dinner setting, however, a fixed concert format may be preferred—featuring music between courses and culminating in a lively set that commands the dance floor.

I Naples Swing Band sono un gruppo di musicisti professionisti nel settore wedding ed eventi.

Disponibili in duo, trio, quartetto, quintetto, o in altre formazioni estese, i Naples Swing Band si adattano alle vostre preferenze e alle esigenze del luogo e dell'evento, passando facilmente da una formazione ridotta a una estesa, ospitando altri musicisti.

naples-swing-band-italy.faq_html:
<details><summary>What does the wedding package include?</summary>Installation & disassembly of the system(s), live music and recorded music between sets, customizable repertoire according to requests or needs, personalization of the playlist for the disco.



</details><details><summary>How far in advance should I get in touch with you?</summary>Typically with 3 to 4 months' notice. But if we are available, even up to a week in advance.



</details><details><summary>Size of band?</summary>Small (2-3 musicians), medium (4-6 musicians), large (more than 6 musicians).



</details><details><summary>Repertoire?</summary>Repertoire that ranges from jazz standards to popular songs from the international repertoire, to the classics of the Italian, Bossanova and Portuguese tradition. Flexible with the possibility of requests.



</details><details><summary>Can I ask for songs not included in the repertoire?</summary>We accept songs as long as there is time to prepare them (a couple of months is ideal).



</details><details><summary>Experience?</summary>For over three years active with numerous live between private events and concerts.



</details><details><summary>Are you able to travel to our event?</summary>Yes, absolutely. It is something we do regularly.



</details><details><summary>Is there a surcharge for travel?</summary>Yes, the cost of travel and any overnight stay.



</details><details><summary>Can you perform at more than one wedding per day?</summary>Yes.



</details><details><summary>How long does the performance last?</summary>The entire duration of the event, dividing the performance into several sets.



</details><details><summary>How long do you need to prepare the performance?</summary>About two hours.



</details><details><summary>Do you perform outdoors?</summary>Yes



</details><details><summary>Cosa include il pack matrimonio?</summary>Montaggio/Smontaggio impianto/i, Musica Live e Filodiffusione, Repertorio personalizzabile in base a richieste o esigenze, Personalizzazione della playlist per la filo diffusione.



</details><details><summary>Con quanto anticipo mi devo mettere in contatto con te?</summary>In genere con un preavviso di 3/4 mesi. Ma se siamo disponibili, anche fino ad una settimana di anticipo.



</details><details><summary>Grandezza della formazione?</summary>Piccola (2-3 musicisti), media (4-6 musicisti), grande (più di 6 musicisti).



</details><details><summary>Repertorio?</summary>Repertorio che spazia dagli standard jazz, ai brani popolari del repertorio internazionale,fino ai classici della tradizione italiana,bossanova e portoghese. Flessibile con possibilità di richieste.



</details><details><summary>Posso chiedere dei brani non inseriti nel repertorio?</summary>Accettiamo brani purchè ci sia il tempo materiale per prepararli.



</details><details><summary>Esperienza?</summary>Da oltre tre anni attivi con numerosissimi live tra eventi privati e concerti.



</details><details><summary>Hai bisogno di un materiale in concreto o di specifiche condizioni per poter offrire il servizio?</summary>No.



</details><details><summary>Hai la possibilità di effettuare delle trasferte?</summary>Sì, assolutamente si, è una cosa che svolgiamo regolarmente.



</details><details><summary>Esiste un sovrapprezzo in caso di trasferta?</summary>Sì, le spese del viaggio e dell'eventuale pernottamento.



</details><details><summary>Lavori per più di un matrimonio al giorno?</summary>Sì.



</details><details><summary>Quanto tempo dura l'esibizione?</summary>Tutta la durata dell'evento, dividendo la performance in più "set".



</details><details><summary>Di quanto tempo hai bisogno per preparare l'esibizione?</summary>Due ore circa.



</details><details><summary>Realizzi esibizioni all'aperto?</summary>Sì.</details>

city-movers-rome-italy.intro_html:
The City Movers – An Exquisite Musical Atelier Based in Rome, Italy

The City Movers represent the pinnacle of refined live entertainment in the Italian capital. Their impeccably smooth sound and sophisticated groove possess an effortless ability to curate the perfect ambiance for the most discerning clientele.

An exquisite fusion of soul, funk, R&B, pop, and rock, their performance is built upon a powerful, elegant rhythmic foundation and a polished, contemporary energy. This bespoke musical offering is ideally suited for exclusive weddings, distinguished corporate galas, and the most intimate private soirees.

Comprised of masterful musicians with rich backgrounds in jazz and contemporary composition, The City Movers were meticulously assembled with a singular focus: delivering an unparalleled event experience.

Contact The City Movers 💬
city-movers-rome-italy.description_html:
Their entire ethos is guided by an unwavering commitment to bespoke flexibility and impeccable quality. From elegant, unobtrusive background melodies to high-energy live sets that captivate and engage, they intuitively navigate the narrative arc of your celebration.

This refined attention to detail has swiftly established them as a coveted choice among Rome’s most prestigious venues, where their flawless execution consistently earns acclaim.

Offering a fully customizable configuration, the ensemble can be curated to suit events of any grandeur—from an intimate duo to a grand, full-scale orchestration.

Their repertoire gracefully encompasses key ceremonial moments through to full-day wedding entertainment. Live performances, curated background playlists, and vibrant party sets are all meticulously coordinated to ensure a seamless and elevated flow.

Supplied with their own state-of-the-art sound and lighting systems, they are also delighted to accommodate bespoke requests, including first dances or personally meaningful compositions.

Whether performing in a palatial indoor setting or an enchanting outdoor locale, The City Movers bring an air of relaxed confidence and consummate professionalism to every affair.

Their ultimate objective is elegantly simple: to create a sublime, unforgettable atmosphere and a bespoke soundtrack that perfectly harmonizes with your vision.

Curated Line-Up Options:

  • Duo Basic: A refined pairing of vocalist and guitarist, complemented by tasteful playback.
  • Basic Band: A sophisticated quartet of vocalist, bass, drums, and guitar, enhanced by premium playback.
  • Full Band: An opulent quintet of vocalist, bass, drums, guitar, and keyboard, performed entirely live for an authentic auditory experience.
    Optional Enhancements: Exquisite additions of saxophone, a bespoke DJ set, or elegant violin.

acoustic-duo-perugia-bellissimo.intro_html:
Bellissimo Duo – An Exquisite Acoustic Ensemble, Based in the Heart of Perugia, Italy

Comprising two impeccably talented vocalists, Bellissimo Duo represents the pinnacle of refined acoustic artistry, cultivated through years of distinguished industry experience.

Discover our curated selection of Italy's most sought-after wedding musicians.

This exquisite unplugged duo delivers an impeccable performance, drawing from a bespoke repertoire that gracefully traverses diverse eras and genres.

The ensemble is delighted to travel extensively across Italy, offering their refined artistry for the most exclusive weddings, private soirees, and distinguished corporate gatherings.

Explore our handpicked portfolio of Italy's finest acoustic duos ➡️

Preview our forthcoming 2026 curated setlist.

We are privileged to be a recurring presence at Italy’s most prestigious venues, including the Belmond Hotel Caruso on the Amalfi Coast, Marula Bagno Golfo in Grosseto, and the Dievole Wine Resort in Castelnuovo Berardenga.

Inquire about an exclusive booking with Bellissimo Duo
acoustic-duo-perugia-bellissimo.description_html:
Fluent in Italian, English, and Spanish, this versatile duo commands a sophisticated, multilingual repertoire. Their curated set features history’s most beloved international anthems, from Stevie Wonder and Michael Jackson to Ed Sheeran, Bruno Mars, Christina Aguilera, and Coldplay.

Discover more exquisite acoustic ensembles across Italy ➡️

While Bellissimo Duo typically performs as an intimate duo, discerning clients may request the addition of supplementary musicians to cultivate a more vibrant and rhythmically rich atmosphere. The ensemble possesses its own state-of-the-art equipment, selected for its impeccable quality and suitability for high-end wedding celebrations.

For those who seek nothing less than Italy’s most refined acoustic experience, Bellissimo Duo awaits your inquiry.

Follow the journey of Bellissimo Duo on Facebook and Instagram 📸

In Italiano

Bellissimo Duo è un duo di straordinaria raffinatezza, composto da chitarra e voce maschile, impreziosita da una voce femminile.

Questi due giovani musicisti, la cui carriera fiorisce nel panorama musicale internazionale, trasformeranno il vostro matrimonio in un evento di armonia e raffinata qualità, con esibizioni interamente dal vivo che spaziano con eleganza dagli anni '80 ai giorni nostri.

Il loro repertorio su misura attinge ai più grandi artisti internazionali, tra cui Stevie Wonder, Ed Sheeran, Bruno Mars, Michael Jackson, Christina Aguilera e Coldplay.

Bellissimo Duo si esibisce generalmente in duo, ma su richiesta è possibile aggiungere uno o più musicisti per creare un'atmosfera dal ritmo avvolgente. La band dispone di attrezzatura propria, altamente professionale e selezionata appositamente per matrimoni di alto livello.
