In Italiano

Ponte Vecchio Jazz Band è un progetto musicale d’élite, concepito da tre professionisti che, con passione squisita, carisma innato ed energia vibrante, animeranno il vostro ricevimento nuziale con un’eleganza impeccabile e un coinvolgimento su misura. L’idea è quella di vivere un’esperienza nuova, lontana dalla musica tradizionale, per deliziare gli ospiti con un tocco di originalità senza pari.

Stefano al pianoforte, Simone alla batteria e Andrea al contrabbasso saranno i vostri musicisti personali per un giorno, interamente a vostra disposizione e sempre pronti ad offrirvi una performance spettacolare e raffinata, che conquisterà ogni ospite.

Ponte Vecchio Jazz Band vi offre un repertorio curato e variegato, spaziando dai grandi classici italiani ai capolavori internazionali, sapientemente rivisitati in chiave pop, rock o jazz. Ogni esibizione è pensata per essere un'esperienza unica, personalizzata e creativamente innovativa.

jazz-band-florence-italy-ponte-vecchio.faq_html:
<details><summary>What does the wedding package include?</summary>The package includes the preparation of your own instrumentation (digital piano, drums and double bass), amplification if necessary. Live music during and after the reception.



</details><details><summary>How far in advance do I need to get in touch with you?</summary>At least two weeks, preferably a month in advance.



</details><details><summary>Size of group?</summary>Small (2-3 musicians).



</details><details><summary>Repertoire?</summary>Jazz standard pieces suitable for the reception of guests and during the aperitif. Italian and foreign pop / rock songs to have fun and entertain after the reception.



</details><details><summary>Can I ask for songs not included in the repertoire?</summary>On request, the spouses can insert pieces of their life in our lineup to accompany the most significant moments such as the bride and groom's entrance, the cutting of the cake and the first dance.



</details><details><summary>Experience?</summary>Decades of experience in weddings and private events. Our trio is made up of professional musicians.



</details><details><summary>Do you have your own equipment?</summary>Yes.



</details><details><summary>Do you need particular material or specific conditions in order to offer the service?</summary>No.



</details><details><summary>How far do you travel?</summary>We travel throughout the Tuscany region.



</details><details><summary>Is there a fee for travel?</summary>Yes.



</details><details><summary>Do you perform at more than one wedding per day?</summary>No.



</details><details><summary>How long does the performance last?</summary>The duration of the performance is to be agreed according to your needs.



</details><details><summary>How long do you need to prepare for the performance?</summary>The minimum time for setting up the instrumentation is 1 hour.



</details><details><summary>Do you do outdoor performances?</summary>Yes.



</details><details><summary>Cosa include il pack matrimonio?</summary>Il pacchetto include l'allestimento della propria strumentazione (pianoforte digitale, batteria e contrabbasso), amplificazione se necessaria. Musica live durante e dopo il ricevimento.



</details><details><summary>Con quanto anticipo mi devo mettere in contatto con te?</summary>Almeno due settimane, preferibilmente un mese di anticipo.



</details><details><summary>Grandezza della formazione?</summary>Piccola (2-3 musicisti).



</details><details><summary>Repertorio?</summary>Brani standard jazz adatti al ricevimento degli ospiti e durante l'aperitivo. Brani pop/rock italiani e stranieri per divertirsi e intrattenere dopo il ricevimento.



</details><details><summary>Posso chiedere dei brani non inseriti nel repertorio?</summary>A richiesta gli sposi possono inserire dei brani della loro vita nella nostra scaletta per accompagnare i momenti più significativi quali l'ingresso degli sposi, il taglio della torta e il primo ballo.



</details><details><summary>Esperienza?</summary>Esperienza decennale in matrimoni ed eventi privati. Trio è composto da musicisti professionisti.



</details><details><summary>Disponi di strumentazione propria?</summary>Sì.



</details><details><summary>Hai bisogno di materiale particolare o di specifiche condizioni per poter offrire il servizio?</summary>No.



</details><details><summary>Hai la possibilità di effettuare delle trasferte?</summary>Sì, regione Toscana.



</details><details><summary>Esiste un sovrapprezzo in caso di trasferta?</summary>Sì.



</details><details><summary>Lavori per più di un matrimonio al giorno?</summary>No.



</details><details><summary>Lavori da solo o con un'equipe di professionisti?</summary>Da solo.



</details><details><summary>Quanto tempo dura l'esibizione?</summary>La durata dell'esibizione è da concordate in base alle esigenze degli sposi.



</details><details><summary>Di quanto tempo hai bisogno per preparare l'esibizione?</summary>Il tempo minimo per l'allestimento della strumentazione è di 1 ora.



</details><details><summary>Realizzi esibizioni all'aperto?</summary>Sì.</details>

wedding-party-dj-milan-italy.intro_html:
About The Milan DJ – An Exquisite Curator of Sound for Refined Celebrations, Based in Milan, Italy

Since 2008, The Milan DJ has delivered impeccably crafted live sets for the world’s most discerning events, private soirées, and exclusive clubs. Her repertoire spans house, hip-hop, deep, and mash-up genres, performed at presentations, private gatherings, and Vogue Nights with unparalleled finesse. She has graced the Grelka and Boogel Woogel festivals as a special guest—each drawing over 100,000 spectators—cementing her reputation as a master of the dance floor. Her magnetic presence and flawless intuition for a party’s rhythm elevate every occasion into a bespoke luxury experience. I am regularly engaged to perform at weddings and high-profile events at Fiera Milano.

Enquire About The Milan DJ

Originally from Russia and raised in Siberia, The Milan DJ began her ascent as a resident DJ in one of Siberia’s most prestigious clubs. Her renown blossomed rapidly, leading to performances across the globe; for five consecutive years, she was crowned “Best Female DJ of Siberia.” This triumph preceded an exclusive tour through Russia and Siberia, where she captivated dancefloors throughout the night and earned the devotion of her audience.

Relocating to Milan in 2014, she made an indelible impression at weddings, private events, and elite venues such as Just Cavalli, Vibe Room, LimeLight, House Cafe, Hollywood Ritmoteque, Old Fashion, Terrazza Duomo 21, and many more. Since then, her curated presence has illuminated cities including Milan, Paris, Florence, Stresa, Venice, Palermo, Moscow, Samara, Lugano, and Geneva—each engagement a testament to her refined artistry.

For those seeking an all-encompassing DJ to orchestrate an unforgettable event, The Milan DJ offers an impeccable, exclusive experience.

tenore-lucca-italy.intro_html:
Il Tenore — an exquisite tenor and opera singer of unparalleled refinement, based in the illustrious city of Lucca, Italy.

Born in Viareggio, Il Tenore discovered his profound passion for music and song at an early age. Though destiny first charted a different course, his devotion to opera never waned. At 42, he was personally auditioned by Maestro Delfo Menicucci of the G. Verdi Conservatory in Milan—a moment that inaugurated a bespoke professional journey into the world of lyric art.

Explore the full, curated collection of wedding music Italy has to offer.

In 2014, he joined the chorus of the celebrated Puccini Festival as principal tenor, gracing numerous opera seasons with his presence and assuming distinguished solo roles. This refined artistry quickly attracted acclaim both within Italy and abroad, leading to debuts as Manrico and the Duke of Mantua at the Teatro del Casino in Sanremo, followed by Cavaradossi in Tosca.

Discover more opera singers in Italy

Il Tenore is regularly engaged for weddings and exclusive events at the impeccable San Pietro Sopra Le Acque Resort in Perugia and the distinguished Soho House in Rome.

Enquire with Il Tenore 💬

The subsequent years witnessed his career flourish with exceptional grace. His compelling stage presence and powerful, refined voice earned him national recognition in 2017, when his participation in the television programme Tu si que vales culminated in a second-place finish and widespread acclaim. Since then, he has been a regular performer with the Puccini e la sua Lucca Festival, gracing prestigious venues including London, the Musikverein in Vienna, and Buckingham Palace.

Recent seasons have included a series of solo performances across Europe—from Monte Carlo to the Isle of Wight—as well as major concerts in Lucca, Florence, and La Spezia. His ever-expanding repertoire marries classical mastery with profound emotional depth.

Since 2024, Il Tenore has extended his artistry into the world of weddings, where his performances imbue each celebration with elegance, passion, and timeless beauty. He is now available to hire as a tenor and opera singer for weddings in Italy.

tenore-lucca-italy.faq_html:
<details><summary>What are your normal set lengths?</summary>- Usually it is three sets, divided during dinner, which include 2/3 songs each set

</details><details><summary>Do you have different line-up options?</summary>- No

</details><details><summary>Do you provide your own sound & lighting equipment? What is it or what's included in the price?</summary>- No, I rely on the music service present at the party, I just need a microphone and the playback of the backing tracks that I have on a USB stick.

</details><details><summary>Do you provide a laptop playlist / DJ service in between and after your live sets?</summary>- No

</details><details><summary>What time do you normally arrive at the venue to set up?</summary>- Usually 90 minutes before the performance starts. 

</details><details><summary>How long does it take for you to set up, sound check etc?</summary>- Around 10 minutes

</details><details><summary>Can you learn song requests (e.g. a first dance)?</summary>- With notice in advance, yes.

</details><details><summary>How much space do you need for your performance area?</summary>- I don't require a specific space, I love going around the tables and trying to involve people

</details><details><summary>Are you comfortable performing outdoors or in unusual settings (e.g. barns, beaches)?</summary>- As long as amplification can be provided, I can perform anywhere.</details>

Nestled within the eternal allure of Rome, where ancient grandeur meets modern refinement, resides Silver Screen—a meticulously curated four-piece ensemble devoted to transforming weddings and private events into unparalleled experiences.

Offering an impeccably crafted full-day musical journey, Silver Screen elevates each moment from the sacred to the celebratory with seamless elegance.

The band’s hallmark is its captivating duo, celebrated for their masterful interpretation of cinematic scores.

This refined pairing serenades guests through the ceremony, aperitif, and dinner, weaving each interlude into a cinematic reverie—intimate, nostalgic, and utterly enchanting.

Yet Silver Screen’s artistry extends far beyond the romantic. As twilight descends and the celebration intensifies, the full band commands the stage.

Their repertoire spans an exquisite spectrum: from pop to soul, rock to jazz, blues to funk.

Silver Screen is more than a band—they are the maestros of your personal soundtrack, transforming your event into a sublime, music-filled odyssey.

italy-hot-jazz-band.intro_html:
About The Italy Hot Jazz Band – An Exquisite Jazz Ensemble Based in Tuscany, Italy

The Italy Hot Jazz Band stands as a celebrated Dixieland ensemble, born in the heart of Florence. We are engaged for an exclusive selection of weddings, luxury celebrations, festivals, Tuscan sagras, and private soirées throughout Italy, delivering a refined musical experience that transcends the ordinary.

We are proud to be featured on FixTheMusic's 17 Best Jazz Bands in Italy 🏆, a testament to our impeccable artistry. Our ensemble is regularly booked for weddings and distinguished events at Casa Cornacchi Country House in Arezzo and Dimora Buonriposo Hotel in Siena, among other bespoke venues.

Enquire with The Italy Hot Jazz Band
italy-hot-jazz-band.description_html:
Our musicians, many of whom honed their craft in other esteemed ensembles, now unite as a curated collective of nine virtuosos. For more intimate occasions, our versatile formation can be refined to just four performers, each note imbued with the same mastery.

Discover our curated selection of Italy's finest jazz bands ➡️

Our purpose is to revive the authentic textures and melodies of traditional jazz as played by its founders in the 1920s and 1930s. The greatest reward comes when we perform in grand piazzas: watching the reticent begin to move, first their feet, then their whole being, or meeting a guest who cherishes the magic moments spent drifting back through time.

Below are just a few of the illustrious locations where clients have secured our services on FixTheMusic for weddings and events:

  • Casa Cornacchi Country House
  • Dimora Buonriposo, Sarteano
  • Villa Le Fontanelle, Florence
  • Conti Thun Wine Resort
  • Il Verreno Resort, Arezzo
  • Falconiere Relais & Spa, Arezzo
  • Borgo Sant'Ambrogio
  • Fiera Milano
  • Villa Lungomonte, Pisa
  • Poppi, Italy
  • Terranuova Bracciolini, Arezzo

If you seek to engage the most distinguished jazz band Italy has to offer, we invite you to connect with The Italy Hot Jazz Band.

Follow us on Facebook and Instagram 📸

In Italiano

Se desiderate rendere il vostro matrimonio unico con un intrattenimento musicale ricercato ed elegante, dal gusto inedito e originale, la Italy Hot Jazz Band è la scelta ideale. Un'affermata dixie band composta da talentuosi musicisti, in grado di animare con raffinatezza il vostro giorno più prezioso.

Proponiamo musica jazz new orleans, più comunemente denominata dixieland. Traendo ispirazione dai sound anni '20, '30 e '40, si tratta di un jazz ballabile che si avvicina molto alle sonorità swing. Essendo estremamente versatili, su richiesta possiamo trasformarci in una band blues-rockabilly-anni '60.

La formazione sarà composta da quattro a nove musicisti, a seconda delle vostre preferenze. Banjo, tromba, contrabbasso, sax e l'emozionante voce di Sybil, la nostra cantante statunitense, vi accompagneranno lungo tutta la giornata delle vostre nozze.

</details><details><summary>Con quanto anticipo mi devo mettere in contatto con te?</summary>Per quanto riguarda i matrimonio o i grandi eventi dovremmo avere un buon preavviso di almeno 3/4 mesi.

</details><details><summary>Posso chiedere dei brani non inseriti nel repertorio?</summary>Sì, con un anticipo di un mese si possono preparare nuovi brani suonati nel nostro stile.



</details><details><summary>Esperienza?</summary>Esperienza nel settore.



</details><details><summary>Disponi di strumentazione propria?</summary>Sì.



</details><details><summary>Hai bisogno di un materiale in concreto o di specifiche condizioni per poter offrire il servizio?</summary>No.



</details><details><summary>Hai la possibilità di effettuare delle trasferte?</summary>Sì, ovunque in tutto il mondo! Suoniamo spesso da sud a nord Italia e capita di essere reclutati anche in USA.



</details><details><summary>Esiste un sovrapprezzo in caso di trasferta?</summary>Sì, dipende dalla trasferta.



</details><details><summary>Lavori per più di un matrimonio al giorno?</summary>No.



</details><details><summary>Lavori da solo o con un'equipe di professionisti?</summary>In equipe.



</details><details><summary>Quanto tempo dura l'esibizione?</summary>Dalle 2 alle 3 ore.



</details><details><summary>Di quanto tempo hai bisogno per preparare l'esibizione?</summary>1/2 ora.



</details><details><summary>Realizzi esibizioni all'aperto?</summary>Sì.



</details><details><summary>Che altri tipi di servizio offri?</summary>Disponiamo di vari impianti personali per amplificare i nostri eventi. Inoltre possibilità extra di musica DJ con Pc e compilations.</details>

bologna-jazz-band-italy.intro_html:
The Bologna Jazz Band – An Exquisitely Curated Musical Experience for Your Wedding

Based in the cultural heart of Bologna, The Bologna Jazz Band is helmed by an impeccably refined female pianist and vocalist, whose artistry embodies both luminous vitality and sophisticated grace. The ensemble curates a sound that is effortlessly elegant, offering a seamless musical narrative that elevates every cherished moment of a wedding celebration. Their presence is one of impeccable timing and seamless discretion—enriching each nuance of the day without ever intruding upon its intimacy.

We cordially invite you to inquire within to secure this bespoke musical engagement for your most exclusive event.

View our curated selection of Italy’s most distinguished jazz ensembles.

The ensemble is frequently engaged for the most refined celebrations at historic residences, including Rocca Isolani in Bologna, Hotel Papadopoli in Venice, and Agriturismo Villa Le Bolli in Siena.

Enquire About The Bologna Jazz Band
bologna-jazz-band-italy.description_html:
The artistic director—a pianist and vocalist of extraordinary depth—leads with a refined yet vibrant presence. Her repertoire, cultivated over a decade of distinguished performances, is a rich tapestry of American and Italian standards, blues, pop, rock, and cinematic masterpieces. Each piece is reimagined through a lens of signature elegance that honors the original essence while imbuing it with new vitality. The musical journey is completely bespoke: the setlist is meticulously curated in collaboration with the couple, intuitively woven to reflect their unique story and the atmosphere of their day. Every performance is entirely live, utilizing no pre-recorded tracks, ensuring an authentic and organic soundscape.

Beyond the core duo—often enhanced by her brother, a virtuoso trumpeter and guitarist—the formation expands seamlessly for grand galas. A rhythm section of double bass and drums, performed by distinguished session musicians with a celebrated discography, is added for live sets. A sumptuous violin can be incorporated for the ceremony, lending an air of timeless romance. The ensemble can oversee the complete sonic landscape of the wedding: from the ceremony and welcome aperitif to the grand reception and cake cutting. Should the celebration extend, an elegant DJ set can be woven effortlessly into the evening’s narrative.

Her distinguished career includes collaborations with esteemed entities such as MSC Cruises, Rossetti Entertainment, and numerous theaters and jazz festivals, underscoring a standard of excellence that is truly unparalleled.

Here are some of the distinguished destinations where the ensemble has been exclusively booked for weddings and events:

  • Rocca Isolani, Bologna
  • Hotel Papadopoli, Venice
  • Agriturismo Villa Le Bolli, Siena
  • Parco Principi Grand Hotel, Rome
  • Villa Alberico, Rome
  • Villa Sarah, San Gimignano
  • Piacenza, Emilia-Romagna
  • Montestigliano, Siena
  • Lago d’Iseo, Lombardy

For further guidance on securing the perfect musical accompaniment for your occasion, consult our bespoke guide to hiring wedding bands in Bologna.

wedding-dj-sicily-giuseppe.intro_html:
About DJ Giuseppe – An Artisan of Atmosphere for Refined Celebrations, Based in Sicily

For several distinguished years, DJ Giuseppe has been the maestro behind an array of exquisite weddings and events across Sicily. His innate discernment for the subtle shifts in mood ensures an impeccably curated journey on the dance floor, captivating guests from the first note to the final bow.

Based in the cultural heart of Palermo, DJ Giuseppe is in exceptional demand for those seeking an unparalleled musical experience at Italy's most prestigious venues. His calendar is consistently reserved for celebrations at the illustrious Tenuta Savoca in Sicily, a testament to his esteemed standing among discerning clientele.

Contact DJ Giuseppe 💬
wedding-dj-sicily-giuseppe.description_html:
DJ Giuseppe invites you to entrust him with your most cherished celebration, weaving a sonic tapestry that is both uniquely captivating and exquisitely romantic. His sound is a refined blend of energy and elegance, designed to elevate your reception into a truly memorable experience.

View our exclusive selection of Italy's most sought-after wedding DJs ➡️

Place your trust in the professionalism and refined artistry of DJ Giuseppe, and be assured of a celebration that resonates with sophistication and joy.

Bespoke Services

A fully customized and comprehensive service is personally curated for each client. Beyond the impeccable musical journey of the banquet, DJ Giuseppe offers refined animation, adding a distinctive and delightful touch to every moment of your affair.

Exquisite Repertoire

The meticulously crafted repertoire traverses the golden eras of Italian and international melodies, masterfully blending timeless classics from the '70s, '80s, and '90s with contemporary sophistication. His extensive command of every genre ensures the dance floor remains a vibrant celebration for guests of all generations.

Performance & Technical Excellence

DJ Giuseppe deploys a selection of state-of-the-art equipment, meticulously maintained for uncompromising performance and aesthetic harmony.

  • A premium sound system featuring speakers delivering 750-watt RMS to 1400-watt Peak, ensuring pristine audio fidelity.
  • An elegant white wedding stand, adorned with pristine white truss covers, creating a visually stunning centerpiece.
  • State-of-the-art intelligent lighting with ADJ R1 or Soundsation R7 moving heads.
  • 2 PAR LEDs integrated within the truss cover, complemented by an LED bar for a fully immersive ambient glow.
  • A 55-inch 4K Smart TV for bespoke visual presentations.
  • A precisely controlled fog machine to enhance the luminosity of the lighting design.
  • Professional-grade Pioneer XDJ-RX2 or DDJ-RR console, seamlessly integrated with a PC for flawless execution.
  • A premium wireless microphone system for eloquent toasts and announcements.

If your vision is to secure the finest wedding DJ Sicily has to offer, we invite you to connect with DJ Giuseppe to discuss your event.

Here are just a few of the prestigious locations where DJ Giuseppe has been exclusively booked by clients on FixTheMusic for their most important celebrations...

  • Tenuta Savoca, Sicily
  • Noto, Italy
  • Taormina, Messina, Italy
  • Scopello, Trapani

Follow the refined journey of DJ Giuseppe on Facebook and Instagram 📸

Bella Dixie – An Exquisite Dixie Ensemble, Based in Rome, Italy

Bella Dixie is a bespoke collective of four to eight supremely gifted musicians, hailing from the enchanting city of Rome. Established in 2019, this refined ensemble has ascended with impeccable artistry, leaving an indelible mark upon the world of live music.

Renowned for their scintillating performances, Bella Dixie has graced over two hundred weddings with their mesmerising melodies and infectious rhythms. They are regularly curated for celebrations and events at Casa Cornacchi in Bucine, Italy.

Enquire About Bella Dixie
bella-dixie-jazz-band-rome-italy.description_html:
Their distinct alchemy of elegance, vibrant energy, and unwavering passion imbues every occasion with an unforgettable retro charm—elevating ordinary gatherings into extraordinary, luminous celebrations. The band’s meticulously curated repertoire spans timeless classics from the Great American Songbook, evocative Italian and American swing anthems, spirited Rock ’n’ Roll numbers, and an eclectic tapestry of genres that captivates audiences of every generation.

With each note, Bella Dixie transports listeners on a musical journey through time, weaving magical moments that resonate long after the final chord has faded. Experience the magic of Bella Dixie, where vintage allure meets contemporary sophistication, leaving a legacy of musical excellence that is nothing less than impeccable.

Padova DJ curates the refined soundtrack of your most cherished moments.

Discover the complete collection of bespoke wedding DJs across Italy

With more than two decades of impeccable experience, Padova DJ delivers a genuinely live performance, never relying on pre‑fabricated playlists. For him, music is the very soul of every celebration—it elevates emotions, marks each exquisite passage, and transforms your day into an unforgettable masterpiece.

I am proudly listed on FixTheMusic’s curated selection of the finest wedding DJs in Italy.

We are regularly engaged to perform at weddings and exclusive events held at Villa Tiboldi in Cuneo, Italy.

Inquire with Padova DJ 💬

He reads the room with impeccable precision, crafting a tailored soundtrack that flows seamlessly from the elegance of the aperitif to the vibrant energy of the dance floor—effortlessly blending commercial hits, house, Italian, and international selections. His sole ambition? To ensure that you and your guests remain enveloped in joy, dancing and smiling throughout the entire celebration.

Padova DJ is also a music producer, with original compositions available on Spotify and aired on national radio.

padova-dj-wedding-italy.faq_html:

</details><details><summary>Do you have different line-up options?</summary>- I can add Saxophone, Violin, Pianist or Singers live performances.

</details><details><summary>Do you provide your own sound & lighting equipment? What is it or what's included in the price?</summary>- Yes

</details><details><summary>Do you provide a laptop playlist / DJ service in between and after your live sets?</summary>- Yes

</details><details><summary>Can you play song requests (e.g. a first dance)?</summary>- Yes

</details><details><summary>How much space do you need for your performance area?</summary>- Approx. 2m x 3m

</details><details><summary>Are you comfortable performing outdoors or in unusual settings (e.g. barns, beaches)?</summary>- Yes, of course — by performing at different types of events, I often play in a variety of settings.</details>

wedding-band-rome-outcasts.intro_html:
About The Outcasts – An exquisite wedding band, based in Rome, Italy

The Outcasts present a refined ensemble, ranging from an intimate duo to a magnificent five-piece formation, curated in the heart of Rome, Italy. While they are principally a swing and jazz collective of impeccable taste, do not be deceived—they possess the rare ability to transform any celebration into an unforgettable soirée, filling the dance floor with the most celebrated party anthems. Since their founding in 2015, they have had the privilege of enchanting distinguished guests at weddings, private gatherings, exclusive events, and elegant street festivals.

Contact The Outcasts

Chiara, the band’s luminous lead vocalist, began her journey in the arts as a child, mastering classical, modern, and contemporary dance. She later refined her talent through bespoke training at the Cunningham School and the Alvin Ailey School in New York, under the tutelage of Maestra Maria Di Re for both modern and operatic singing. Her career includes a 2008 appearance on the Rai Uno programme La Botola hosted by Fabrizio Frizzi, followed by three consecutive seasons as a singer and dancer in the musical Inferno Opera Rock. She was a finalist for the prestigious Mia Martini Award and Tour Music Fest, and participated in the 2014 blind auditions for The Voice of Italy on Rai Uno. In 2016, she performed as the lead in the opera L'Orlando furioso at the Jobel Theater’s music theatre within the Creative Arts Workshop. Since 2018, the band has graced Rai Uno, performing at the Parco della Musica in Rome in both 2020 and 2022, as well as on Rai Uno café. Most recently, in February 2023, Chiara delivered an exclusive performance on Rai Due for Viva il Videobox by Rosario Fiorello.

Downtown Nights is an exquisite, all-female electroacoustic ensemble, composed of exceptionally gifted and seasoned musicians whose artistry is nothing short of refined. Attending with meticulous devotion to every facet of your celebration, the members serve as bespoke guides, curating each occasion to impeccable perfection. With a vast international repertoire, they orchestrate the ideal musical accompaniment for every cherished moment.

Their curated services include:

  • Live music for cocktail hours – a duo or trio ensemble enhanced with saxophone or percussion
  • Refined background arrangements for dinner – a bespoke playlist
  • Captivating live performance following dinner
  • Tailored music for pivotal moments – cake cutting, first dances, and more
  • Exclusive extras: ceremony music or an elegant DJ set

Contact Downtown Nights 💬

With over a decade of performance expertise gracing Tuscany’s most prestigious venues, their versatility, experience, and unwavering attention to every detail ensure your dream event becomes an indelible, luxurious memory.

smooth-sax-genova-italy.intro_html:
About Smooth Sax – an exquisite saxophonist for weddings, based in Genova, Italy

From its refined base in Genova, Italy, Smooth Sax stands as a distinguished saxophonist, celebrated for crafting an impeccably curated atmosphere for weddings and luxury events.

Discover the full collection of DJ & Sax ensembles across Italy

Holding Master’s Degrees in Classic Saxophone and Jazz Music, Smooth Sax unites technical virtuosity with profound artistic sensibility.

Having graced prestigious stages throughout Europe, the United Kingdom, and beyond, this artist has performed alongside luminaries including Tony Coleman, Otis Grand, and Waldo Weathers.

Explore FixTheMusic's curated selection of the finest wedding DJs in Italy

He is consistently engaged for bespoke weddings and exclusive events at iconic destinations such as Forte dei Marmi in Lucca and Villa d'Este in Como.

Inquire with Smooth Sax 💬

As a session musician, his contributions to theatrical, cinematic, and television soundtracks have been featured in productions by RAI, Prime Video, Sky, Warner, and Universal.

Smooth Sax boasts an impressive portfolio of over 200 private occasions, from intimate yacht celebrations along the French Riviera and Amalfi Coast to sophisticated corporate engagements for houses such as Dolce & Gabbana, JP Morgan, and Patek Philippe.

He has performed at exclusive gatherings in legendary venues including Villa d’Este on Lake Como, the Four Seasons in Florence, and the Hotel Splendido in Portofino.

Whether enhancing an understated soiree or a grand festivity, Smooth Sax remains the quintessential choice for those who demand a touch of refined elegance on their most cherished day.
smooth-sax-genova-italy.faq_html:
<details><summary>What are your normal set lengths?</summary>- Usually 2 x 60 minute or 3 x 40 minute sets.

</details><details><summary>Do you have different line-up options?</summary>- I can add a DJ or Percussionist or both to my performance.

</details><details><summary>Do you provide your own sound & lighting equipment? What is it or what's included in the price?</summary>- Yes when i work alone (without DJ) i bring my Bose L1 Pro PA and it's included in the price.

</details><details><summary>Do you provide a laptop playlist / DJ service in between and after your live sets?</summary>- Yes i can provide a playlist service after/between my sets.

</details><details><summary>What time do you normally arrive at the venue to set up?</summary>- 1.5hrs to 2hrs before the event.

</details><details><summary>How long does it take for you to set up, sound check etc?</summary>- 30 minutes if I'm performing as solo.

</details><details><summary>Can you learn song requests (e.g. a first dance)?</summary>- Yes

</details><details><summary>How much space do you need for your performance area?</summary>- 2m x 2m as a soloist, more space will be needed if a DJ & Percussionist are added.

</details><details><summary>Do you have Public Liability Insurance and PAT-tested equipment?</summary>- Yes

</details><details><summary>Are you comfortable performing outdoors or in unusual settings (e.g. barns, beaches)?</summary>- Yes no problem.</details>

About Waves DJ & Sax – A refined duo of professional DJ and saxophonist, based in the exquisite region of Lazio, Italy

For over a decade, we have curated an impeccable musical experience for hundreds of events—from the most intimate weddings and exclusive parties to distinguished corporate functions—often enchanting a sophisticated, international clientele. Our artistic journey began in the late 1990s, performing in the most prestigious clubs and discos. Nestled in the heart of Italy, we travel effortlessly across the country, from Tuscany to Campania, Lazio and Umbria, bringing our bespoke sound to discerning venues. We are regularly commissioned for weddings and high-profile celebrations at Terrosi Vagnoli Luigi in Livorno and Hotel Villa Cipressi in Lecco.

Contact Waves DJ & Sax 💬

Throughout your event, we seamlessly tailor our musical narrative to each refined stage—from the delicate ambience of cocktails and dinner to the exhilarating energy of the dance floor. This is what distinguishes our set: a meticulously curated journey through diverse genres, evolving gracefully with the evening’s rhythm. We create bespoke sets, constantly adapted to suit the audience before us—ensuring every guest discovers a moment of pure resonance. The result is an impeccable selection spanning soul, R&B, funky, nu disco, rare grooves, and dance, featuring the world’s most celebrated artists from the 1970s to today’s most sophisticated sounds. It is the ideal soundtrack for your most cherished occasions, with weddings and ceremonies among our most requested private celebrations. You are invited to select the musical genres and specific songs, crafting a presentation of the highest calibre that gracefully crosses genres. Our DJ set is frequently elevated by live accompaniment—a saxophonist, percussionist, or violinist—to offer a more comprehensive and exquisitely tailored performance. All of our packages include a premium professional sound system and an elegant lighting setup.

- Saxophone
- Percussionist (Bongos)
- Violinist & other bespoke live elements

</details><details><summary>Do you have different line-up options?</summary>- Absolutely, our lineup ranges from duets to sextets, and can be tailored to the client's needs and tastes. You can choose from the following options: vocals, two guitars, violin, clarinet, and double bass.

</details><details><summary>Do you provide your own sound & lighting equipment? What is it or what's included in the price?</summary>- If necessary, we can provide our own sound system. We also have battery-powered amplifiers, allowing us to easily move around with smaller set-up and perform in different locations during the event.

</details><details><summary>Do you provide a laptop playlist / DJ service in between and after your live sets?</summary>- Yes, we will be happy to take care of this!

</details><details><summary>What time do you normally arrive at the venue to set up?</summary>- We usually arrive at the venue a couple of hours before the performance starts.

</details><details><summary>How long does it take for you to set up, sound check etc?</summary>- The setup and duration of the soundcheck depend on the lineup, but we expect it to last a maximum of 40 minutes to take care of everything and be ready well in advance of the start of the event.

</details><details><summary>Can you learn song requests (e.g. a first dance)?</summary>- Absolutely yes, we are all professional musicians and we gladly accept specific requests for pieces to be performed, but we kindly ask the client to let us know in advance.

</details><details><summary>Are you comfortable performing outdoors or in unusual settings (e.g. barns, beaches)?</summary>-Absolutely yes! We adapt to any situation, as long as it includes a shaded area in case of a sunny or particularly hot day!</details>

Comprising impeccably skilled musicians, each with years of professional experience, the ensemble’s configuration may be tailored from four to seven artists, effortlessly adapting to any occasion with unparalleled elegance.

tuscany-folk-band-italy.description_html:
This exquisite traditional Italian folk band is frequently commissioned to perform at welcome dinners or pizza parties throughout Italy—as well as during the aperitif, cocktail hour, or dinner—bringing a refined touch to every moment.

View FixTheMusic's curated list of the best wedding bands in Italy.

When performing at a welcome dinner, pizza party, or aperitif, the ensemble plays throughout the entire event, punctuated only by brief, ten-minute pauses during the meal.

For dinner performances, the musicians make elegant interventions between courses, approaching tables to invite guests into a shared, intimate sing-along.

The Folk Trio comprises accordion, guitarist-singer, and violin.

The Folk Quartet is offered in one of these refined combinations:

1) accordion, guitarist-singer, violin, and mandolin;
2) accordion, guitarist-singer, violin, and acoustic bass guitarist-singer;
3) accordion, guitarist-singer, violin, and sax;
4) accordion, two guitarist-singers, and violin.

The group performs as an acoustic roaming band in Italy, typically without amplification—an intimate, wandering serenade.

They are often booked for afternoon celebrations, after which couples engage one of our Tuscany wedding bands for the evening party.

estate-duo-reggio-emilia-italy.intro_html:
Estate Duo — An Exquisite Acoustic Ensemble from Reggio Emilia, Italy

Estate Duo is the refined collaboration of Marina and Sam, a pairing of impeccable artistry and shared vision.

Individually, they have graced stages across the globe for years, performing alongside some of the most celebrated names in music.

Curated for the most discerning clientele, they are regularly engaged for weddings, intimate gatherings, and corporate events throughout Italy and Switzerland. No venue is too grand nor too understated for this bespoke acoustic duo.

They are a recurring presence at Al Veluu Ristorante Suites in Como, Italy, lending their unparalleled sound to weddings and exclusive celebrations.

Inquire About Estate Duo

Marina is a vocalist and backing singer of extraordinary pedigree, having lent her voice to luminaries such as Mario Biondi, Il Volo, Marco Mengoni, and a host of other distinguished Italian and European artists.

In Switzerland, she graced the stage of The Voice and, more notably, conceived her reimagined interpretations of Black music’s greatest classics. In 2011 and 2012, she led the house band at the prestigious Montreux Palace during the revered Montreux Jazz Festival.

Their performance is typically a seamless 90-minute or two-hour set, though this can be thoughtfully divided into shorter segments upon consultation during the booking process.

The duo arrives fully self-sufficient—every element of their impeccable sound system is included in their fee. This equipment allows them to provide refined background music before the performance begins and during intervals between sets.

With prior arrangement, they can learn up to three songs beyond their existing repertoire for bespoke moments—be it a ceremony entrance, dinner, or first dance—ensuring each event is truly one of a kind.

As a duo, they are remarkably versatile, capable of performing in any space or setting (within reason), and can provide battery-powered equipment when circumstances require it.

Curated Line-Up Options

  • Duo — Guitar & Vocals
  • Trio — Guitar, Vocals & Saxophone

dj-sasha-bergamo-italy.intro_html:
DJ Sasha – An Exquisite Wedding DJ from Bergamo, Italy

Hailing from the refined city of Bergamo, Sasha is a supremely talented DJ and producer whose artistry elevates every event into an unforgettable experience.

Her illustrious career began in 2013, captivating audiences at a distinguished house club on the shores of Sardinia.

She frequently graces grand stages as a special guest DJ alongside international luminaries such as Daddy Yankee, Bad Bunny, Ozuna, and Maluma, curating moments of pure musical brilliance.

Today, Sasha commands the decks at some of the most exclusive venues in Bergamo, Brescia, Milan, and Florence, delivering impeccable sets tailored to discerning clientele.

Her wedding portfolio is equally distinguished, having orchestrated the soundtrack for nuptials in Lombardy and Tuscany—including the celebrated union of singer Paola Turci and Francesca Pascale at one of Tuscany’s most breathtaking villas.

She has also lent her refined touch to high-profile events for luxury brands such as Geox, performing at their flagship stores in Paris and Milan.

Her calendar regularly features bespoke performances at the Hotel Cala di Volpe Luxury Collection in Sardinia, a testament to her unmatched reputation.

Sasha is meticulously mentored and managed by DJ Zano, one of Italy’s most celebrated and sought-after wedding DJs.

Zano also represents an elite roster of DJs available exclusively through FixTheMusic for weddings and celebrations across Italy:

  • DJ Belmo
  • DJ Stefo
  • DJ Simon
  • DJ Leon
  • DJ Charlie

A firm believer in cultivating young talent, Zano dedicates himself to mentoring the next generation of exceptional DJs in his local region.

Enquire with DJ Sasha 💬

venice-dj-italy.intro_html:
The Venice DJ – An Artisan of Sound, Curating Exquisite Musical Experiences from Venice, Italy

Born from an early reverence for the piano’s refined keys at the tender age of eight, The Venice DJ embodies a profound, lifelong devotion to music. This initial infatuation matured into a meticulously curated journey through an impeccable array of genres—from the infectious pulse of Dance to the groove-laden rhythms of Funk and the timeless elegance of 70's Music. During these formative years, the allure of vinyl records became a bespoke treasure trove of sonic inspiration, guiding his artistry on an enchanting voyage. It was within this era that he first ventured into the realm of DJing, breathing life into intimate gatherings with a fusion of rhythm and energy that foreshadowed his remarkable trajectory.

Contact The Venice DJ
venice-dj-italy.description_html: The year 1980 marked a pivotal turning point in The Venice DJ’s career, as he ascended to the spotlight at the esteemed Scarpantibus—then the preeminent nightclub of the Friuli Venezia Giulia region. This colossal venue, with an exclusive capacity of up to 5,000 discerning guests, served as the refined launching pad for his illustrious journey. For over seven impeccable years, he held the mantle of Resident DJ, orchestrating the auditory landscape of the club and etching his name into its history. A climactic phase awaited him in the picturesque setting of Cortina d’Ampezzo, where, from 1987 to 1992, he cast his sonic spell over the exclusive clientele of the prestigious Bilbó—an era that elevated his artistry to unprecedented heights. The echoes of his music resonated beyond geographical confines, gracing hallowed Italian clubs such as Amnesia, Biblos, Le Capannine, King’s River Club, and Area Cortina. His magnetic presence extended globally to Ibiza’s HUB SPACE and George Amsterdam during ADE, solidifying his reputation as a paragon of DJ prowess. Throughout his journey, The Venice DJ honed a bespoke repertoire across classic house, tech-house, deep-house, and Dance—each note, each beat a testament to his commitment to an impeccable craft, leaving an indelible imprint on the canvas of music that continues to inspire and ignite dance floors worldwide.

tuscan-tale-folk-pistoia-italy.intro_html:
About The Tuscan Tale – an exquisite Italian Folk ensemble based in Pistoia, Italy

We are The Tuscan Tale—a curated collective of musicians united by a shared devotion to the timeless allure of Italian swing and folk music.

Discover the complete selection of impeccable wedding bands in Italy

For years we have performed together, cultivating not merely a band but a refined musical family. Every performance becomes an invitation into our private world—a bespoke gathering where warmth and authenticity reign.

Our greatest pleasure lies in recreating the enchanting atmosphere of the most cherished Italian soirées: tables adorned with cuisine, wine flowing freely, and guests swept into effortless clapping, singing, and smiling.

We are frequently engaged as a premium Italian folk band for weddings and exclusive events at the illustrious Villa la Massa in Florence and the majestic Maniero Montecassiano in Macerata, Italy.

Enquire about The Tuscan Tale 💬
tuscan-tale-folk-pistoia-italy.description_html:
Our essence is woven from the warmth, nostalgia, and connection that only music can evoke—especially the melodies that have accompanied generations.

Our repertoire is a carefully curated tapestry of timeless songs in Neapolitan, Sicilian, and Roman dialects—echoes that transcend borders and generations.

View FixTheMusic's selection of the most refined wedding bands in Tuscany

These are the pieces immortalised by legends such as Dean Martin and Frank Sinatra—tunes that feel simultaneously deeply personal and universally resonant.

We preserve an authentic, unrivalled sound through traditional instruments rooted in Italy's musical heritage: guitar, mandolin, and accordion form the soul of every performance.

When the occasion demands a grander orchestration or a more rhythmic pulse, we introduce bass and drums to elevate the energy with refined sophistication.

Whether gracing an intimate family celebration or a lavish international affair, our mission remains constant: to share a fragment of Italian soul and unite guests through the sheer joy of music.

rome-dixie-band-italy.intro_html:
About The Rome Dixie Band – an exclusive roaming dixie & jazz ensemble based in Rome, Italy

The Rome Dixie Band curates an exquisite auditory journey, transporting the spirited essence of New Orleans to the Italian countryside. Their refined repertoire weaves a masterful blend of Dixieland Swing, Jazz, and the occasional Italian classic—each note meticulously performed with impeccable energy and sophistication.

Their bespoke setlist includes timeless treasures such as “Volare,” “O Sole Mio,” “That’s Amore,” and “Bella Ciao,” all reimagined with the effervescent styling of a revered New Orleans street band. Every performance is a curated celebration of joy and nostalgia.

Perfectly suited for weddings and celebrations across Italy, The Rome Dixie Band ensures an unforgettable “party mood” that enraptures both hosts and guests alike. Their sound evokes the golden era of Bourbon Street—a sensory immersion into the exuberant humour and warm vitality of early American Dixieland Jazz.

They are regularly commissioned for the most distinguished celebrations at Monastero Santa Margherita in Perugia, Italy—a testament to their refined artistry and exclusive appeal.

Inquire about The Rome Dixie Band

Their exquisite performances feature compositions by legendary luminaries such as Fats Waller, Hoagy Carmichael, Louis Armstrong, and Jelly Roll Morton. Beloved standards—including “Sweet Georgia Brown,” “St. Louis Blues,” “South,” and “When The Saints Go Marchin’ In”—are delivered with impeccable grace and vibrant authenticity.

Beyond jazz masterpieces, the ensemble offers bespoke renditions of Italian classics, inviting guests to sing and dance to favourites like “Volare” and “O Sole Mio,” each reimagined with a distinctly sophisticated Dixieland twist.

For an event defined by unparalleled music and effortless merriment, let The Rome Dixie Band orchestrate a sublime experience—bringing the soul of New Orleans to your most treasured occasion in Italy.

latin-jazz-band-siena-tuscany-italy.intro_html:
The Tuscany Latin Jazz Band – an impeccably refined ensemble, based in the exquisite city of Siena, Italy, specializing in bespoke Latin jazz performances.

This curated ensemble may be engaged as a four-piece configuration or tailored to more intimate settings, ensuring an exclusive experience for every occasion.

Under the masterful direction of the gifted vocalist and guitarist Fabrizio, the band delivers performances of captivating elegance, seamlessly weaving the vibrant energy of Latin rhythms with the improvisational brilliance of jazz.

Inspired by his profound devotion to Latin cadences and jazz spontaneity, Fabrizio assembled The Tuscany Latin Jazz Band. The ensemble comprises a select group of virtuosos: Fabrizio on guitar and vocals, alongside a double bassist, a violinist, and a drummer. Together, they craft a harmonious fusion of genres that transports audiences into a world of rhythmic sophistication.

The band is regularly commissioned for weddings and exclusive events at venues such as Villa Roncovisi in Pistoia and Rosewood Castiglion Del Bosco in Siena, Italy.

Inquire about The Tuscany Latin Jazz Band
latin-jazz-band-siena-tuscany-italy.description_html:
Fabrizio’s musical journey began at the age of eleven, when he first embraced the guitar. His passion flourished as he dedicated himself to mastering its every nuance. Recognising his precocious talent, his parents enrolled him in a distinguished music school in Siena, where he received formal training that further ignited his love for the art.

Driven by an unwavering desire to explore uncharted musical territories, Fabrizio pursued jazz studies at a prestigious conservatory in Siena. There, he refined his instrumental artistry, delving into the rich complexities of jazz and expanding his creative horizons.

The Tuscany Latin Jazz Band’s repertoire is a curated selection of instrumental compositions and vocal performances. They artfully blend traditional Latin genres—salsa, bossa nova, and samba—with the improvisational essence of jazz. Their performances are distinguished by infectious rhythms, intricate melodic lines, and breathtaking solos that illuminate the individual mastery of each musician.

The ensemble’s versatility allows them to adapt seamlessly to any setting. Whether delivering instrumental pieces that showcase their refined prowess or presenting deeply moving vocal renditions, their music is soul-stirring and profoundly engaging.

Over the years, the band has enchanted discerning audiences in Siena and beyond—from private events and elite jazz clubs to prestigious music festivals—leaving an indelible mark on the musical landscape and drawing admirers from all walks of life.

The Tuscany Latin Jazz Band continues to push the boundaries of their artistry, exploring new musical vistas and captivating audiences with their inimitable fusion of Latin rhythms and jazz improvisation. With unwavering passion and remarkable talent, they create an enduring impact, delighting every guest at each exclusive event they grace.

Below is a selection of distinguished locations where we have been engaged by clients on FixTheMusic for weddings and celebrations:

  • Villa Roncovisi, Pistoia
  • Rosewood Castiglion Del Bosco
  • Villa Cicolina, Montepulciano
  • Locanda in Tuscany, Castiglione
  • Fattoria Mansi Bernardini
  • Tenuta Corte Domina
  • Lucca, Italy

wedding-tenor-florence-italy.intro_html:
About The Wedding Tenor – an exquisite Florentine vocalist for your most refined celebration

What discerning clients cherish most about The Wedding Tenor: an unforgettable operatic revelation delivered with a breathtaking voice, impeccable elegance, profound emotional resonance, and a guest interaction that transforms even the simplest dinner into a once‑in‑a‑lifetime experience.

The Wedding Tenor is a Florence‑based opera singer, actor, and pianist of exceptional calibre.

His distinguished artistic journey began with principal roles in the most celebrated operettas—La vedova allegra, L'Acqua Cheta, Il Paese dei campanelli, Al cavallino bianco, and Casa mia casa mia—performed alongside renowned theatre companies across Italy’s finest historic stages.

View the complete collection of wedding musicians in Italy

Concurrently, he sustains an illustrious concert career in Italian and European theatres, corporate events, and sacred venues, offering a curated repertoire that spans opera, operetta, Neapolitan songs, film soundtracks, sacred arias, operatic‑pop, chamber romanza, and Baroque masterworks.

Performing in partnership with a supremely talented Florence‑based soprano, he has forged an enduring artistic alliance, presenting bespoke musical performances in which both artists shine as singers, actors, and presenters.

He is regarded as one of the most exquisite opera singers in Italy for weddings and exclusive events.

He is regularly engaged for weddings and private occasions at Villa Catignano in Siena, Castello di Rosciano in Perugia, and Villa di Bivigliano in Tuscany, Italy.

Contact The Wedding Tenor
wedding-tenor-florence-italy.description_html:
The Wedding Tenor further specialises in intimate private events—wedding banquets, soirées, and corporate gatherings—held within Medici villas, ancient palazzos, and historic castles. There, he captivates his audience through an impeccably curated repertoire and the refined theatrical sensibility of an actor‑singer.

This celebrated wedding singer is available throughout Tuscany, Umbria, and all of Italy, providing bespoke entertainment for every phase of an event: ceremony, aperitif, dinner, or welcome reception.

His repertoire encompasses an extraordinary breadth of musical genres—sacred, religious, classical, opera, romanza, operetta, Neapolitan, operatic‑pop, and both Italian and international music—each selection delivered with consummate artistry.

A fully customisable song list is offered; he can learn and perform any piece on request. He performs accompanied by a live musician (piano, organ, or other instruments) or with his own impeccable professional backing tracks.

Surprise Singing Act

Envision the astonishment on your guests’ faces as a seemingly anonymous figure seamlessly merges with the event staff and, in an instant, commands the room. He proceeds to serenade you and your guests, who joyfully join in beloved traditional Italian songs such as “O Sole Mio” and “Volare,” as well as classical masterpieces like “Nessun dorma.”

Wedding Ceremony

Elevate your ceremony to an unforgettable pinnacle with the mesmerising presence of a classical singer. The Wedding Tenor’s extraordinary voice—reminiscent of Italy’s greatest vocal luminaries—will enchant and captivate every soul present.

Aperitifs or Dinner

Add an indelible touch of refinement to your dinner by treating your guests to the spellbinding performances of a classical singer. From opera to traditional and contemporary pieces, his versatile renditions delight every palate. Witness the sheer rapture as guests rise in applause for this passionate, commanding voice. Whether you have engaged a band or a DJ for entertainment, infuse your evening with an element of unparalleled sophistication.

Wedding Soprano and Tenor Duo

Beyond his individual artistry, The Wedding Tenor can perform in duo with a professional soprano, uniting their voices to create an extraordinarily fruitful alliance. Through harmonised perfection, they deliver captivating renditions of numerous songs and opera compositions—whether originally conceived as duets or reimagined for this sublime vocal pairing.

fire-led-dancers-jugglers-italy-fireflie.intro_html:
The Italy Fireflies — Exquisite Fire & LED Artisans, Curated Performances from Milan, Italy

The Italy Fireflies present an impeccably choreographed fire show that captivates from the very first moment the artists grace the scene.

Fire possesses an ancient, almost mystical allure — a refined echo of tribality and our most primal origins.

Exquisite tongues of flame, cascades of burning sparks, and bespoke games of fire hold the audience spellbound, until the fire-eater, with impeccable precision, extinguishes the very flame from which the entire journey began.

This ensemble is regularly commissioned for weddings and exclusive events at Casa Cornacchi Country House in Bucine, Italy.

Enquire About The Italy Fireflies
fire-led-dancers-jugglers-italy-fireflie.description_html:
A breathtaking narrative woven entirely from fire — a force that propagates and regenerates through a curated collection of equipment and special effects, each wielded with masterful artistry.

Whether performed in a piazza, along a cobbled street, or within the refined setting of an elegant ceremony, this show enchants every audience. It has graced numerous street artist festivals, and each time, guests are left mesmerised by the shimmering sparks of fire.

The artists of The Italy Fireflies enchant with their refined games of fire and juggling, elevating your wedding celebration into an utterly unique affair with bespoke light effects.

For those seeking original concepts for a night party, historical re-enactments, or exceptional artists for private celebrations, a fire show is the impeccable choice — one that stirs deep emotion in adults and children alike.

We also craft fully customised versions of our performances: you select the music, the costumes, the choreography — in essence, you curate an experience that is entirely your own.

Beyond fire, we offer exquisite LED light shows, pixel poi performances, and parades — including the captivating "mirror man" (see portfolio).

In Italiano

La compagnia nasce dalla raffinata passione di Saimon per il fuoco, e si specializza in questo settore della giocoleria con un’impronta artistica inconfondibile. La formazione presso il Teatro Tascabile di Bergamo ha portato Saimon a diventare anche danzatore sui trampoli, aggiungendo un’ulteriore dimensione di eleganza allo spettacolo.

La compagnia lavora inoltre con attrezzi LED di propria concezione, per un repertorio luminoso altrettanto affascinante.

Le musiche sono interamente prodotte dalla compagnia e pertanto non soggette a tutela SIAE — un ulteriore segno di cura e autonomia creativa.

Proponiamo animazione su misura per matrimoni, eventi aziendali, feste di paese, rievocazioni storiche e ogni altra celebrazione che meriti un tocco di esclusività.

Realizziamo spettacoli di giocoleria con fuoco, personalizzati nella durata, nella composizione musicale e nel numero di performer, animazione itinerante e danza su trampoli, spettacoli di giocoleria con LED — ogni dettaglio è curato con impeccabile attenzione.

marche-sax-civitanova-italy.intro_html:
The Marche Sax – An Exquisite Saxophonist Based in Marche, Italy

Nestled in the heart of Italy’s enchanting Marche region, The Marche Sax is celebrated for its impeccable fusion of elegance, versatility, and pure musical artistry. A classically trained saxophonist whose passion for performance was ignited at the age of ten, he has since cultivated a refined sound that graces the most exclusive venues and private affairs across Italy. From intimate wedding aperitivos to opulent corporate galas, each performance is bespoke—smooth, sophisticated, and meticulously tailored to elevate the ambiance.

Enquire with The Marche Sax 💬

Whether performing solo with curated backing tracks or alongside his handpicked ensemble of gifted musicians and performers, every show is uniquely personal. The Marche Sax offers a flexible lineup—spanning from an intimate solo act to a full eight-piece orchestra featuring DJs, percussionists, violinists, vocalists, dancers, and more. Set lengths are tailored to the client’s vision, from concise sets to immersive three-to-four-hour sessions.

Fully self-contained, he provides all necessary professional-grade sound, lighting, and video equipment—including LED walls, smoke effects, and moving heads—expertly managed by an experienced technical team. Setup requires one to three hours, depending on the scale of the production, with arrival typically four hours before the event. Equally at home indoors or alfresco, he gracefully accommodates special song requests, bringing his refined energy to any setting: elegant villas, luxury hotels, seaside celebrations, or gala dinners.

Stylish, soulful, and effortlessly professional, The Marche Sax curates moments that linger in memory long after the final note fades.

Performing at weddings and events is but one facet of his luminous career, undertaken with profound passion and an unwavering desire to elevate every occasion.

When not gracing weddings, he is in demand for exclusive studio sessions and live performances alongside Italy’s most celebrated artists.

wedding-dj-sardinia-fab.intro_html:
About DJ Fab – An Exquisite Wedding DJ for Sardinia’s Most Refined Celebrations

DJ Fab is a consummately charismatic and highly esteemed wedding DJ, gracefully based on the enchanting island of Sardinia.

With several years of impeccable performances at Sardinian weddings, he possesses an innate ability to curate the perfect party atmosphere for your most exclusive event.

Should you seek to engage the most distinguished wedding DJ Sardinia has to offer, a discreet inquiry with DJ Fab is your first step toward an unforgettable celebration.

He is regularly commissioned for weddings and events at the peerless Almar Timi Ama Resort & Spa in Sardinia and the Falkensteiner Resort Capo Boi in Cagliari—venues that themselves epitomize luxury.

Contact DJ Fab
wedding-dj-sardinia-fab.description_html:
Whether for an intimate birthday, an exuberant party, a milestone graduation, or—most exquisitely—your wedding, DJ Fab transforms any space into a bespoke dance-floor sanctuary.

His meticulously curated DJ stand includes complete, premium-grade audio equipment, spectacular light effects, a refined smoke machine, and a bubble machine—all effortlessly transportable to any location across Sardinia.

His repertoire is a masterfully blended symphony of current dance music, the timeless allure of the 80s and 90s, classic disco, and captivating Latin rhythms: salsa, merengue, cha cha cha, reggaeton, and the irresistible pulse of kissed melodies. For your cocktail hour, he offers a sophisticated chillout and lounge selection, elegantly setting the tone.

DJ Fab will be the engine of your event—a refined force of energy. He takes profound pleasure in personalizing every phase of your celebration with bespoke musical requests, discerning the ideal sonic combinations for each fleeting, precious moment.

He guarantees impeccable sound quality and breathtaking lighting—a genuine, high-calibre DJ set that transforms your chosen venue into an unforgettable, luminous party.

Your wedding day deserves to be a moment of pure joy, happiness, and impeccable music. To celebrate this extraordinary milestone with your loved ones, DJ Fab is the consummate professional.

DJ Fab is ready to elevate your reception, inviting you to dance to the rhythm of exotic, addictive Latin music and beyond, propelling your celebration to the pinnacle of exhilaration.

He will serve as the master of ceremonies for your reception, delighting in tailoring every phase of your grand day with special musical requests, finding the perfect combinations of songs for each unforgettable moment.

DJ Fab likewise ensures flawless sound quality and stunning lighting—a true, immersive DJ set that transforms your location into an enduring, splendid party.

He will entertain your wedding party with a varied and perfect repertoire for every refined taste: current dance music, Latin classics, 80s and 90s anthems, disco, and elegant chillout/lounge for your cocktail hour.
wedding-dj-sardinia-fab.faq_html:
<details><summary>What does the wedding package include?</summary>DJ Stand, sound system with speaker and complete subwoofer for parties from 50 to 300 people, UV strobe laser light effects, smoke machine, bubble machine.



</details><details><summary>How far in advance should I get in touch with you?</summary>At least 7 days.  



</details><details><summary>Formation Size</summary>One DJ only.  



</details><details><summary>Repertoire?</summary>Disco music, disco from the 80s, 90s and current dance, Latin, salsa, merengue, cha cha, reggaeton, lounge and chillout.  



</details><details><summary>Can I ask for songs that are not included in the repertoire?</summary>I am able to satisfy any musical request, current music and latest trends, always original playing original tracks and taking requests as part or my packages.  



</details><details><summary>Experience?</summary>more than 10 years.  



</details><details><summary>Do you provide all your own equipment?</summary>Yes.  



</details><details><summary>Do you need concrete material or specific conditions to be able to offer the service?</summary>No.



</details><details><summary>Are you available to travel?</summary>Yes, up to 300 km.



</details><details><summary>Is there a travel surcharge?</summary>Yes, as long as it's within a reasonable distance and the price is agreed before the booking is confirmed.  



</details><details><summary>Do you perform during more than one wedding per day?</summary>No.  



</details><details><summary>Do you work alone or with a team of professionals?</summary>Alone.  



</details><details><summary>How long does the performance last?</summary>You decide, I don't perform on time, the package is agreed and we go until the last guest no longer wants to dance.  



</details><details><summary>How much time do you need to set-up for the performance?</summary>2 hours.  



</details><details><summary>Can you perform outdoors?</summary>Yes.</details>

led-violinist-rome-italy.intro_html:
About The LED Violinist – an exquisite wedding violinist based in Rome, Italy

The LED Violinist is a refined Italian violinist and producer, whose origins lie in the sun-drenched region of Salento. His artistry is defined by an impeccable versatility, a curated mastery that spans jazz, house, techno, folk, pop, classical, and Balkan music — each style rendered with bespoke elegance. Together with his esteemed collaborator, DJ and producer Cristian Carpentieri, he launched a record label in January 2009, an exclusive venture that swiftly ascended to become one of Italy’s most distinguished tech-house imprints. During this period, he also collaborated with Alex Dimitri, lending his compositional and arranging prowess to the album Alex Dimitri South Soul (released by BBE Records), alongside luminaries Barbara Tucker and Inaya Day. He is regularly engaged to perform at weddings and events of the highest calibre at the Rome Cavalieri Waldorf Astoria Hotel, a venue synonymous with luxury.

Contact The LED Violinist
led-violinist-rome-italy.description_html: Among his most distinguished partnerships is his contribution to the soundtracks for feature films and shorts produced for Rai, Sky, and Telethon in collaboration with OutCinema — a testament to his refined compositional sensibility. From 2010 to 2018, he performed actively as a member of an internationally celebrated music project, one of the most revered world music ensembles in Italy and across the globe. For more than a decade, he has graced the stage as a turnist alongside an impeccable roster of Italian and international artists — Cesare Cremonini, Carmen Consoli, Paolo Fresu, Sergio Cammariere, Dolcenera, and many others — each performance a bespoke experience. He delivers live performances at Italy’s most exclusive discos, including BluBay in Castro Marina, Hollywood in Milan, and Kinki in Bologna, sharing the bill with globally acclaimed DJs such as Sven Vath, Pirupa, Christian Marchi, and Tommy Vee. His ongoing work as an arranger and composer encompasses orchestrations and transcriptions for a variety of ensembles, as well as the creation of refined audio for theatre, dance, jingles, and advertisements. In a crowning achievement, he conceived the groundbreaking course in Singing and Musical Disciplines for the Accademia Artisti di Roma — one of the nation’s most prestigious institutions for artistic and cultural training — where he has served as artistic and musical director since September 2019. This exclusive academy counts among its faculty such luminaries as Guillermo Mariotto, Annalisa Minetti, Eleonora Giorgi, Grazia di Michele, Luca Pitterai, Maria Grazia Fontana, and Fabrizio Palma.

dj-maurice-lucca-tuscany-italy.intro_html:
DJ Maurice – An Exquisite Curator of Sound, Based in the Enchanting Versilia, Italy

👏 What discerning clientele most admired: Impeccable communication, bespoke playlists, an intuitive reading of the room, a packed dance floor, and flawless professionalism.

Renowned throughout Tuscany and beyond, DJ Maurice is a name synonymous with refined musical artistry.

Proudly featured on FixTheMusic’s curated selection of Italy’s finest wedding DJs.

His passion for music was ignited in childhood, when records became his most treasured possessions, and he would lose himself in their melodies for entire days.

At twenty, he began his craft in the intimate setting of local clubs. After honing his expertise, he transitioned into the world of private events and weddings, with a particular affinity for international couples seeking an unforgettable celebration.

Explore our exclusive list of Italy’s premier wedding DJs ➡️

His versatile nature effortlessly aligns with the unique desires of every client he serves.

He is consistently engaged to perform at the most distinguished venues, including Borgo Stomennano in Siena, Villa Le Capanne in Volterra, and Villa Lena in Pisa, Italy.

Enquire for an Exclusive Engagement with DJ Maurice 💬
dj-maurice-lucca-tuscany-italy.description_html:
Maurice distinguishes himself among Tuscany’s elite DJs through his richly layered musical background and remarkable adaptability. He masterfully weaves an array of genres to suit every ambiance, and his extensive expertise allows him to discern the unspoken desires of a gathering from the very first conversation.

For Maurice, every guest is of paramount importance. The art of “reading the crowd” is not merely a skill—it is his signature. Unlike others who may overlook the tastes of attendees in favour of a single client’s directives, Maurice curates an experience that honours all present.

Discover more of Italy’s most sought-after wedding DJs ➡️

His ultimate reward is witnessing guests lose themselves in the music he so meticulously selects. He strives to personalise every performance, adding a touch of brilliance without ever intruding. As he notes, “Talking over the songs is like conversation during a film in a theatre—utterly distracting.” Consequently, he rarely uses the microphone, preferring instead to let the music evoke emotion without the need for verbal engagement—a philosophy that sometimes challenges the belief that music alone may not suffice.

From the moment of your initial consultation, where mutual responsibilities are elegantly outlined, his presence ensures the creation of an impeccable soundtrack for your soirée.

Notable for his radiant positivity, Maurice remains consistently engaging and uplifting. His profound musical knowledge spans nearly every genre, ensuring a repertoire as boundless as it is refined.

Maurice regularly performs for couples from across the globe who journey to Italy to celebrate their union. He is celebrated for his effortless collaboration and extraordinary flexibility, seamlessly blending any style or playlist to achieve an atmosphere of perfect harmony.

He provides a complete, bespoke setup: a state-of-the-art Pioneer mixer, captivating dancing lights, premium microphones, powerful speakers, and more. For an elevated touch, he may be booked alongside a live saxophonist—an exquisite addition that transforms cocktail hour or the dance floor into something truly extraordinary.

He is always delighted to discuss his artistic vision or arrange a brief call to ensure the finest alignment. Input and musical suggestions from the couple are warmly welcomed—for he believes the evening should resonate with the exact elegance you envision.

Distinguished Past Clients

  • Louis Vuitton
  • Terre di Canossa
  • Garmin
  • Maserati
  • Benetti Yachts

View the complete range of wedding bands in Italy

View FixTheMusic's selection of best wedding bands in Italy

Contact The Admirers
admirers-puglia-italy.description_html:
Specialising in providing top‑tier entertainment for bespoke occasions, The Admirers have become synonymous with refined excellence in live music.

Whether an enchanting outdoor concert, an intimate soirée, or a grand wedding celebration, the band’s versatility is unparalleled.

Their mission is to blend impeccable musicality with an infectious stage presence, forging a connection that transcends the barrier between performer and audience. With each performance, The Admirers aspire to create unforgettable memories and lasting impressions.

When it comes to weddings, The Admirers offer a tailored entertainment package designed to elevate every moment of the celebration. Their wedding party animation typically unfolds as follows, though it can be customised to suit the couple’s vision and the venue’s character:

  • Civil Ceremony: Set the mood with an exquisite DJ accompanied by guitar, vocals and/or saxophone or violin.
  • Wedding Entrance in ‘New Orleans’ Style and Aperitif: Serenade guests with a roaming acoustic ensemble featuring banjo, vocals, saxophone and percussion.
  • Music During the Meal: Keep the atmosphere alive with an electric set, alternating between listening and dancing intervals, performed by five musicians on vocals, guitar, tenor saxophone, bass and drums, complemented by refined DJ interludes.
  • Cake Cutting Ceremony: Enhance the moment with instrumental accompaniment, whether a guitar‑saxophone duo or a guitar‑vocals‑saxophone trio, tailored to suit the ambiance and song choice.
  • Music After the Cake Cutting and After Party: Transition seamlessly into the evening festivities with the expertise of a skilled DJ, ensuring the celebration continues well into the night.

With The Admirers curating the soundtrack, every wedding becomes an exquisite affair, immersed in music, jubilation, and indelible memories.

night-shift-wedding-band-rome-italy.intro_html:
About The Night Shift — A Refined Wedding & Celebration Ensemble Based in the Heart of Rome, Italy

Unwavering Acclaim: Clients consistently praise The Night Shift for their exquisite musical versatility, impeccable communication, and bespoke approach to event planning. From the first note of the ceremony through to the final dance, they orchestrate a flawless atmosphere and effortlessly command packed dance floors.

The Night Shift represents the consummate choice for a wedding celebration defined by elegance and distinction.

Their curated repertoire features a sublime selection of lounge, bossa nova, and jazz standards, presented in both exquisite vocal and refined instrumental arrangements.

The ensemble seamlessly traverses musical eras, from the soulful depths of 60s Motown and R&B to the iconic dance and funk anthems of the 70s and 80s. This impeccable versatility firmly establishes them as one of the most sought-after wedding bands in Rome.

The Night Shift are a distinguished and recurring presence at the prestigious Tenuta Mocajo in Pisa, curating unforgettable sonic landscapes for exclusive weddings and bespoke events.

Enquire About The Night Shift — Experience Unparalleled Artistry
night-shift-wedding-band-rome-italy.description_html:
Their extensive repertoire is further enhanced by a masterful selection of contemporary pop dance anthems and timeless evergreen pop & rock classics, ensuring every musical preference is elegantly addressed.

The Night Shift orchestrates the complete arc of your wedding reception with impeccable finesse. Begin with sophisticated, mellow jazz during the cocktail hour, and transition seamlessly into an irresistible, high-energy groove that commands the dance floor and elevates the entire celebration.

two-violins-duo-puglia-italy.description_html:
We are delighted to present a bespoke ensemble of two exquisite Italian virtuosas. The Two Violins curate an atmosphere of unparalleled sophistication and refined beauty for the most discerning weddings and events.

Discover the complete collection of wedding musicians in Italy. Their seamless harmonies and graceful melodies captivate audiences, reflecting a truly impeccable artistry. View our curated selection of string quartets in Italy.

Inquire About The Two Violins

Their journey began with a shared passion discovered in youth, individually honed through years of rigorous formal training. They possess a profound command of the classical repertoire, an accomplishment matched only by their refined sense of style. On stage, their elegant attire perfectly complements their musical dialogue, creating a visually impeccable and sonically harmonious performance. This unwavering commitment to quality has rightfully earned them widespread international recognition.

Their performances radiate an air of enchanted sophistication, transforming every event into an exclusive, bespoke experience. From timeless classical compositions that stir the soul to modern interpretations infused with a contemporary twist, The Two Violins flawlessly bridge tradition and innovation. Their unique interpretations captivate and inspire, leaving a lasting, indelible impression on all who listen.

Embodying elegance, talent, and grace, The Two Violins bring an exquisite touch of Italian allure to every occasion. Their harmonious melodies and distinctive fashionable flair continue to enchant and inspire, leaving an enduring legacy in the world of refined, luxurious music.
