dj-trulli-bitritto-puglia-italy.intro_html:
DJ Trulli – An Exquisite Curator of Wedding & Event Experiences, Based in Bitritto, Italy

DJ Trulli is a refined maestro of wedding and event entertainment, celebrated for orchestrating unforgettable soirées with an impeccable balance of music, atmosphere, and bespoke lighting. Every performance is meticulously curated to reflect the couple’s unique aesthetic, delivering a personalised soundtrack that honours their style and keeps the dance floor alive from the first note to the final encore. He presents an impeccably curated selection of line-up configurations, ranging from a classic DJ set to exquisite live additions—saxophone, vocals, percussion, violin, or even a full international-style band. Whether you envision a sleek, minimalist DJ-only arrangement or a vibrant fusion of live artistry, DJ Trulli shapes the evening exactly as you imagine it.

Contact DJ Trulli
dj-trulli-bitritto-puglia-italy.description_html:
His curated repertoire encompasses an exquisite spectrum of genres, including dance, pop, house, R&B, hip-hop, tech-house, deep-house, afro-house, EDM, garage, and more. No matter the occasion, he possesses an innate ability to read the room and sustain an impeccable energy flow. Sets are typically bespoke in duration, ranging from two to five hours as agreed in advance, and his quotes always include premium sound and lighting equipment. For those seeking an elevated ambiance, custom lighting designs and stage builds can be arranged upon request. A seamless, uninterrupted musical journey is ensured with comprehensive DJ services before, between, and after sets. DJ Trulli arrives approximately two hours prior to the event for an immaculate setup and sound check, typically requiring ninety minutes. Personalised requests—including first dances—are meticulously prepared when discussed in advance. The required performance space varies with the chosen line-up; a minimum of 4m x 3m is recommended for an optimal experience. Fully insured and equipped with certified professional apparatus, he is adept at performing in outdoor and unconventional venues, including beaches, barns, gardens, and more. For sandy, grassy, or uneven terrain, a small stage or flooring is recommended to ensure stability and safeguard the equipment. With an immaculate presentation, versatile artistry, and extensive experience at weddings and exclusive private events, DJ Trulli provides every element necessary to transform any celebration into a seamless, high-energy, and truly unforgettable affair.

Line-up Options:

  • DJ
  • Sax
  • Female voice
  • Percussion
  • Violin
  • International Singer and more.

wedding-saxophonist-italy-ness.intro_html:
Ness On Sax – An Exquisite Wedding Saxophonist, Based in Puglia, Italy

Ness On Sax is a refined performer whose artistry elevates every occasion. With years of impeccable experience, she curates a show of unparalleled sophistication—whether for an intimate wedding, an exclusive corporate soirée, or a grand festival. Her bespoke approach ensures that each event, regardless of scale, is transformed into an unforgettable sensory experience.

Accustomed to travelling across this enchanting region, Ness On Sax lends her elegant presence to venues both celebrated and secluded. She is regularly selected to perform at the illustrious Blubay Club in Lecce and the breathtaking Villa Gioia in Bari, Italy—destinations synonymous with luxury and romance.

Enquire About Ness On Sax

A virtuoso of her craft, Ness On Sax draws from a meticulously curated repertoire spanning centuries and genres. Her eclectic setlist is the hallmark of an artist who understands that each moment of a wedding demands its own distinct tone—from the serene beauty of a ceremony to the exuberant energy of a reception. She seamlessly adapts to every phase of the celebration, offering a refined musical journey.

For those seeking an even more immersive experience, Ness On Sax frequently collaborates with other distinguished performers—pianists, violinists, and DJs—to create a bespoke ensemble tailored to your vision. Please inquire for further details on these exclusive options.

Below are just a few of the prestigious venues where clients of FixTheMusic have engaged Ness On Sax for their weddings and events…

  • Blubay Club, Via Sant'Antonio, Castro, Lecce
  • Conca Dei Marini, Amalfi Coast
  • Strada Esterna Boccotero, Corato, Bari

If you seek one of Italy’s most exquisite female saxophonists to grace your occasion, look no further than Ness On Sax. Contact us today to begin your journey toward an unforgettable celebration.

The ensemble comprises three exceptionally talented vocalists and instrumentalists, performing on an exquisite array of instruments: double bass, percussion, guitar, and trumpet. Their artistry is further revealed in the captivating video below.

A preferred choice for exclusive weddings and events at Agriturismo Masseria Salamina in Puglia, Italy, Swinging Soul brings an air of sophisticated elegance to every occasion.

Presenting Roma Sax & DJ, a refined musical partnership hailing from the illustrious region of Latina, Lazio. Comprising an impeccably talented saxophonist and a masterful DJ, this distinguished duo has captivated discerning audiences across Italy and beyond for many years, curating unforgettable experiences at the world’s most exclusive celebrations.

Formed in the early 2010s, Roma Sax & DJ swiftly ascended to prominence with their bespoke fusion of live saxophone and expertly mixed DJ sets. From the outset, they were invited to elevate weddings, corporate galas, and private soirées throughout Italy, and soon their impeccable reputation attracted international acclaim, with requests pouring in from far-flung locales.

Contact Roma Sax & DJ
wedding-roma-sax-dj-rome-italy.description_html:
The saxophonist, born and raised in Italy, discovered his passion for the instrument at a tender age. Immersing himself in the world of jazz, he began performing at esteemed local clubs and festivals, his extraordinary skill soon noticed by fellow musicians who invited him to collaborate with elite ensembles.

The DJ, likewise a native of Italy, cultivated a deep love for music from childhood and began his craft in his teens. Through performances at sophisticated clubs and high-profile events, he refined a unique style—seamlessly blending diverse genres with an intuitive grace that is the hallmark of a true artisan.

Their curated repertoire spans an exquisite range of genres: jazz, pop, swing, chill-out, and disco. Renowned for their ability to read a room with impeccable precision, they adapt every set to the mood of the occasion. Furthermore, Roma Sax & DJ offer a bespoke expansion of their performance, seamlessly integrating additional instruments such as electric violin, electric cello, percussion, and vocalists.

Over the years, Roma Sax & DJ have cultivated a devoted following, establishing themselves as one of Italy’s most sought-after saxophone and DJ duos. Their unwavering passion for music and relentless commitment to delivering an unforgettable experience remain as radiant as ever, enchanting audiences at events throughout Italy and across the globe.

ever-after-florence-italy.intro_html:
Ever After – An Exquisite Acoustic Wedding Ensemble, Based in Florence, Italy

Ever After is a refined acoustic wedding ensemble, proudly based in Florence, Italy, conceived to infuse the most significant moments of a celebration with warmth, emotion, and understated elegance.

The curated ensemble comprises vocals, guitar, double bass, and light percussion, artfully blending soul, pop, jazz, and blues classics into an intimate, relaxed, and timeless sound.

Ideal for ceremonies, cocktail hours, and dinners, Ever After prioritises atmosphere over volume, allowing the music to flow seamlessly and enhance every exquisite moment.

Enquire About Ever After
ever-after-florence-italy.description_html:
Each musician brings impeccable years of experience from the Italian music scene and collaboration with national and international artists, resulting in performances that are polished yet authentically human.

The ensemble is trusted by luxury venues and discerning clientele, having graced events at esteemed locations such as Hotel de Paris in Monte Carlo, Rosewood Castiglion del Bosco, and other prestigious destinations across Italy and abroad.

With over two decades of expertise in private events, Ever After is renowned for its reliability, tasteful style, and meticulous attention to detail.

Offering flexible line-ups from duo to quartet, their own professional sound system, and the option of a bespoke background playlist between sets, Ever After adapts effortlessly to any setting.

Whether performing indoors or outdoors, within a historic villa or a countryside estate, they deliver elegance, emotion, and unwavering professionalism to every occasion.

spinning-rome-dj-italy.intro_html:
About Spinning Rome – An Exquisite Wedding & Events DJ, Curated in Rome, Italy

Spinning Rome represents a refined, Rome-based DJ whose impeccable artistry has been cultivated over more than two decades, infusing weddings and exclusive events across Italy with unparalleled energy and sophistication.

His journey began behind the decks at the age of just thirteen, with his first curated club appearance at seventeen. Since then, he has graced hundreds of esteemed venues, building a reputation for sustaining an electrifying dancefloor from the first note to the final beat.

From the most elegant aperitif ambience to an immersive, full-scale celebration, Spinning Rome possesses an instinctive mastery for shaping an event’s bespoke energy with effortless precision.

Contact Spinning Rome
spinning-rome-dj-italy.description_html:
His impeccably curated sets traverse house, tech house, afro house, dance, commercial, EDM, R&B, hip hop, reggaeton, and timeless classics from the seventies, eighties, and nineties—alongside international influences—weaving a soundscape that resonates with every discerning guest.

Offering a fully tailored, bespoke experience, he provides seamless coverage for every moment of the day, from ceremony to dinner to after party, with the exquisite option to elevate the atmosphere with a live saxophone or electric violin.

With professional sound and lighting setups designed for multiple spaces, he transforms any venue—indoor or outdoor—into a refined dancefloor, perfectly curated for the occasion.

Hands-on and meticulously detail-focused, he collaborates closely with venues and planners to ensure every element, from setup to the final track, unfolds with flawless grace.

With flexible set lengths, thoughtfully curated background music between moments, and a passion for crafting unforgettable vibes, Spinning Rome delivers a seamless, high-energy experience that leaves an indelible impression of luxury and refinement.

dj-magnifiko-venice-italy.intro_html:
DJ Magnifiko – An Exquisite Curator of Sonic Experiences for Bespoke Weddings & Celebrations, Based in Venice, Italy

Born and raised in the timeless city of Venice, DJ Magnifiko draws profound inspiration from the smoky, rebellious rock’n’roll of the 1960s and 1970s. In 2005, he began his refined journey behind the turntables at the New Age Club—one of Italy’s most prestigious underground venues—where he was entrusted with opening concerts for both national and international luminaries, meticulously honing his artistry in live performance.

Inquire About DJ Magnifiko
dj-magnifiko-venice-italy.description_html: After nearly a decade of impeccable collaborations, during which he graced the most distinguished events throughout Northern Italy, he became the longtime resident selector at Fishmarket Club in Padua. There, he perfected the art of entertainment, weaving Pop and commercial music into his sets while preserving the eclectic, unmistakable signature that defines him. Today, DJ Magnifiko devotes himself entirely to his craft, traversing Italy and Europe to deliver an electrifying, charismatic performance at luxury weddings, exclusive fashion soirées, and private affairs of the highest calibre. His repertoire is a masterfully adaptive tapestry, attuned to the ambience and discerning tastes of each audience—a performance without boundaries, without rules. He regards himself not merely as a selector, but as a performer and entertainer, rooted in the live-music ethos that first ignited his passion.

two-leos-florence-italy.intro_html:
About The Two Leos – an exquisite Electro Acoustic Duo from Florence, Italy

The Two Leos, a refined electro-acoustic ensemble based in Florence, Tuscany, distill the energy of an entire band into an impeccably curated two‑piece configuration. Their performance—a seamless blend of vocals, guitar, bass, and percussion—delivers a dynamic, immersive sound designed to captivate, inspire movement, and draw every guest into the celebration from the very first note.

Their repertoire, a bespoke collection of over 150 songs, spans from timeless 60s classics to today’s chart triumphs, each piece chosen for its power to evoke joy and familiarity.

Contact The Two Leos
two-leos-florence-italy.description_html:
Rooted in rock and soul, and weaving through 80s pop, 90s indie, and contemporary favourites, every set is a meticulously crafted journey through beloved melodies—ensuring each moment feels both exclusive and effortlessly engaging. The duo delivers approximately two hours of live music, seamlessly adapting to every phase of an event: from the refined ambiance of an aperitif, to the solemn elegance of a wedding ceremony, to the unrestrained exuberance of a grand party. They also provide impeccable background music before, between, and after their sets, orchestrating a flawless flow throughout the day.

Fully self‑contained with professional sound and lighting of the highest quality, The Two Leos arrive in advance to ensure a smooth, unobtrusive setup, and are equally at home in an intimate villa, a grand ballroom, or a picturesque Tuscan terrace. With a minimalist footprint, a profound connection with their audience, and an unwavering dedication to creating exquisite moments, The Two Leos deliver a truly memorable live music experience—one that elevates any occasion into a luxurious celebration.

wedding-photographer-tuscany.intro_html:
The Tuscany Wedding Photographer – an exquisite purveyor of bespoke wedding imagery, based in the heart of Tuscany, Italy.

Renowned for an impeccable ability to capture the most refined moments of your celebration, The Tuscany Wedding Photographer offers a curated luxury experience that transforms fleeting instants into heirlooms. Her journey began in Berlin, where, as a child, she adorned her bedroom walls with printed photographs—an early testament to a lifelong devotion to visual storytelling. Formal studies in Milan were followed by a distinguished career spanning the city’s finest creative circles, then four years in London refined her artistry further. In 2022, she returned to Italy, where her photographic odyssey continues to flourish amid the region’s timeless landscapes.

She collaborates intimately with one of our acclaimed performers, Party Sax & DJ, together forming a seamless symphony of sights and sound—the ultimate bespoke package for any occasion of unparalleled elegance.

Enquire about The Tuscany Wedding Photographer

Fluency in multiple languages renders The Tuscany Wedding Photographer the consummate choice for those orchestrating a destination wedding of distinction. Her linguistic mastery ensures effortless, refined communication with every client and collaborator. Specialising in wedding, fashion, portrait, travel, and still-life photography, she holds the conviction that every individual deserves to feel exquisitely beautiful before the lens. Through her curated expertise, she guides you with grace through each pose, dissolving any apprehension and allowing your authentic radiance to emerge. Always cultivating a relaxed yet sophisticated atmosphere, she captures both candid spontaneity and poised formality with equal mastery.

For those in search of one of Italy’s finest wedding photographers, look no further. The Tuscany Wedding Photographer awaits your invitation—reach out today to secure an experience of unparalleled elegance.

violin-beats-dj-perugia-italy.intro_html:
About Violin & Beats – an exquisite Violin & DJ experience based in Perugia, Italy

A refined multi-instrumentalist with distinguished roots in live event performance, this artist presents a bespoke fusion of classical mastery and contemporary energy for weddings and private celebrations across Italy and beyond. Trained at the prestigious Conservatory of Perugia and born into a lineage of musicians active since the 1970s, he offers an impeccable blend of heritage and dynamic innovation.

Effortlessly transitioning between violin and DJ artistry, he curates a performance that is both elegant and captivating.

Inquire about Violin & Beats

From Italian classical compositions to pop, rock, jazz, house, and disco, his curated repertoire embarks on a sophisticated musical journey—featuring inspirations from Taylor Swift, Coldplay, Avicii, Elton John, Michael Jackson, and beyond. Flexible line‑up options allow for a truly tailored experience, ranging from a solo violin or illuminated electric LED violin to collaborations with DJ, saxophone, and vocalists for an immersive and celebratory atmosphere.

Whether setting an exquisite tone throughout the day or elevating the evening’s energy, every performance is meticulously shaped around the occasion. Fully equipped and deeply experienced, he provides impeccable sound, lighting, and ambient music for the entire event, with performances lasting up to eight hours. Professional, adaptable, and at home in any setting—from the most luxurious venues to enchanting outdoor locations—he delivers a seamless experience with striking visual and musical impact.

tuscan-light-duo-grosseto-italy.intro_html:
About Tuscan Light Duo – an exquisite, professional Wedding & Events Duo based in City, Country

Tuscan Light Duo is a refined acoustic voice and guitar duo, bespoke-crafted for weddings and private events. Established in 2010, their sound emerges from a curated fusion of two distinct musical worlds, converging into one impeccably harmonious journey.

With a warm, pop-infused jazz sensibility subtly edged by rock, their music exudes a relaxed, deeply emotional, and natural elegance—perfect for every cherished moment.

Each song is meticulously arranged by the duo, transforming every performance into a deeply personal and uniquely intimate experience.

The repertoire is always tailored to the couple’s discerning tastes, with devoted attention to the day’s pivotal scenes: the ceremony, cocktail hour, and first dance.

Contact Tuscan Light Duo
tuscan-light-duo-grosseto-italy.description_html:
Their curated repertoire flows gracefully from Italian and international classics to contemporary gems, all reimagined in an acoustic style that feels both intimate and supremely elegant.

Beyond the standard acoustic duo configuration, Tuscan Light Duo offers flexible, bespoke enhancements to suit any atmosphere:

  • Accompaniment by a saxophone or violin for a heightened sense of refinement
  • Expansion into a full ensemble with keys, bass, and drums for a grander presence
  • Pairing with a professional DJ to seamlessly extend the evening’s ambience

They provide their own impeccable sound equipment, may curate playlists between sets, and perform with effortless grace in any setting—from historic villas to open-air celebrations. With a calm, polished professionalism and years of experience, they focus on weaving a beautiful musical backdrop that feels utterly seamless and truly personal.

under-stars-jazz-duo-bologna-italy.intro_html:
Under the Stars – An Exquisite Jazz Duo Based in Bologna, Italy

Under the Stars is a refined jazz ensemble, curated in Bologna and performing across Italy for weddings, private soirées, and the most discerning venues. The project is led by an accomplished jazz guitarist who collaborates with a bespoke selection of Europe’s finest musicians, tailored to each event and its unique requirements. Whether for an intimate cocktail hour or an impeccably elegant evening concert, their sound is warm, sophisticated, and imbued with distinctive character. The core formation is a duo—typically guitar and saxophone—yet the ensemble can be elevated to a trio, quartet, or full quintet, ensuring an exclusive auditory experience.

Contact Under the Stars

Depending on the client’s vision, additional instruments such as double bass, keyboards, drums, or vocals may be gracefully introduced. This exceptional flexibility allows the ensemble to craft the perfect atmosphere for any occasion, from the most intimate gatherings to grand celebrations. They typically perform two curated sets of approximately 50 minutes each, though timings are seamlessly adjusted to complement the event’s flow. Between sets, a bespoke playlist is provided via laptop to sustain an uninterrupted, luxurious ambiance. Under the Stars arrives entirely self-contained, with their own amplifiers and instruments—though lighting is not included. Setup and soundcheck require approximately one to two hours before the performance, depending on the ensemble’s size. The spatial requirements adapt to the chosen line-up, with the group graciously accommodating any venue. They perform with equal poise outdoors or in unconventional settings such as barns, beaches, gardens, or terraces, provided the arrangement ensures comfort and safety. Special song requests—such as a first dance—are welcomed with advance notice, ensuring a perfectly personal touch. Under the Stars is the definitive choice for those who desire live jazz that is personal, polished, and impeccably suited to the setting.

Curated Line-Up Options:

  • Duo
  • Trio
  • Quartet
  • Quintet

strings-in-turin-italy.intro_html:
Strings in Turin – an ensemble of unparalleled refinement, based in Turin, Italy

Strings in Turin is an impeccably curated collective of virtuoso musicians, specialising in destination weddings and the most exclusive celebrations across Italy. Based in the exquisite landscapes of Northern Italy, and regularly performing throughout Toscana, Veneto, and Lombardia, the ensemble crafts bespoke live music and DJ experiences that accompany every chapter of a wedding with seamless elegance and continuity.

Discover more exquisite string quartets in Italy

At the heart of this refined project is a classically trained violinist who commands both traditional and electric instruments—including a luminous electric violin that adds a visually striking dimension to the most memorable moments.

Inquire about Strings in Turin
strings-in-turin-italy.description_html:
From this luminous core, Strings in Turin collaborates with a trusted network of exceptional musicians to assemble the perfect ensemble for each unique event. Configurations range from solo instrumentalists to opulent combinations, including:

  • Harp and violin duos
  • String duos, trios, and quartets
  • Violin and cello ensembles
  • Voice and electric bass formations
  • Solo piano, violin and piano duos
  • Saxophone in solo or combined formats
  • Full DJ sets

The group offers complete day-of-wedding coverage, orchestrating seamless transitions between live performances and DJ sets. Music begins thirty to forty minutes before the ceremony for an exquisite guest welcome, continues through the ceremony, cocktail hour, and dinner, and extends into an after-party that may linger until the small hours. Every performance is entirely bespoke, with special song requests meticulously prepared in advance.

Strings in Turin provides a complete professional sound system—with multiple setups for different areas of the venue—along with microphones for ceremonies and speeches. Lighting is arranged through a trusted partner service, while the team manages all coordination to ensure flawless execution. Arriving approximately three hours before the event and allowing one to two hours for setup and soundcheck, the group guarantees impeccable reliability, technical excellence, and a polished, refined presence.

Flexible in every regard, and equally at home indoors or amid the splendour of outdoor settings, Strings in Turin delivers sophisticated musical experiences that elevate each wedding’s atmosphere with style, professionalism, and an unwavering commitment to detail.

dj-mary-rome-italy.intro_html:
DJ Mary – An Exquisite Female DJ, Based in the Heart of Rome, Italy

Born of an illustrious lineage—the daughter of two celebrated opera singers—Mary curates each performance with an impeccable musical heritage. Fluent in Italian, English, Spanish, and with refined conversational German, she brings a singularly cosmopolitan elegance to every bespoke event.

Inquire About DJ Mary’s Exclusivity
dj-mary-rome-italy.description_html:
A distinguished graduate of the Rome Conservatory’s prestigious electronic music programme, DJ Mary marries her lifelong mastery of music and the dramatic arts to deliver performances of extraordinary refinement. With over three years of experience within the most discerning wedding and private-event circles, she has collaborated with an elite ensemble of singers, instrumentalists, and dancers.

Renowned for her curated, eclectic style and effervescent energy, Mary artfully blends genres to enchant a diverse audience. Her sets are meticulously constructed—engaging, joyous, and irresistibly dance-worthy—ensuring that guests of every age and provenance remain enraptured, moving effortlessly through the night.
dj-mary-rome-italy.faq_html:
<details><summary>What are your normal set lengths?</summary>- 3 hours (they can be divided into 1 + 2 for example). There is an extra cost if I need to play more than 180 minutes.

</details><details><summary>Do you have different line-up options?</summary>- I can also provide and add two singers, a saxophone, a violin and a percussionist if needed.

</details><details><summary>Do you provide your own sound & lighting equipment? What is it or what's included in the price?</summary>- Sound & lighting equipment is not included in my price, but it's an extra service I can provide If required. 

</details><details><summary>Do you provide a laptop playlist / DJ service in between and after your live sets?</summary>- I have pre-recorded mixes by me and playlists that can be used when needed. I can also provide my laptop for that.

</details><details><summary>What time do you normally arrive at the venue to set up?</summary>- Once I've done the soundcheck (when/if the logistic allows it), I'll arrive 30 minutes before my performance. Of course every event has its necessities, so it really depends on that too.

</details><details><summary>How long does it take for you to set up, sound check etc?</summary>- I need 15 minutes to soundcheck if it's just me, one hour if I perform with other artists (singer+sax+percussionist)

</details><details><summary>Can you learn song requests (e.g. a first dance)?</summary>-  I accept requests (specific songs for specific moments or a playlist) within a week of the event.

</details><details><summary>Are you comfortable performing outdoors or in unusual settings (e.g. barns, beaches)?</summary>- I can perform in unusual settings, I only need the table to be high enough for the DJ equipments (not below 120cm).</details>

stano-sax-florence-italy.intro_html:
Stano Sax – An Exquisite Saxophonist for Your Bespoke Wedding, Based in Florence, Italy

Born in Prato on December 16, 1982, Stano Sax’s journey into the world of refined sound began at the age of five, studying piano at the esteemed “Cianchi” Music School in Prato. Simultaneously, he cultivated a compelling presence on stage and in theatre, performing monologues and short comedies with a touring entertainment company that summered across Tuscany. Discovering his voice as a dramatic baritone, he studied opera singing with lyric baritone Giovanni Mazzei—a disciple of the legendary Rolando Panerai—and later with Maestro Valerio Del Piccolo, a lyric bass, sacred music scholar, and orchestral conductor based in Florence.

Contact Stano Sax 💬

Inspired by operatic versatility, he began penning lyrics and performing as a countertenor in an A.O.R. (Adult Oriented Rock) ensemble, and as lead vocalist in a Progressive Hard Rock tribute band dedicated to Queensrÿche. He concurrently enrolled at the “G. Verdi” Music School in Prato, deepening his study of music theory and piano to refine intonation and master musical intervals. A lifelong devotee of wind instruments, he ultimately discovered his truest chemistry with the saxophone—his preferred and primary instrument.

His curated repertoire expresses itself through Chicago Blues, Jazz, Smooth Jazz, Funk, Bossa Nova, Latin, Classic Rock, and Deep House. Currently immersed in studying Jazz and Harmony, he has collaborated with a Japanese digital label, composing original tracks that grace his live performances. He performs at the most impeccable venues—rooftops, hotel conference rooms, banquet halls, and fashion shows across Tuscany, Umbria, Lazio, and Switzerland. Stano Sax collaborates with luxury brands for conferences, fashion events, opulent weddings, and exclusive corporate occasions. He is available to travel throughout Italy and abroad.

Upon request, his performance may be elevated with his voice and diatonic harmonica, complementing the saxophone. A broad musical culture—ever expanding—allows him to adapt both his voice and instrument to any musical language, while preserving his unique, unmistakable stylistic identity.
stano-sax-florence-italy.faq_html:
<details><summary>What are your normal set lengths?</summary>- 2 to 3 hours

</details><details><summary>Do you provide your own sound & lighting equipment? What is it or what's included in the price?</summary>- Yes (in Italy)

</details><details><summary>Do you provide a laptop playlist / DJ service in between and after your live sets?</summary>- Yes

</details><details><summary>What time do you normally arrive at the venue to set up?</summary>- 2.5 hours before performance time

</details><details><summary>How long does it take for you to set up, sound check etc?</summary>- 1 hour

</details><details><summary>Can you learn song requests (e.g. a first dance)?</summary>- Yes of course

</details><details><summary>How much space do you need for your performance area?</summary>- 3m x 3m

</details><details><summary>Are you comfortable performing outdoors or in unusual settings (e.g. barns, beaches)?</summary>- Yes, no problem</details>

midnight-flowers-florence-italy.intro_html:
The Midnight Flowers — An Exquisite Acoustic Duo from Florence, Italy

Comprising the refined vocal artistry of Roberta and the impeccable guitar & vocal mastery of Giacomo, The Midnight Flowers offer a uniquely curated acoustic experience. Based in the heart of Tuscany, yet available for bookings throughout Italy, this distinguished duo presents the perfect musical setting for your most exclusive celebrations. With many years of refined experience in the event industry, they possess the discerning ability to select the ideal accompaniment for every moment of your occasion. They are regularly entrusted to perform for weddings and events at the esteemed Villa Scorzi in Pisa, Italy.

Enquire About The Midnight Flowers

margherita-rosa-singer-guitarist-palermo.intro_html:
Margherita Rosa – An Exquisite Female Vocalist & Guitarist, Based in Palermo, Italy

Immersed in music from childhood, she has devoted years to refining her vocal artistry and guitar mastery, cultivating a bespoke style infused with influences drawn from a curated spectrum of genres. An internationally seasoned performer, she has graced stages across Europe and Australia, captivating audiences with her impeccable pitch and refined presence. Her recitals present acoustic interpretations of timeless classics, spanning an elegant repertoire of international pop, bossa nova, samba, and jazz standards.

Enquire About Margherita Rosa

Whether for an intimate surprise proposal, a refined wedding ceremony, or the perfect ambient backdrop for romantic celebrations, she serenades couples and guests alike, weaving a warm, exclusive, and enchanting atmosphere. From secluded venues and private soirées to distinguished hotels and upscale establishments, her music effortlessly elevates the ambience. Fluent in Italian, English, Spanish, and Portuguese, she connects with audiences with natural grace, rendering each performance a uniquely memorable and luxurious experience.

Curated Line-Up Options:

  • Duo (with a bassist)

sax-affair-saxophonist-puglia-italy.intro_html:
The Sax Affair – An Exquisite Saxophonist, based in Bari, Italy

The Sax Affair is a bespoke fusion of radiant energy, spontaneous improvisation, and a refined desire to set every gathering in motion. I am not the saxophonist who remains anchored to the stage; instead, I move gracefully among guests, curating intimate interaction and bringing the saxophone into the very soul of the celebration. I am regularly entrusted with performances for weddings and exclusive events at Masseria Ayroldi in Ostuni.

Contact The Sax Affair 💬
sax-affair-saxophonist-puglia-italy.description_html:
With over a decade of impeccable experience orchestrating weddings across Puglia, I have mastered the art of discerning those perfect, fleeting moments—when to evoke profound emotion and when to ignite the dance floor with irresistible energy. Each performance blends the elegance of the saxophone with the pulsating power of disco, house, and dance music. Whether it is an opulent luxury wedding or an impeccably curated private affair, my singular ambition remains: to deliver an unforgettable experience, a show steeped in unique vibes and indelible memory.

Curated Line-up Options:

  • Solo Saxophonist – an intimate, refined presence
  • DJ & Sax – a dynamic, bespoke pairing

sax-affair-saxophonist-puglia-italy.faq_html:
<details><summary>What are your normal set lengths?</summary>- From 2 to 3 hours in total, with targeted sax performances mainly during the first 2 hours of the event.

</details><details><summary>Do you provide your own sound & lighting equipment? What is it or what's included in the price?</summary>- Yes, we provide professional audio equipment and, upon request, scenic lighting to create the perfect atmosphere.

</details><details><summary>Do you provide a laptop playlist / DJ service in between and after your live sets?</summary>- Yes, we provide a playlist service managed by a DJ or laptop, both between live performances and to keep the entertainment going after the live show.

</details><details><summary>What time do you normally arrive at the venue to set up?</summary>- I usually arrive on site well in advance, 2 to 3 hours before the event starts, to handle setup and all necessary sound checks.

</details><details><summary>How long does it take for you to set up, sound check etc?</summary>- I usually arrive on site well in advance, 2 to 3 hours before the event starts, to handle setup and all necessary sound checks.

</details><details><summary>Can you learn song requests (e.g. a first dance)?</summary>- Yes, we can prepare requested songs, for example for the first dance or special moments of the event.

</details><details><summary>How much space do you need for your performance area?</summary>- For the party, I usually require a space of approximately 4x3 meters, to be agreed upon depending on the venue.

</details><details><summary>Do you have Public Liability Insurance and PAT-tested equipment?</summary>- Yes, we have public liability insurance and all our equipment is regularly tested and safe to use.

</details><details><summary>Are you comfortable performing outdoors or in unusual settings (e.g. barns, beaches)?</summary>- Absolutely yes, I love performing in outdoor locations and unique settings such as beaches or estates.</details>

golden-strings-violinist-salerno-italy.intro_html:
About Golden Strings – An Exquisite Wedding Violinist Based in Salerno, Italy

Golden Strings is a refined solo violinist, based in the enchanting city of Salerno, Italy, offering impeccable elegance and warmth to weddings and exclusive celebrations.

Originally from Costa Rica, her passion for the violin was discovered in childhood, leading her to pursue a bespoke musical education at university, where she attained degrees in Violin Performance and Psychology—a testament to her exceptional artistry and intellectual depth.

She is also a certified instructor of violin and viola, curating excellence in every note.

Her distinguished career has graced stages across Europe, the Americas, and beyond, allowing her to share her curated repertoire with discerning audiences from myriad cultures.

Contact Golden Strings
golden-strings-violinist-salerno-italy.description_html:
Fluent in Spanish, English, Portuguese, and now embracing Italian, she effortlessly connects with a cosmopolitan clientele, ensuring every interaction is as seamless as it is refined.

Golden Strings delights in live performances, infusing each moment—be it a wedding ceremony, an intimate cocktail hour, or a private soirée—with profound emotion and exquisite beauty.

Her performances are impeccably tailored for up to two hours.

She offers flexible, bespoke line-up options to complement the unique character of each event, and is equally at ease in both indoor and outdoor settings, including such distinctive venues as sun-kissed beaches and rustic barns.

While she does not provide sound or lighting equipment, she can curate a refined playlist or ambient background music before and after her sets, ensuring a continuous atmosphere of luxury.

Golden Strings arrives at least 90 minutes prior to her performance and requires approximately 30–45 minutes for a seamless setup.

Special requests, such as a first dance arrangement, are always accommodated with grace. She adapts effortlessly to varying spatial requirements, guaranteeing a flawless integration into any event’s aesthetic.

bollywood-wedding-dj-italy.intro_html:
The Bollywood DJ – An Exquisite Wedding Band Based in Italy

For those who seek a truly bespoke experience, this refined Indian DJ and entertainer brings impeccable authenticity to weddings, festivals, and curated themed events. Infused with infectious energy and an aura of good vibes, he tailors each playlist to perfection, transforming your Indian wedding or special occasion into an unforgettable luxury affair.

As the very first Indian DJ to introduce the captivating sounds of Bollywood into Italy’s most prestigious venues and private clubs, he is a pioneer of refined musical fusion. His illustrious career began nearly a decade ago at the Diwali festival in Piedmont, where he first captivated discerning audiences.

For those who wish to engage the finest Bollywood wedding DJ Italy has to offer, an exclusive introduction awaits. He is regularly booked to perform at the esteemed La Pescaia Resort in Grosseto, a testament to his unparalleled artistry.

Inquire About The Bollywood DJ

Following his triumphant debut, he graced the most distinguished clubs throughout Piedmont and beyond, curating seamless sets of exquisite sound. This luminary was honoured to perform at the International Book Fair in Turin, where he introduced elite audiences to Bollywood music, and later crafted a special musical tribute for the legendary actor Amitabh Bachan at the Florence Film Festival.

His impeccable reputation led him to serve as the official DJ for the inaugural Miss India Italy beauty pageant, as well as the prestigious Holi Festival celebrations in Rome, Naples, Padova, and Turin. Specialising in an exquisite repertoire of Bollywood, Panjabi, House, and Commercial music, this live event DJ is a celebrated name across Switzerland, Spain, Belgium, and Prague.

Suitable for the most refined occasions, our Indian wedding DJ is guaranteed to elevate your special day into a luminous memory, infusing corporate events, private soirées, festivals, and fashion shows with an unmatched vibrancy. Beyond this, he can orchestrate a seamless musical journey from your ceremony through to the evening reception, maximising your wedding entertainment with a truly luxurious touch.

two-in-turin-duo-italy.intro_html:
Two in Turin – An Exquisite Acoustic Duo from Turin, Italy

Two in Turin presents a refined acoustic experience, weaving soulful melodies with impeccable artistry. Their warm, curated sound elevates every wedding and exclusive celebration, creating an atmosphere of effortless elegance.

Discover the complete selection of bespoke wedding musicians in Italy

Drawing from a meticulously chosen repertoire of folk, jazz, R&B, and Britpop, their performances are tailored to each moment—whether it be a graceful aisle procession, an intimate dinner, or an exuberant evening of dancing. Every note is crafted to resonate with sophistication.

Typically offering a seamless two-hour performance, the duo remains flexible with bespoke line-up configurations to perfectly match the ambiance of your celebration.

Explore the full range of refined acoustic duos in Italy

They are regularly engaged for weddings and distinguished events at Borgo Casa Scaparone in Alba and Villa Muggia in Verbano-Cusio-Ossola, Italy—venues that reflect their commitment to luxury and exclusivity.

Enquire About Two in Turin 💬

Fully appointed with their own impeccable sound and lighting system, they also provide curated playlists between and after sets, ensuring an uninterrupted atmosphere of refined allure. Arriving well in advance, they handle every detail of setup and soundcheck with effortless grace, and are always delighted to learn bespoke requests—such as a first dance piece—to make your celebration truly unique.

Requiring only a few square meters to perform, they are equally at home in a grand ballroom or an enchanting outdoor setting—be it a rustic barn or a pristine beach—ensuring an exquisite auditory experience wherever your event unfolds.

Curated Line-Up Options:

  • Trio: Guitar, Vocals & Saxophone

midnight-bloom-cortona-italy.intro_html:
About Midnight Bloom – An Exquisite Jazz & Soul Ensemble, Based in Cortona, Italy

Since 2015, Midnight Bloom has graced the most discerning stages, artfully weaving the warmth of Italian pop with the timeless elegance of swing. Their sound—smooth, yet vibrantly alive—possesses an innate ability to captivate an audience from the very first note.

At the heart of the ensemble lies a vocalist of remarkable range, moving seamlessly from tender, hushed ballads to radiant, swing-infused anthems.

Enquire About Midnight Bloom
midnight-bloom-cortona-italy.description_html:
The band is completed by an impeccably gifted pianist with a profound affinity for jazz and blues, a drummer whose precision fuses pop, rock and funk into a refined rhythmic tapestry, and a multi-instrumentalist who enriches every composition with depth on guitar and bass. The result is a sound that is at once rich, dynamic, and wholly bespoke.

Compact yet commanding, Midnight Bloom delivers pristine acoustics in the most intimate of settings, employing state-of-the-art audio technology and electronic drums to achieve flawless sound and an elegantly understated visual presence.

For every occasion, a curated selection of line-ups is available—from an intimate piano-and-voice duo to a full quartet complemented by a live DJ set. Performances typically span up to three hours of live music, followed by an hour of seamless DJ artistry, though the ensemble adapts with effortless grace to the unique rhythm of each event.

Whether for an exclusive dinner, a star-lit wedding, or a sophisticated celebration abroad, Midnight Bloom composes an atmosphere of unforgettable refinement—an experience that lingers long after the final note.

Mario DJ – An Artisan of Sonic Excellence, Based in Rome, Italy

Mario DJ is an exceptionally refined open-format disc jockey, dedicated to curating bespoke, high-caliber entertainment for distinguished events.

From his refined base in the capital, Mario DJ performs with impeccable artistry across the nation—for corporate galas, intimate soirées, and the most exquisite weddings.

With years of accomplished performance experience, he possesses the refined skill and innate talent to deliver an unforgettable, impeccably curated show.

Inquire About Mario DJ’s Exquisite Services
dj-rome-mario.description_html:
Mario DJ frequently collaborates with other distinguished performers, including some of Italy’s finest saxophonists, and would be delighted to offer this bespoke addition to your celebration.

Discover our curated selection of Italy’s premier wedding DJs ➡️

Happy to travel for discerning clients, Mario DJ has performed across the country and beyond, at some of Europe’s most celebrated and exclusive venues.

If you seek to engage one of Rome’s most refined musical talents, look no further than Mario DJ—and reach out today to begin crafting your perfect, luxurious event.

sitar-fusion-bari-italy.intro_html:
About Sitar Fusion – An Exquisite Sitar & Handpan Duo, Curated in Bari, Italy

Mantra is far more than a musician; he is an alchemist of sound, weaving an impeccable tapestry of sonic exploration that transcends borders and genres. With a masterful command of instruments as refined as the sitar, handpan, African percussion, theremin, oud, and synthesisers, he invites discerning audiences on a bespoke voyage through the rich tapestry of global music traditions. Each note, each rhythm, is a carefully curated brushstroke on his canvas, painting a portrait of unity in exquisite diversity.

Contact Sitar Fusion
sitar-fusion-bari-italy.description_html: From the ethereal melodies of the sitar to the pulsating beats of African percussion, his compositions are a testament to the interconnectedness of humanity—elegant, timeless, and undeniably luxurious. Within his music, one discerns echoes of ancient traditions mingling with futuristic sounds, creating a sonic landscape that is at once refined and avant-garde. His performances are not mere concerts but transformative experiences, where listeners are transported to realms both familiar and uncharted, enveloped in an atmosphere of pure exclusivity. Through this musical odyssey, he invites us to listen with open hearts and minds, embracing the beauty of diversity and the power of music to transcend boundaries. In a world often divided by differences, his artistry as a professional sitarist serves as an impeccable reminder of our shared humanity and the universal language that connects us all. He is available to perform as a sitar player at weddings, private events, and public concerts across Italy and throughout Europe—offering an unparalleled, bespoke experience for the most discerning of clientele.

melodic-waves-duo-verona-italy.intro_html:
Melodic Waves

Nestled in the enchanting city of Verona, Italy, Melodic Waves is an exquisitely curated jazz and swing ensemble—a bespoke homage to the illustrious era of legendary crooners such as Frank Sinatra and Tony Bennett.

Drawing inspiration from the refined archives of the American and Italian songbooks, this impeccably crafted band radiates a timeless elegance that transcends generations.

An esteemed and recurring presence at The St. Regis in Florence, Melodic Waves is regularly commissioned to elevate weddings and private events with their unparalleled artistry.

Enquire About Melodic Waves
melodic-waves-duo-verona-italy.description_html:
Melodic Waves is far more than a reverent tribute to the musical titans of a bygone era; it is a meticulously refined and versatile experience, gliding effortlessly through a curated tapestry of swing, Latin rhythms, and the gentle sophistication of bossa nova.

Curated Lineups

  • Duo: Guitar & Double Bass + Vocals
  • Trio: Guitar, Double Bass + Vocals & Drums

ragazzo-sax-florence-italy.intro_html:
Ragazzo on Sax – An Exquisite Florentine Wedding Saxophonist & DJ

A graduate of the esteemed Giovanni Battista Martini Conservatory of Bologna, I bring impeccable artistry and refined professionalism to every occasion. Based in Florence, Italy, I curate unforgettable experiences with the magical sound of the saxophone—offering alto, soprano, and tenor performances that elevate any celebration.

Discover our full collection of wedding musicians in Italy

Each event is a bespoke symphony: pop, soul, bossa nova, dance, jazz, and the most fashionable sax covers are woven together to create an enchanting atmosphere. I am regularly entrusted with weddings at the sublime Castello Di Ristonchi in Florence and the serene Convento di Montepozzali in Grosseto, ensuring every moment—from civil ceremonies to grand receptions—is utterly unforgettable.

Explore our Sax & DJ groups in Italy

My signature offering includes a full-day DJ and sax performance, complete with state-of-the-art audio and lighting systems, seamlessly integrated across aperitif, dinner, and party stations. Together, we will curate the soundtrack of your day—selecting your most cherished melodies, which I will perform with exquisite artistry for you and your guests.

Contact Ragazzo on Sax 💬
ragazzo-sax-florence-italy.description_html:
My service extends to civil, church, and alternative ceremonies, and I take the utmost care of your entire wedding journey—from the pre-arrival drinks through to the emotional dinner, the cake cutting, and the vibrant party. With years of refined experience, I also serve as your DJ, offering a specially curated variety of music that inspires your guests to dance with unbridled joy to the captivating rhythms of my saxophone.

For an even more exclusive experience, I can perform alongside your resident or guest DJs, or provide a complete package featuring a DJ and—should you wish—a percussionist, guitar player, bassist, pianist, or a female vocalist. Choosing a music professional of the highest caliber is essential to ensuring your event is steeped in elegance, laughter, and indelible memories.

Line-up Options

  • Solo Sax
  • DJ & Sax
  • DJ, Sax & Percussion
  • DJ, Sax, Percussion & Violin
  • TRIO BAND (guitar, female voice, and Sax)
  • QUARTET BAND (drums, guitar, female voice, and sax)
  • FULL BAND (drums, guitar, bass, keyboards, female voice, and sax)

wedding-saxophonist-rome.intro_html:
About The Rome Saxophonist – a maestro of refined melody, based in Rome, Italy

The Rome Saxophonist offers an exquisite musical experience for the most discerning events. An impeccable wedding saxophonist based in the heart of Rome, he is available for hire across a curated selection of occasions and functions.

From nuptial celebrations and intimate private soirées to prestigious corporate gatherings and concert performances, The Rome Saxophonist delivers a masterful, versatile repertoire that captivates every audience with effortless elegance.

Though his atelier is in Rome, this distinguished musician frequently performs throughout Italy at both public and private affairs, and is delighted to travel to your chosen destination to create a bespoke atmosphere.

Inquire with The Rome Saxophonist

Specialising in classical renditions, this supremely talented saxophonist enchants guests as he guides them through history’s finest compositions, each note curated for sublime impact.

The Rome Saxophonist also performs an array of other genres, and welcomes personalised requests to ensure your celebration features a truly bespoke performance, tailored to your every desire.

His sets typically span 50 to 100 minutes, and his refined roaming style makes him the perfect performer for any setting—whether grand or intimate, indoors or al fresco.

Should you wish to engage one of Italy’s most distinguished saxophonists, look no further than The Rome Saxophonist. Contact him today to secure an exclusive, unforgettable musical experience.

aurora-harp-treviso-italy.intro_html:
About Aurora Harp – An exquisite wedding harpist, based in the refined city of Treviso, Italy

At the age of eight, a profound enchantment with this most ethereal of instruments began. That early passion culminated in a distinguished graduation from the Conservatory of Music, where every note was honed through impeccable technique, deep musicality, and a rigorously academic approach.

Guided by an innately romantic and aesthetic sensibility, I aspired to elevate my studies into an art form worthy of life’s most significant moments. Thus, I began performing exclusively for weddings and private events—the perfect, luminous setting for the harp’s timeless voice.

Contact Aurora Harp 💬
aurora-harp-treviso-italy.description_html:
I curate a selection of bespoke musical experiences, each designed to infuse your event with elegance and exclusivity. The harp alone offers a delicate, crystalline whisper; harp and violin create an impeccably classic tapestry; while harp and singer introduce graceful movement, yet always remain supremely refined. This last ensemble is exceptionally rare—a carefully studied and transcribed repertoire for this singular duo, crafted with painstaking precision.

My repertoire spans the breadth of classical masterworks to the most contemporary compositions, all chosen to reflect your personal vision. I take great pleasure in offering a truly personalized service—listening intently to the musical atmosphere you wish to evoke, and tailoring every selection to your narrative.

I am available for weddings from the ceremony through the reception and first dance, as well as for corporate galas and other exclusive private occasions. Ultimately, I believe that music must be as beautiful to behold as it is to hear. That is why I always invite my clients to share their event’s colour palette, allowing me to don a gown that harmonises perfectly with your curated aesthetic.

Curated Line-up Options:

  • Harp Solo
  • Harp & Violin
  • Harp & Singer
  • Harp, Singer & Violin

aurora-harp-treviso-italy.faq_html:
<details><summary>What are your normal set lengths?</summary>- Around 2 hours

</details><details><summary>Do you have different line-up options?</summary>- Yes, from solo harp to duo and trio - as mentioned above.

</details><details><summary>Do you provide your own sound & lighting equipment? What is it or what's included in the price?</summary>- Yes for my harp or additional musicians

</details><details><summary>Do you provide a laptop playlist / DJ service in between and after your live sets?</summary>- No

</details><details><summary>What time do you normally arrive at the venue to set up?</summary>- 1.5 hours before performance starts

</details><details><summary>How long does it take for you to set up, sound check etc?</summary>- 30mins to 45mins

</details><details><summary>Can you learn song requests (e.g. a first dance)?</summary>- Yes, I really like to personalise your playlist.

</details><details><summary>How much space do you need for your performance area?</summary>- 3/4 square metres.

</details><details><summary>Are you comfortable performing outdoors or in unusual settings (e.g. barns, beaches)?</summary>- Yes, but the harp must be kept on the shade.</details>

rhythm-fusion-rome-italy.faq_html:
<details><summary>What are your normal set lengths?</summary>- We typically perform one set of up to 1.5 hours of soft, elegant music, followed by a 1-hour non-stop dance set without breaks.

</details><details><summary>Do you provide your own sound & lighting equipment? What is it or what's included in the price?</summary>- We can provide a basic sound system or a full premium setup, which includes risers and a minimal lighting setup.

</details><details><summary>Do you provide a laptop playlist / DJ service in between and after your live sets?</summary>- We offer both a DJ service and a laptop playlist option for after the live performance.

</details><details><summary>What time do you normally arrive at the venue to set up?</summary>- Our sound team arrives at least 3.5 hours before the start of the event. The band itself arrives 2 hours before.

</details><details><summary>How long does it take for you to set up, sound check etc?</summary>- It usually takes us about 90 minutes to set up and soundcheck, depending on the venue.

</details><details><summary>Can you learn song requests (e.g. a first dance)?</summary>- We can learn up to 3 custom song requests, to be discussed and agreed upon in advance.

</details><details><summary>How much space do you need for your performance area?</summary>- We’ll adapt to the available space, but we appreciate having enough room to move and perform comfortably, especially for larger line-ups.

</details><details><summary>Are you comfortable performing outdoors or in unusual settings (e.g. barns, beaches)?</summary>- Yes, we’re happy to perform outdoors or in non-traditional venues such as barns, beaches, etc.</details>

tuscany-pianist-wedding-florence-italy.intro_html:
The Tuscany Pianist – An Exquisite Offering for Bespoke Wedding & Event Experiences

Based in the heart of Florence, The Tuscany Pianist is a refined professional pianist and performer, curating impeccable musical moments for the most discerning clientele.

Her artistry is grounded in rigorous training across a breadth of genres, yet she has honed an exclusive repertoire that seamlessly bridges classical masterpieces and contemporary pop—each piece selected to elevate every occasion.

Whether for an intimate wedding, a lavish private soirée, or a distinguished corporate gathering, she delivers an atmosphere of unparalleled elegance, exclusively throughout Italy.

Enquire About The Tuscany Pianist
tuscany-pianist-wedding-florence-italy.description_html:
For her solo performances, The Tuscany Pianist brings a high-quality digital piano encased in a sophisticated upright-style cabinet—an instrument that not only produces exquisite sound but also serves as a visual statement of luxury. This bespoke setup ensures her performance remains flawless in any setting, eliminating the need for an acoustic piano while adding an extra touch of curated refinement to your event.

With an expansive, meticulously selected repertoire, she is perfectly suited for wedding ceremonies, elegant aperitifs, or an unforgettable dinner accompaniment. She is also available for the most exclusive private dinners, where intimacy and exclusivity are paramount.

Every detail is attended to: she supplies all necessary equipment, allowing you to indulge in the experience without a single concern. Simply reach out, and begin the journey of adorning your event with impeccable piano music.

Line-Up Options:

  • Solo Pianist
  • Duo – with the option to add violin, cello, or a vocalist
  • Trio – with the option to add violin & cello, or a vocalist

wedding-harpist-italy-maria.intro_html:
About Maria Harpist – An Exquisite Harp Virtuoso for Italy’s Most Refined Celebrations

Born in France and now residing in Italy, Maria possesses an impeccably curated musical journey—one defined by a ceaseless pursuit of artistic evolution. She graces the world’s most distinguished stages, from Italy and France to Portugal, Ireland, Belgium, Switzerland, Sweden, Holland, Spain, Mexico, Brazil, the United States, Dubai, China, India, and Egypt, performing an exquisite repertoire spanning traditional, Celtic, modern, and early music. For those seeking the finest harpist Italy has to offer for an unforgettable wedding or event, an introduction to Maria is the first step toward a bespoke auditory experience.

Her talents are regularly reserved for ceremonies and celebrations at the most exclusive venues: Locanda in Tuscany—a luxury hotel nestled in the hills of the Val d’Orcia—Castelfranco Veneto in Treviso, and the Conti di San Bonifacio Wine Resort in Gavorrano, Italy.

Inquire with Maria Harpist
wedding-harpist-italy-maria.description_html:
A luminary in her field, Maria has contributed to over ten recordings for early music projects and has released two solo albums of her own compositions—Ankaa and Believe—alongside two duet albums with the Harp & Hang duo: Menhir and Nyanga. Her published scores grace the catalogues of Stella Mattutina, and she has authored three Ebooks on the Celtic harp with Area 51. Since 2008, she has directed the Harp School of the “Arpeggi” Cultural Association in Bologna—an institution she founded—and serves as artistic director of the Bologna Harp Festival, while also holding a seat on the artistic committee of the Italian Harp Association. Additionally, she directs the International Harp Therapy Programme in Italy.

The following prestigious locations represent but a few of the venues where discerning clients on FixTheMusic have secured her artistry for weddings and events:

  • Locanda in Tuscany, Val d’Orcia, Italy
  • Castelfranco Veneto, Treviso, Italy
  • Conti di San Bonifacio Wine Resort, Gavorrano, Italy
  • St. Moritz, Switzerland

Maria’s expertise is sought worldwide for masterclasses and conferences on improvisation, composition, harp therapy, and early harps—including the Nobber Harp Festival (Ireland), Harp on Wight (UK), Rencontres de Harpes Celtiques de Dinan (France), IHTP (Hong Kong), conservatories in Pesaro, Parma, Vibo Valentia, and Cosenza, the University of Bologna (Italy), the University of Colorado (USA), and the Virtual Harp Summit (USA). She has also been invited as a speaker for a TEDx Conference. Since 2004, she has collaborated with the International Museum and Library of Music in Bologna, Italy.

Her refined artistry began in childhood, dedicated to the study of the Celtic harp in Brittany, France, under the tutelage of Anne Le Signor. In 1997, she earned the Diploma from the Conservatory of Lannion. She simultaneously specialized in the ancient Celtic harp with metal strings under Violaine Mayor and Katrien Delavier, embarking on her first Celtic music tour of Brittany in 1996. Further studies in early harps followed at the Centre de Musique Medievale in Paris. In 2002, she obtained the Diploma in Ancient Harp at the Tours Conservatory, alongside a Diplôme d’Études Approfondies in Musicology from the University of Tours (Centre d’Études Supérieures de la Renaissance).

Her mastery of the Celtic harp was refined with Myrdhin and Grainne Hambly, and she pursued harp therapy under Christina Tourin (International Harp Therapy Program, San Diego), earning her CHTP Certificate in 2017.

Maria has performed at prestigious festivals worldwide—solo, in duet, and with distinguished ensembles such as Doulce Mémoire, Ar Strobineller, Francesca Caccini, Il Concento, Sensus, Korymbos, Armoniche Produzioni, Silentia Lunae, Accademia degli Astrusi, Ensemble Armonia delle Sfere, Lorenzo da Ponte, Duo Telyn, Celtic Dream, and Harp & Hang. Notable appearances include Wonder Festival 2017, 2018, 2019 (USA), World Harp Congress (China, Hong Kong), Stockholm Early Music Festival (Sweden), Wight Harp Festival (UK), Brussels Harp Festival (Belgium), Nobber Harp Festival (Ireland), Sentmenat Harp Festival (Spain), Virtual Harp Summit (USA), Les Très Riches Heures de Simiane La Rotonde (France), Musica Antica Festival of Loulé (Portugal), Musica Antica Festival of Mexico City, X and XI Rio Harp Festival (Brazil), Music in the Mendrisiotto (Switzerland), Festival Colla Voce di Poitiers (France), Eglise des Billettes of Paris (France), Festival Les Baroquiales of Sospel (France), Rencontres Internationales de Harpes Celtiques de Dinan (France), and Les Roches Celtiques, Saint Etienne (France).

Within Italy, her festival engagements include Ravenna Festival, Festival Taggia in Arpa (Liguria), Festival of Viggianese Harp (Potenza), Note e Arte nel Romanico a Modena (MO), Bologna Festival, and Grandezze e Meraviglie (MO), among many others.

She has graced an illustrious array of venues and theatres: the Royal Opera House Mumbai (India), Concert Hall Hong Kong, Concert Hall New Delhi (India), Theatre of Boulogne-Billancourt (Paris), Theater of Bologna, Dubai World Expo Forum, Carlo San Felice Theatre (Genova), Theatre of Ferrara, Theatre of Ventimiglia, La Chapelle Royale (Versailles), the Fondation Querini Stampalia (Venice), and Sforza Castle (Milano).

balkan-klezmer-band-milan.intro_html:
About The Italian Klezmer Band – an exquisite Balkan & Klezmer ensemble based in Milan, Italy

The Italian Klezmer Band offers a refined and vivacious folk music experience, specialising in the impeccable performance of traditional songs imbued with a distinctive Balkan and Klezmer aesthetic. Though newly established, the band’s repertoire has been meticulously curated in the style of Balkan fanfares and Jewish Klezmer traditions. The ensemble’s bespoke line-up is crafted to suit each occasion, ranging from an intimate nine pieces to a magnificent twenty musicians, making it a highly sought‑after choice for Jewish wedding celebrations throughout Italy.

Inquire with The Italian Klezmer Band

The band’s years of combined industry experience render it the quintessential selection for any illustrious event. Whether performing alfresco or within an elegant interior, as a full orchestra or a more intimate ensemble, the musicians deliver an experience that is both impeccably professional and joyfully engaging. The Italian Klezmer Band has graced stages across Italy, including the Street Artists Festival in the province of Bergamo (Costa di Mezzate, Mozzo, Sarnico) and numerous locations in the Lombard provinces of Parma, Milan, Brescia, Florence, as well as the cities of Bologna, Cuneo, Treviso, Udine, Trieste, and Lucca. Their roaming, energetic, and resplendent presence produces an atmosphere of unparalleled vibrancy—a true celebration that captivates every guest. They are the ideal ensemble to bring the exquisite Balkan and Klezmer ambiance you envision to your wedding.

With over three hours of refined repertoire, the band presents an exquisite selection of songs including Hava Naguila, Ale Brider, Bubamara, Mesecina, Galizianer Tanz, Djelem Djelem, and many more—ranging from traditional melodies to pieces by Bregovic and original compositions. Their curated wedding performance typically unfolds as follows:

Playing at the aperitivo before dinner to warm the guests with refined anticipation
Playing during dinner with one or two elegant interventions
Playing after the cake cutting, when the atmosphere is joyous and guests are free to move and dance, creating a truly magnificent party ambiance

The band is entirely open to bespoke discussions, tailoring every element to your wishes and the unique character of your venue. Here is just one of the distinguished locations where they have been booked by clients on FixTheMusic for weddings and events:

  • Caprino Veronese, Italy

For those seeking one of Italy’s most exquisite Klezmer and Balkan bands, look no further than The Italian Klezmer Band—an impeccable choice for your most cherished celebration.

female-dancer-italy-hire.intro_html:
About The Italian Dancer – an exquisite female performer, proudly based in Milan, Italy

Born in the refined heart of Milan, Ema began her illustrious journey as a performer in Italy’s most esteemed venues from an exceptionally young age. Dance and music have always been her profound passion—a devotion she has cultivated across the globe. Having lived in Venezuela, Germany, Great Britain, and the United States, she has drawn ever closer to the worlds of art and music, refining her artistry with each destination.

The Italian Dancer is available for a curated selection of weddings, corporate events, and private celebrations—both throughout Italy and internationally.

Contact The Italian Dancer
female-dancer-italy-hire.description_html:
Ema’s journey began in Milan, where her impeccable training commenced at the prestigious M.A.S. school. In 2008, she graduated with top honours in Music, Arts and Entertainment Management from Buckinghamshire New University in England. It was in London that she discovered and began her bespoke study of Oriental dance under the guidance of Anne White at Sahara Nights.

For many years, she has graced the most exclusive venues across Italy and abroad as a performer and belly dancer. Her presence has been featured on national and local television—an embodiment of refined artistry. Her school is regarded as a serene, protected sanctuary where art is imparted in an atmosphere of tranquil, positive energy. Every student is placed at ease, allowing their learning to flourish in an environment of impeccable care.

In January 2014, Ema achieved a stunning triumph at the Italian Absolute Championships—Master Class in Rimini—securing three gold medals, placing first in all disciplines: Oriental, Show, and Folk. In May 2014, she claimed two golds and one silver at the World Championships in Moscow, ranking first in Oriental and Show, and second in Folk. Her competitive successes continued at the European Championships in Sochi in 2015, where she earned third in Oriental Dance, first in Show, and second in Folk. The Italian Championships of 2016 were equally resplendent, with a first-place finish in Show and two second-place accolades in Oriental Dance and Folk.
